title: Social Media Manager (Lead Generation & Marketing Focus)
description:
We’re Hiring: Social Media Manager (Lead Generation and Marketing Focus)



Before anything else, please follow this instruction carefully. To be considered, you must send the link to your intro video, portfolio, and CV in your application. This will be used as part of our initial screening to assess attention to detail and ability to follow simple instructions.



Are you someone who knows how to turn content into conversations and conversations into real leads? We’re looking for a hands-on Social Media Manager who can take ownership of our online presence and help us grow across multiple platforms.



Position: Social Media Manager

Salary: $800/month

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: Full-time (flexible, but must overlap with business hours when needed)



What You’ll Be Doing

Manage and grow our presence on LinkedIn, Instagram, and

Identify and expand into other platforms that drive results (e.g., TikTok, X/Twitter, YouTube Shorts, Reddit, etc.)

Plan, create, and publish engaging content (posts, captions, short-form videos, stories)

Execute strategies focused on lead generation, brand awareness, and engagement

Handle inbox and comment responses in a timely and professional manner

Research trends, competitors, and audience behavior to improve performance

Set up and optimize profiles/pages for better visibility and conversions

Work closely with our team to align content with campaigns and business goals

Track performance metrics (reach, engagement, leads) and adjust strategy accordingly

Use tools (e.g., scheduling platforms, CRMs, analytics dashboards) to stay organized and efficient



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience managing social media accounts for businesses (especially for lead generation and marketing)

Strong understanding of LinkedIn outreach and organic growth strategies

Creative thinker who can write compelling captions and spot content opportunities

Comfortable with basic graphic design tools (Canva or similar)

Knowledge of short-form video trends is a big plus

Organized, proactive, and able to work independently

Good English communication skills (written and verbal)

Results-driven mindset, you care about leads and conversions, not just likes



Nice to Have (But Not Required)

Experience with paid ads (Meta, LinkedIn, etc.)

Familiarity with automation tools and CRM systems

Background in B2B marketing or appointment setting



Why Join Us

Fully remote role with flexibility

Opportunity to grow and take ownership of strategy

Work with a team focused on real business results, not vanity metrics



How to Apply

Send your application with the following:

Link to your intro video

Link to your portfolio

Copy of your CV



If you’re someone who enjoys testing ideas, analyzing what works, and continuously improving, this role is for you. We’re not just looking for someone to post content, but someone who understands how to make social media work for business growth.

title: Staff Accountant
description:
Full-Time Employee (Not a Contractor Role)



We're currently seeking a skilled Staff Accountant in the Philippines to join our growing team!



Join our team as a full-time employee, where you can contribute remotely while benefiting from a collaborative work environment. Please note that this is a full-time position, not a contractor role. During the first 90 days, we ask that you align your work hours with your manager's time zone, which includes working some hours during the 10pm-6am night shift Philippine time. After this period, based on your performance, you'll work with your director to create a schedule that includes a four-hour overlap.



The primary role of this position is to serve various industries through our Bookkeeping and Accounting Services.

Work Experience:

Candidates should have experience:

Skills:

• Collaboration: Demonstrated the ability to works effectively with others, both internally and externally to achieve goals.

• Gusto, Quickbooks, Sage Intacct, 
, Divvy, HubDoc, ChargeOver

• Skilled at
 management via Microsoft Outlook

)

• Compensation and Benefits

Education: A Bachelor’s degree in accounting, finance, business OR an Associate’s degree in finance is required.



Competitive Salary: DOE

title: Finance Manager
description:
We Don't Need a Bookkeeper. We Need a Finance Manager Who Gives Us the Numbers to Make Smarter Decisions.

Finance Manager



Most finance people track what already happened. You'll give us the clarity to know where we're going—and how to get there profitably.



About Rescale Media:

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 40+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started.

Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values:

GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Role:

At $1M+/month across multiple brands, financial clarity isn't optional—it's how we make every decision.

We need someone who can manage the financial operations of a fast-moving e-commerce company. That means tracking revenue, expenses, and profitability across brands. Managing cash flow. Coordinating contractor payments for a 40+ person team. Building reports that help leadership make smarter decisions.



This isn't just data entry and bookkeeping. You'll be the person who tells us exactly where the money is going, where we're profitable, where we're bleeding, and what we need to fix. When you do your job well, we make better decisions—and better decisions compound into millions.



What You'll Do:

Manage day-to-day financial operations across multiple brands

Track revenue, expenses, and profitability with clear reporting

Manage cash flow—know where every dollar is and where it's going

Coordinate contractor payments and payroll for 40+ tea
mbers

Build and maintain financial dashboards and reports for leadership

Prepare monthly financial summaries and P&L statements

Manage budgets and flag overspending before it becomes a problem

Work with external accountants and bookkeepers as needed

Identify opportunities to reduce costs and improve margins

Support financial planning and forecasting



What We're Looking For:

2+ years of experience in finance, accounting, or financial management

Strong understanding of P&L statements, cash flow, and financial reporting

Experience managing payments and payroll (especially for contractors/remote teams)

Proficient with financial tools and spreadsheets (Excel/Google Sheets, QuickBooks, Xero, etc.)

Highly organized—you track everything and nothing slips

Detail-oriented—you catch errors before they become problems

Clear communicator—you can explain financial data to non-finance people

Proactive—you flag issues and opportunities without being asked



Bonus Points:

Experience in e-commerce or DTC companies

Familiarity with Shopify financials and payment processors (Stripe, PayPal, etc.)

Background in multi-brand or holding company structures

Experience with financial forecasting and budgeting

You've worked in a fast-paced startup or scaling company



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

People who only do data entry without understanding the bigger picture

Those who wait to be asked for reports instead of proactively sharing insights

Anyone who struggles with accuracy or makes careless errors with numbers

People who can't explain financial concepts simply to non-finance tea
mbers

Those who've only worked in slow-moving corporate environments

People who see finance as just "tracking the past" instead of informing the future



Compensation & Benefits:

Monthly Salary: $1,500/month



Plus:

Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

Remote-first environment

Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process:

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Initial Interview with Founder

Step 3: Internal Assessment by Rescale

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training

Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?



Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. Great finance management is invisible—the numbers are always right, the reports are always ready, and leadership always knows where they stand. If you're the type who makes financial chaos disappear, we want to talk.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Zoho Specialist
description:
Join Our Growth Journey: Zoho CRM & Campaigns Specialist (Remote, Flexible Hours)



About Us



We’re a fast-growing, forward-thinking company based in Vancouver, BC — but our team is spread far and wide. Innovation, integrity, and continuous improvement aren’t just words on a wall for us — they’re how we work and grow every day. We’re looking for someone who shares our mindset and knows how to bring Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns to life in ways that truly move the needle.



Why This Role Is Exciting?



If you're a Zoho whiz who loves building systems that actually make a difference — this is your 
nt. We’re offering a flexible, part-time or project-based opportunity where your ideas are valued, your skills are trusted, and your schedule is respected.



We’re not just looking for someone to “keep the lights on.” We want a partner to help us unlock the full potential of Zoho, streamline our sales and marketing workflows, and ensure that we’re always one step ahead in how we engage with our customers.



What You'll Do



>>> Customize & optimize Zoho CRM to support our evolving business needs

>>> Design and manage
 campaigns using Zoho Campaigns that actually get results

>>> Analyze CRM data to help us better understand our customers and their journeys

>>> Train and support our internal team so everyone can thrive using Zoho tools

>>> Troubleshoot, configure, build, and refine—you're the go-to Zoho expert

>>> Recommend smarter ways to use dashboards, workflows, integrations, SMS/email campaigns and more



What We're Looking For



- Hands-on experience with Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns (customization is your jam)

- Strategic thinker who loves turning messy processes into clean, scalable systems

- Comfortable working independently and communicating clearly in a remote environment

- Familiarity with tools like Asana (or other project management software)

- Someone who genuinely enjoys sharing knowledge and helping others get the most out of their tools



Perks & Benefits



- Flexible hours — work when you’re most productive

- Remote-first culture — work from anywhere

- Competitive pay (part
 basis)

- Potential for long-term collaboration and future projects

- A small, nimble, and supportive team that values your input



How to Apply:



We want to get to know you more, please send us:



- Your updated resume

- 1-minute introduction video that tells us:

- Your experience with Zoho CRM and Zoho Campaigns, especially around buildouts

- Your availability (we’re looking for someone to contribute 5–10 hours/month)



Whether you feel confident reviewing our existing Zoho setup and offering expert guidance on ways to improve (e.g., dashboards, automations, integrations, campaigns, etc.)



Let’s build something great together. If you're excited to leave a real impact and love making systems sing, we can’t wait to meet you.

title: Web Developer
description:
Company Overview:

Join our innovative digital team as we strive to lead in the online space, crafting beautiful, functional, and user-friendly websites. Our company is committed to delivering top-notch digital experiences that drive results and set our clients apart. As we expand, we are looking for a talented and passionate WordPress Developer to bring fresh ideas and technical expertise to our projects.



Role Summary:

As a WordPress Developer at our company, you will be responsible for uploading and managing the content, setting up and tweaking themes and plugins settings, test websites on multiple devices, and run security updates. Your role will involve creating visually appealing, robust, and high-performing websites that offer exceptional user experiences.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and implement new features and functionalities for WordPress sites.

Ensure high-performance and availability, managing all technical aspects of the CMS.

Work closely with our design team to ensure the technical feasibility of UI/UX designs.

Optimize websites for maximum speed, scalability, and indexing (SEO).

Content planning in partnership with the team.

Provide technical support and educate tea
mbers on WordPress best practices.



Qualifications:

Proven work experience as a WordPress Developer.

Experience designing and developing responsive design websites.

Ability to understand CSS changes to ensure consistent style across platforms and browsers.

Excellent communication skills and a team-player attitude.



Nice to have

Previous experience with most popular WordPress themes and plugins.

Understanding of front-end and back-end technologies, including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.

Comfortable working with debugging tools and version control systems.

Knowledge of how to interact with RESTful APIs and formats (JSON, XML) is a plus.



What We Offer:

Competitive salary and benefits package.

A dynamic and supportive work environment where innovation and creativity are encouraged.

Opportunities for professional growth and development.

Flexible working hours and the possibility to work remotely.



How to Apply:

If you’re passionate about WordPress development and eager to join a creative, collaborative team, we’d love to hear from you! Please submit your resume, a portfolio showcasing your recent projects, and a brief cover letter explaining why you’d be a great fit for this role.



We’d also appreciate a short 1-minute video introduction to help us get to know you better.



Take the next step in your career with us and help shape the future of digital experiences!

title: Real Estate Marketing & Admin Assistant (Full Time)
description:
We are looking for a full-time Marketing & Admin Assistant to support a growing real estate team with marketing, social media, client communication, listing preparation, and administrative support. This is a long-term position with opportunity for growth.



Schedule & Pay

Full Time - 40 hours per week

Monday - Friday 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM PST

Starting pay: $7 per hour

title: Story-Driven Video Editor / Content Creator (Final Cut Pro)
description:
Based in Canada, Ground2Air Media is a premier full-service branding and marketing agency dedicated to empowering Realtors® and small businesses. We specialize in crafting exceptional, high-quality visual media—from real estate listing tours to dynamic social media content and brand storytelling. Our mission is to elevate our clients' brand presence and foster growth in a fast-paced digital landscape. We operate with a highly collaborative, innovative team, combining our on-the-ground Canadian production crew with a talented roster of remote overseas editors to deliver outstanding results



The Role:

We are seeking a passionate and talented Storytelling Video Editor to join our growing content creation division. If you believe that a video's true power lies in its ability to drive emotion and tell a compelling story rather than just showing off flashy effects, this is the role for you.



Currently, this is a pay-per-project role, however, we have a consistent, heavy flow of work that will easily keep you busy for 20 to 40 hours per week. As our content creation division continues to scale rapidly, our ultimate goal is to transition the right candidate into a full-time position, where you will eventually help us build and lead a larger team of editors.



Key Responsibilities:



Story-First Editing: Craft engaging, emotion-driven videos that tell a clear and compelling narrative for our diverse roster of clients (trades, health, finance, real estate, etc.).



Sound Design & Audio: Implement high-quality sound design, audio mixing, and music selection that perfectly matches the mood, pacing, and emotional tone of the video.



Captioning: Create dynamic, trendy, and highly accurate text/captions for short-form social media content (Instagram Reels, TikToks, talking-head videos, etc.).



Collaboration & Efficiency: Work seamlessly with our lead editors, production team, and project managers (using tools like 
, Dropbox, Slack and 
) to meet deadlines and maintain the recognizable Ground2Air Media standard of quality.



Our Style & Examples:

We have a distinct standard of quality and pacing. You must be able to match (or exceed) the style of editing shown in the examples below.  If you can feel you can match this, we'd love to chat.











Requirements:



Software Proficiency: You MUST use Final Cut Pro as your primary editing software to align with our team's workflow.



Storytelling Mindset: You prioritize narrative flow, pacing, and emotional impact over over-the-top transitions and heavy VFX. You know how to keep a viewer hooked from the first second, regardless of whether you are editing a video for a roofing company or a financial advisor.



Technical Skills: Expert-level skills in sound design, captioning and colour grading.



Reliability & Communication: You must have a fast, reliable internet connection for downloading/uploading large files daily. Strong English communication skills are required—we value transparency, responsiveness, and a collaborative attitude.



Why Join Us?



Consistent Workload: 20-40 hours of steady, per-project work per week right out of the gate.



Massive Growth Potential: A clear pathway to a full-time salaried role and future leadership opportunities as we expand our editing team.



Great Culture: Join a supportive, collaborative, and highly organized team that values your creative input, provides ongoing mentorship, and invests in your development.



How to Apply:



Please apply directly through onlinejobs.ph by responding to this ad with the following:



A Relevant Portfolio: We want to see story-driven content. Please do not just send us a folder full of basic talking-head videos. Show us examples where you crafted a narrative, built emotion, and utilized excellent sound design and colour grading.



Confirmation of Software: Tell us how long you have been using Final Cut Pro. Please note: If you are a Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut editor, please do not apply. We are strictly looking for Final Cut Pro editors to match our internal workflow and are not interested in hiring outside of this ecosystem.

title: Full-Stack Developer (API Integrations & Automation Specialist)
description:
About Us:

1st Optimal is a cutting-edge functional medicine and health optimization company that specializes in hormone health, weight loss, energy, and longevity. We leverage advanced lab testing, medical oversight, and personalized wellness protocols to help high-achieving adults take control of their health. We are expanding our technical team and looking for an experienced Full-Stack Developer to join our dynamic team and work on innovative projects.



Job Description:

We are seeking a talented and driven Full-Stack Developer to enhance our tech stack and drive automation initiatives. The ideal candidate will have experience with API integrations, Zoho One apps, Zapier, AI tools like ChatGPT, WordPress, Shopify, and more. This is an exciting opportunity to work in a fast-paced, collaborative environment where your skills will directly impact the business.



Key Responsibilities May Include:

- API Integrations: Integrate various systems and third-party tools to improve operational efficiency and user experience.

- Python & Reporting: Use Python, including the Streamlit library, to build internal dashboards and lightweight reporting tools that surface operational, marketing, and performance insights.

- Zoho One Apps: Manage and enhance workflows, functions, automations, and integrations across Zoho CRM, Booking, Flow, Campaigns, SalesIQ, and more.

- Zapier: Build and maintain Zapier workflows to automate internal processes and improve business functionality.

- AI Tools & ChatGPT: Create custom GPTs and integrate AI-powered tools to enhance our website, marketing, and operations.

- WordPress Development: Manage and customize our WordPress site, especially using Divi builder, ensuring responsiveness and performance.

- Shopify Development: Implement and maintain custom themes, flows, app integrations, and troubleshooting in Shopify.

- Google Workspace: Oversee integrations with Google Workspace to enhance communication and collaboration across the team.

- Project Management: Manage technical projects using tools like Asana and collaborate with teams through Slack.

- Continuous Improvement: Identify new opportunities for automation and optimization to streamline workflows across platforms.





Required Skills & Experience:

- Proven experience in API Integrations and automations (e.g., Zoho One, Zapier, etc.).

- Zoho One Apps: Expertise with Zoho CRM, Zoho Booking, Zoho Flow, Zoho Campaigns, Zoho SalesIQ, and third-party integrations.

- Solid experience with Zapier to automate business processes.

- Experience creating and integrating AI tools like ChatGPT, including developing custom GPTs.

- Strong knowledge of WordPress, particularly with the Divi builder.

- Expertise in Shopify Theme Development, including app integrations, custom flows, and troubleshooting.

- Google Workspace integration experience (Drive, Docs, Sheets, Gmail, etc.).

- Familiarity with Asana for project management and Slack for team collaboration.

- Proficient in JavaScript, HTML, CSS, and PHP for full-stack development.

- Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work under pressure.

- Strong communication and collaboration skills, working remotely with a diverse team.





Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with advanced data analytics and using AI tools for optimization.

- Familiarity with RESTful APIs and other web services.

- Previous work in health, wellness, or medical-related fields.





Why 1st Optimal?

- Opportunity to work on innovative, high-impact projects in a rapidly growing company.

- Work with cutting-edge technologies and improve workflows across multiple platforms.

- A collaborative, supportive, and dynamic team environment.

- Flexible work schedule and remote work.

title: Amazon Product Development & Sourcing Specialist (FBA / Private Label)
description:
???? About the Role

We are looking for a Product Development & Sourcing Specialist to identify, validate, and develop high-potential products for Amazon.



You will own the end-to-end process—from product research and validation to supplier sourcing, product development, and profitability analysis. This role requires strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and the ability to make data-driven decisions independently.



???? Compensation & Setup

- Salary: $1,000–$1,400/month (based on experience)

- Schedule: Full-time (9h/day)

- Benefits: 14 days paid leave after 3 months



???? Ideal Candidate Profile

- Analytical, organized, and detail-oriented

- Able to work independently with clear objectives and deadlines

- Logical thinker who understands the relationship between costs, demand, and profit

- Prior experience in e-commerce / Amazon FBA



???? Required Tools

- Helium 10 – strong knowledge (Cerebro, Black Box, Xray, Profits, Keyword Tracker)

- Google Sheets / Excel – formulas, tables, ROI calculations, - dashboards

- Canva / PowerPoint – presentations and reporting

- Keepa – price tracking and seasonality analysis

- Amazon Seller Central – ability to interpret sales data and BSR

- Alibaba & WeChat – supplier research and communication

- Jungle Scout – a plus



???? Required Skills

- Competitive analysis – ability to interpret data and make data-driven recommendations

- Financial knowledge – understanding of gross margin, logistics costs, and profit estimation

- Strong English communication – written and verbal (C2 level or equivalent)

- E-commerce experience, preferably Amazon FBA



???? Key Responsibilities

Product Research

- Conduct market research to identify high-potential products across Amazon marketplaces (US/CA/AU/EU/UK/JP/SG)

- Analyze search volume, pricing, costs, and profitability (ROI, net margin, FBA fees)

- Evaluate competition, including customer reviews, pricing strategies, ratings, review count, and brand dominance

- Track trends and identify emerging product niches

- Collect, organize, and present data using Google Sheets, Excel, PowerPoint, or Canva

- Report weekly progress and recommend high-potential product opportunities



Product Development

- Work closely with cross-functional teams to conceptualize and develop products aligned with market demand and brand strategy

- Collaborate with design, marketing, and engineering teams to ensure products are competitive and differentiated



Supplier Sourcing

- Identify, evaluate, and establish relationships with reliable suppliers and manufacturers

- Negotiate pricing, MOQs, terms, and contracts to ensure competitive advantage and optimal margins



Quality Assurance

- Develop and implement product quality standards in collaboration with suppliers

- Conduct quality checks, inspections, and audits to ensure consistency and compliance with requirements



Cost Analysis

- Conduct detailed cost analysis including production, quality control, shipping, and all Amazon-related fees

- Ensure products meet target profitability before launch



Supply Chain Management

- Monitor and manage the end-to-end supply chain, including production timelines, shipping, and inventory replenishment

- Implement strategies to reduce lead times and optimize inventory levels



Compliance and Regulations

- Stay up to date with Amazon policies, regulations, and compliance requirements

- Ensure all products meet relevant safety and regulatory standards



Data Analysis

- Use data and analytics tools to track product performance, sales trends, and customer feedback

- Make data-driven recommendations to improve listings and overall performance



???? Qualifications

- 3–5 years of experience in Amazon product development and sourcing

- Proven experience in product development, supplier sourcing, and supply chain management

- Strong negotiation and communication skills

- Familiarity with Amazon marketplace policies and procedures

- Strong analytical skills and experience with data-driven decision-making

- Detail-oriented with a strong focus on product quality and customer satisfaction



**Note: This role is not for general virtual assistants. Only candidates with direct experience in product development and sourcing will be considered.



???? About BTS Brands

BTS Brands is a growing e-commerce company focused on building and scaling private label products on Amazon and Shopify.



Since 2018, we have expanded across multiple markets and operate in the travel and beauty categories. As we continue to grow, we are looking for individuals who are proactive, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering high-quality work.



We offer a collaborative and supportive environment where tea
mbers can develop their skills, take ownership of their work, and contribute to meaningful business growth.

High-performing
 campaigns with strong deliverability and reply rates

Fully automated pipeline from first
 to completed meeting

Clean, scalable systems that can be replicated across campaigns

mbers

, or similar OTAs

title: Paid Media Buyer / Project Manager
description:
Paid Media Buyer & Project Manager

Influence Live Media | (Remote)

Part-Time | 20 hrs/week | $800–$1,200/month USD



About Us:

Influence Live Media is a fast growing, exciting, full-stack digital advertising agency that helps online influencers, coaches, speakers, authors, and e-commerce brands grow through strategic paid media. We specialize in
 and Google advertising, video marketing, and webinar funnels,  using our proven Engage | Convert | Scale methodology to drive real results for our clients. We’re a collaborative, communicative team that values long-term partnerships and doing great work together.



The Role:

We’re looking for a skilled and self-sufficient Paid Media Buyer & Project Manager who can both run high-performing ad campaigns and stay on top of the coordination needed to keep client work moving smoothly. You’ll own campaigns from setup to optimization, while also managing your own timelines, assets, and communication workflows. This is a part-time, fully remote position — approximately 20 hours per week.



What You’ll Do:

Media Buying (primary — ~70%)

Build, launch, and optimize paid media campaigns on
/Meta and Google (including Performance Max and YouTube)

Develop and test audience segments, ad creative angles, and messaging for client campaigns

Monitor daily campaign performance and make data-driven adjustments to improve ROAS, CPL, and other KPIs

Collaborate on Hybrid Channel Plans that combine
 and Google to maximize reach and conversions

Support webinar and funnel campaigns for coaches, speakers, and online course creators

Pull performance reports and provide clear insights to the team and clients



Project Management (secondary — ~30%)

Manage your own campaign tasks, deadlines, and asset requests in ClickUp or Asana

Coordinate with creatives, copywriters, and the analytics team to keep campaigns on schedule

Track deliverables and proactively flag any issues or delays

Document campaign processes and contribute to agency SOPs as we grow



What We’re Looking For:

• 2+ years of hands-on experience running
/Meta and Google Ads campaigns — you’ve managed real budgets and can show results

• Familiarity with webinar funnels, lead gen, and e-commerce campaign structures

• Solid understanding of analytics — comfortable working in GA4, Meta Ads Manager, and basic dashboards

• Experience using ClickUp or Asana to manage your own work without being micromanaged (Optional)

• Strong written English communication; comfortable in Slack and Zoom. Will be talking directly with clients.

• Self-directed and reliable — you own your work from start to finish

• Availability to overlap with Eastern Time (U.S.) for at least a few hours per week



Nice to Have (Bonus Skills):

• Basic familiarity with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or similar — for ad copy assistance, research, or workflow support

• Experience using AI-powered features within ad platforms or marketing tools

• Curiosity about how AI is changing digital advertising and a willingness to learn and experiment



Why Work With Us:

• Fully remote, flexible part-time schedule

• Work on campaigns for well-known coaches, influencers, and online educators

• Collaborative team that communicates well and treats contractors with respect

• Real opportunity to grow into a larger role and full time as the agency expands



To Apply:

Please apply through OnlineJobs.ph with your updated resume. In your cover letter, answer this question in 3–5 sentences: “Describe a
 or Google campaign you managed, what results you achieved, and what optimizations made the biggest difference.”

Applications without a response to this question will not be considered. We want to see your thinking — show us what you’ve got!

, spreadsheets, and learning new systems quickly

s, tasks, and follow-ups

title: Technical Grant Writer
description:
We are looking for a Technical Grant Writer to work with our SR&ED (Scientific Research and Experimental Development) team. 



You are responsible for securing funding by researching, writing, and submitting comprehensive grant proposals. This role supports innovation and growth by obtaining financial support through SR&ED and other grant opportunities, ensuring that the clients' projects and R&D initiatives receive the necessary funding to succeed.



Key responsibilities:-



1. Technical Writing & Proposal Development: Draft, edit, and submit high-quality proposals. Convert complex scientific, clinical, or technical concepts into persuasive narratives.



2. Grant Research & Strategy: Identify and prioritize potential funding opportunities from federal, state, and private foundation sources. Maintain an up-to-date calendar of deadlines.



3. Collaboration with Experts: Work closely with internal team, clients (scientists, engineers etc) and subject matter experts to understand project needs, methodologies, and deliverables.



4. Reporting & Follow-up: Be on top of project deadlines and reportings



Key Requirements:-



1. Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Science or Health



2.  Min. 2 years of experience in technical grant writing with proven successful records. 



3. Ability to interpret and synthesize complex information (e.g., data analysis, scientific literature).



4. Professional command of the English language 



5. Strong analytical, editing, and persuasive writing skills and presentation skills



6. Comfortable in doing presentations and dealing with C-level Executives and Government Bodies



7.  Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite or Google Docs (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), grant management software, task manager software, and CRM databases
salary: From USD5 per hour (Based on experience)

title: Senior Business Funding Specialist (Credit-Based, Remote)
description:
Description:

Are you a driven, experienced closer who understands credit-based funding, stacking strategies, and how to help U.S. business owners get access to $50K–$250K in capital?



We’re a fast-growing U.S. funding company that helps entrepreneurs get the money they need to scale — without offering our own capital.



We’re hiring a Senior Funding Specialist who knows how to:



Speak with pre-qualified, credit-worthy leads



Understand personal and business credit



Recommend funding options from multiple banks



Help clients through the approval process



Work remotely in a fast-paced, performance-driven team

Take inbound and scheduled funding calls from clients with 700+ credit scores



Pre-screen applicants and verify readiness



Present credit card stacking or LOC options



Close deals and pass to processors



Hit KPIs for weekly funded deals

Strong understanding of credit scores, utilization, and stacking strategies



Excellent English communication (C1+)



Ability to follow SOPs and CRM processes (GoHighLevel or similar)



Strong closing ability and confidence speaking with U.S. clients



Compensation:

Commissions: $300–$1,500+ per funded client



Bonuses + incentives based on monthly funded volume



Tools we use:

 GHL, Zoom, Whatsapp, CRM & automation tools

title: Text-Based Client Support Rep | $250–$500/week | 6hrs/day | 6 days/week | 100% Remote | Bi-weekly Pay
description:
The situation

We run an online education brand with an active community and more inbound interest than we can handle. We need someone to jump into those conversations on
, make people feel taken care of, and walk them step by step until they're fully onboarded.

No calls. No camera. Pure text.

Full playbook provided. Full support provided. Your job is to show up and execute.



Day to day

You'll be handling warm 
 on
. People already know who we are and why they're reaching out — they just need someone real on the other end. You'll be clearing up their doubts, handling whatever comes up, and making sure they know exactly what to do next. We have a flow to follow but you need to make it feel human, not scripted.



You're the right fit if:

Your written English is indistinguishable from a native speaker — relaxed, natural, the way someone in their late 20s or early 30s actually texts

 feels like second nature to you — juggling threads, staying on top of replies, keeping things organized

You've worked in some kind of sales, support, or client-facing setup before

Six focused hours a day, six days a week is something you can genuinely deliver on

You read the instructions, follow them, then adapt — not the other way around

You know how to keep energy in a conversation without chasing or pressuring anyone

You can manage your own output without someone checking in on you constantly



Don't apply if:

There's anything off about your written English — grammar slips, awkward phrasing, or anything that reads like a translation

A 6h/6day commitment isn't something you can stick to week after week

You have zero background in talking to clients or moving people through a process

You disappear mid-shift or let hours pass before responding

Your instinct is to write paragraphs when a few sentences would do



What you'll earn

Anywhere from $250 to $500 per week based on how much you handle and how well you perform. We talk numbers based on your background before anything starts. Paid every week without fail.



How to apply

Film a Loom — under 3 minutes — introducing yourself and telling us specifically why this role suits you. No Loo
ans no review, no exceptions.

Drop the link plus a short note to
 
 with the subject line: Client Support Application – [Your Name]

title: Sales Team / Sales Closer
description:
We are looking to hire 6 sales reps to join our growing company. We are gaining close to 100 new clients every month and we want to get up to 250 new clients in total.



I also need 4 Sales Closers for my funding company. We help business owners get funding from different banks and lenders but we will be requiring payments up front soon, and I need Closers to close the deals and collect the payments.



You will be paid every week. You will be paid on an hourly basis, plus a 5% commission on every deal that you sell.  

READ THIS FULL JOB DESCRIPTION IF YOU ARE INTERESTED!



You would be in charge of calling leads and signing up clients. I have an assistant that will handle disputes and customer service you would just be in charge of getting new clients by using sales skills to get them to sign up for the service. We also pay weekly bonuses depending on performance. There are not many details for this position. We need someone that is fluent in English speaking and writing. We will provide warm leads daily from businesses and individuals. If you are highly motivated and want to make a lot of money, this is the position for you. If you are good in this position, we also have a ton of training available for continuous growth.

If you are interested in this position, write "I am a sales addict" at the top of your application.



Our requirements are only that you must already have a lot of sales experience.

If the clients do not sign up for credit repair now, you will put them into a CRM and they will be sent automatic
s and sms from our drip campaign. You can then follow up with them continuously. This position does not involve cold calling. All of our leads are warm leads!



We do daily sales trainings every morning on zoom. 

You must be able to work at least 50 hours per week, Monday through Friday.



Do not send me any prewritten messages that you send to everyone else.



If you really want this position, prove it.



I am only looking for highly motivated and determined sales professionals.



You must speak Fluent English.



You must have previous experience closing credit repair sales or other sales.



You must have great internet.



You must be energetic and Upbeat on the phone with clients.



We already have the warm leads you just need to close them. '



This position pays hourly and commission.

Commission starts at $50 up to $225 per sale on average with a lot of room for increases.



DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT SERIOUS.



1. How long have you done credit repair sales or funding for?

2. What other sales have you done?

3. What other skills do have that make you a good fit for this position?

4. Are you looking for full time or part time work?

5. How much were the products that you were selling?

6. How long have you been in sales all together?

title: Google Ads Manager/PPC/Media Buyer-Long term-Flat fee per account
description:
Job Description



We’re looking for a Google Ads Search-only campaign manager to help manage and optimize multiple client accounts.



This is not an entry-level role and not a “learning opportunity.”

You will be managing live client ad spend, following SOPs, and optimizing for lead quality, not volume.



This will start part time as gig work until we fill you with campaigns. If you have other skills like GHL or SEO, you may get more time early on. 



This is a long-term position for the right person.



What You’ll Be Doing



-Setting up Google Search-only campaigns



-Structuring campaigns and ad groups based on intent



-Writing and rotating ad copy (no AI-only junk)



-Adding and managing negative keywords



-Weekly optimization and cleanup



-Basic performance summaries and notes



You will not:



-Touch budgets without approval



-Use Smart campaigns



-Use Display or Performance Max



-Use broad match without explicit approval



Requirements (Read Carefully)



-Proven experience managing Google Search Ads



-Comfortable following SOPs and rules



-Understands keyword intent and filtering low-quality traffic



Familiar with:



-Conversion tracking



-Call tracking



-Google Business Profile integrations



-Can explain why you made changes, not just what you changed



If you rely heavily on Google “recommendations,” this is not a fit.



Compensation (Flat Fee – Not Hourly)



We pay per account, not per hour.



Campaign Setup: $125 per account (first month)



Monthly Management: $75 per account (after the first month)



Typical workload:



~8–12 hours for setup (paid flat)



~4 hours per month per active account



A manager handling 15–20 accounts can earn $1,100–$1,500/month consistently.



Trial Period



Paid trial with one account



30 days



Continued work based on quality, communication, and SOP compliance



How to Apply (Required)



Please include:



A 5–7 minute Loom video explaining how you would structure a Google Search campaign for a high-ticket local or commercial service



Screenshots or brief descriptions of accounts you’ve worked on (client info can be blurred)



Your experience level with Google Ads (years, approximate account count)



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.



Final Notes



We are building a small, high-quality team.

We value:



-Clear thinking



-Rule-following



-Consistency



-Long-term reliability



-SEO or GHL experience is a plus



If you’re looking to grow with a stable agency and manage accounts responsibly, apply.

title: Electrical Estimator (Division 26, Remote)
description:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a skilled Electrical Estimator to join our team. Our projects are primarily residential (70%) with a portion of commercial work (20%), including multi-family buildings and smaller retail fit-outs. The Estimator will focus exclusively on Division 26 electrical installations, taking full ownership of the estimation process, allowing the team to focus on project growth and client development.



Key Responsibilities:



Conduct detailed quantity takeoffs and prepare estimates for electrical projects ranging from $100,000 to $1.5 million.

Develop final scope of work and proposals for submission.

Assist with sub-quotes if estimation workload is low.

Utilize QuickBooks and EBM  (Electrical Bid Manager) for estimating; flexibility with other systems like PlanSwift is acceptable.

Ensure accurate estimation by applying knowledge of electrical installations and Division 26 standards.

Support project scheduling by estimating project durations from takeoffs.

Maintain organized records of bids and proposals.

Coordinate with suppliers for pricing and sub-contractor quotes as needed.



Required Skills and Qualifications:



Excellent Communicator - REQUIRED

Proven experience in electrical estimation, preferably in residential and commercial projects.

Proficiency in PlanSwift. QuickBooks and EBM exp is a PLUS. 

Strong knowledge and experience of Division 26 electrical standards.

Detail-oriented, proactive, and accountable for estimation accuracy.

Ability to work independently and manage multiple bids simultaneously.

Comfortable working Eastern Time, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM.



Required Tools and Platforms:



PlanSwift



OPTIONAL TOOLS:



QuickBooks

EBM (Electrical Bid Manager)





Company Benefits:



Starting Salary 

Paid Holidays 

Sick Leave 

Vacation Leave 

13th Month Pay 

Medical Benefits

Referral Bonus 



Working Hours / Timezone:

Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time.



Screening Questions:



1. Complete this form: 
/english 



(1–2 minute video introduction required). After submitting, reply with: “application form done.”



2. How many years of experience do you have working as an Electrical Estimator? rate your skill, 10 being the highest

3. How many years of experience do you have specifically with Division 26 electrical projects? Rate your skill, 10 being the highest

4. Have you worked professionally with QuickBooks, EBM, or PlanSwift? Please describe your experience with each tool.

5. Have you managed projects ranging from $100,000 to $1.5 million in contract value? Provide examples.

6. Are you comfortable taking full responsibility for estimation accuracy and assisting with sub-quotes when needed?

7. Have you worked with U.S.-based clients? If so, for how many years?

8. Are you available to work Monday through Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Eastern Time?

9. Are you comfortable using a time-tracking tool?



We’re excited to meet you—good luck!

title: Inside Sales Representative
description:
Meridian Lane Services seeks to empower individuals through personalized financial coaching that builds clarity, confidence, and long-term financial stability. By providing education and services in monthly personal finance budgeting, credit repair, and credit building.



Position Synopsis:

Inside Sales Representatives are the backbone of our sales process. Their responsibility is to connect with the prospective client, understand their current situation and needs, and provide a solution for them based on our portfolio of services and products. They do so through our CRM (phone, text, and
) and virtual meeting software (Google Meet).



Growth Path:

Inside Sales Representatives have the long term prospect of becoming a Sales Manager and guiding up to five Inside Sales Representatives, while still doing sales calls themselves. They have the opportunity to earn their own commissions and receive commissions for all closes that occur from their tea
mbers.



Work Location:

Fully Remote



Employment Status:

Full Time Contractor



Shift: 

Monday - Friday

9:00 AM EST - 5:00 PM EST

One paid (45) forty-five minute lunch break scheduled during shift



Compensation:

Base Pay - $400/month, $500/month after 90 days, paid weekly

Commission - Commissions are paid on the first paycheck of the following month. Sales Managers earn commissions for their own closes and the same commission for each close completed by a member on their team.

One Time Coaching: $5/close

Basic Repair & Coaching: $10/close

Ultimate Repair & Coaching: $20/close

Uncapped Commissions

Increases to base pay and commissions based on performance and time in the company, details discussed during the interview.



Job Requirements:

B2C Sales Experience - 1+ year, within the past 5 years.

Customer Service Experience - 1+ year, within the past 5 years.

Strong proficiency in English - Verbal and written. (C1 Proficiency)

Prompt Professional Communication - Ability to address client inquiries, concerns, and requests promptly and professionally.

Self-Motivated - Driven to complete tasks and manage time in an efficient manner.

Long Term Commitment - We are hiring permanent staff members, not temporary.

High speed internet access - Possesses high quality internet in order to communicate with clients via CRM and Google Meet meetings. Speed Test required before hiring

Stable PC/Laptop setup - Stable location for work setup to present professional experience to clients during calls and Google Meet meetings.



Preferred Hard Skills:

Google Suite - Prior experience in using the suite of software services for team collaboration and communication.

Google Meet - Prior experience using the video conferencing software.

Close - Prior experience using the CRM software for client calling, texting,
ing, and detail tracking.

DisputeFox - Prior experience using the credit repair software to create client accounts upon closing.

Credit Knowledge - Prior knowledge regarding the U.S. credit industry.



Preferred Soft Skills:

Initiative - Ability to research independently to find solutions and answers for clients.

Detail-Oriented - Ability to pay meticulous attention to credit reports and identify discrepancies.

Problem-Solving Skills - Capability to identify problems and come up with suggestions for solutions.

Positive and upbeat attitude with a track record of working effectively in a team environment.

Qualifications:

-Proficiency in CRM systems and customer support tools - REQUIRED

-Strong interpersonal and relationship-building skills

title: Credit Repair Specialist ASAP
description:
Credit Specialist | Credit Rescue Solutions | REMOTE | Full-Time



Are you a skilled Credit Repair Specialist with experience in the American credit system- Do you have a passion for helping individuals and businesses secure funding and financial freedom- If so, we want YOU on our team!



I’m Gene Ryland, the founder of Credit Rescue Solutions, a B2B accelerator that has helped over 50 clients in the past year access business funding and improve their financial standing. We’re looking to scale to 15+ new clients per month—and we need a top-tier Credit Specialist to make that happen.



This is a remote, full-time position requiring availability during EST business hours (9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday).



Who We're Looking For

We are searching for a dedicated, detail-oriented, and highly motivated Credit Specialist with at least one year of experience in the U.S. credit repair industry. You must have a strong understanding of credit reports, dispute processes, and funding strategies. If you have a track record of helping clients boost their credit scores, remove inaccurate negative items, and obtain funding, you’re exactly who we need!



Key Responsibilities

- Credit Repair & Disputes: Work with Dispute Fox software to challenge and remove inaccurate negative items on client credit reports.

- Client Support: Guide clients through the credit repair process, answer questions, and provide education on maintaining a strong credit profile.

- Business Funding Preparation: Help clients optimize their credit profiles to qualify for funding opportunities.

- Communication & Reporting: Work directly with the CEO to report progress, challenges, and solutions.

- Compliance & Best Practices: Ensure all dispute processes follow legal and ethical guidelines under the Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA).



What We Offer

- Competitive Pay + Performance-Based Bonuses (Earn more for great results!)

- 100% Remote Work (Work from the comfort of your home!)

- High-Growth Opportunity (Be part of a company scaling from 50 to 1,000+ clients!)

- Collaborative & Fun Team Culture (We take our work seriously but have fun doing it!)

- Impactful Work (You’ll be changing people’s lives by helping them unlock financial opportunities!)



Minimum Qualifications

- Fluent English Speaker & Writer (Clear communication is a must!)

- 1+ Years Experience in U.S. Credit Repair (You must understand credit disputes, inquiries, and the funding process.)

- Experience with Dispute Fox Software (Or the ability to learn it quickly.)

- Excellent Decision-Making & Problem-Solving Skills (You’ll be handling complex credit situations.)

- High Emotional Intelligence & Resilience (You’ll be working with clients facing financial challenges.)

- Strong Organizational Skills & Attention to Detail (Credit repair requires precision!)

- Ability to Work EST Business Hours (9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday)



How to Apply (Follow These Steps Carefully!)

---- Subject Line Must Include: "Terminator" (This helps us filter serious applicants!)

---- Attach Your Resume (Show us your experience and skills!)

---- Write a Short Message on why you’re the perfect fit for this role.



---- We are conducting interviews THIS WEEK! If you're a hard worker who thrives in a fast-paced, high-impact role, apply today and join our world-class team!



Looking forward to connecting,

Gene Ryland

Founder, Credit Rescue Solutions

title: Chief of Staff COO Integrator Director of Operations
description:
Are you a results-driven Integrator who thrives on turning vision into reality? Do you excel at aligning teams, optimizing operations, and driving strategic initiatives that fuel business systemization & growth?



Do you have 7+ years of experience in business operations, team management, leadership AND a proven track record of scaling organizations by transforming strategic vision into operational excellence?



If your answers to the questions above are YES, then read on.



Join our winning team at Data-Driven Growth, Inc., a portfolio of companies dedicated to the continuous optimization of a scalable, intelligence-driven business building and operating system.

Our current holdings include three real estate companies and a rapidly growing international eCommerce brand, Juice My Ride.



We foster an environment of clarity, alignment, ownership, growth mindset, and autonomy. We attract and retain top talent by ensuring that our core values: teamwork, business intelligence, mastery, constant improvement, and results-driven execution - are embedded in everything we do.



ABOUT ME

I’m Kirill Yudovski, founder and CEO of Data-Driven Growth, Inc. I split my time between scaling Juice My Ride, an international eCommerce brand, and optimizing a portfolio of over 70 rental properties. I live and breathe systems, data-driven decisions, and continuous improvement. I move fast, demand clarity and excellence, and aim to free myself for strategic growth. As my partner, you’ll build the processes and tools that turn my vision into results.



As our Chief of Staff / Integrator, you will be the right-hand strategic partner to the CEO, ensuring the vision of the business is executed with precision. Your mission is to drive alignment, execution, and accountability across all departments, ensuring scalability, efficiency, and profitability. In this role, you will be responsible for both hands-on execution and strategic resource allocation. Since we do not yet have a full leadership structure in place, you must solve challenges directly or source the right talent to execute effectively. It’s on you to determine what additional resources—whether systems, people, or processes—are needed to achieve company goals. This role requires a high level of ownership and heavy lifting, as you will play a critical role in building the operational foundation that will drive our growth.



TOP Responsibilities

VISION EXECUTION & STRATEGIC PLANNING

• Translate company’s vision into actionable strategies, ensuring alignment across all teams.

• Develop and execute a structured planning cadence (annual and quarterly planning, leadership alignment meetings, performance reviews) to drive continuous 
ntum toward company goals.

• Drive the execution of annual and quarterly goals with clear accountability structures and KPIs.

• Develop POAs with clear deliverables, schedules, and assignees for all company-wide initiatives.



PEOPLE HIRING, MANAGEMENT & DEVELOPMENT

• Recruit, develop, and lead a high-impact leadership team, ensuring the right people are in the right seats.

• Champion a culture of accountability, ownership, and A-player performance.

• Implement a structured performance management system with clear KPI tracking.

• Conduct performance evaluations and provide ongoing coaching for tea
mbers.

• Directly manage internal team (current headcount: 6)



BUSINESS SYSTEMS, PROCESS DEVELOPMENT & IMPROVEMENT

• Select and implement a Business Operations System (EOS/ScaleableOS/similar).

• Establish business KPIs, Performance Dashboards, Reporting/P&L.

• Develop and continuously refine our process improvement framework.

• Implement our process improvement framework for all business departments and processes.



OPERATIONAL EXECUTION & LEADERSHIP

• Oversee and optimize all key operational departments, ensuring alignment and efficiency across Finance, HR, Business Process Improvement, Real Estate Operations, and eCommerce.

• Act as the execution engine of the company, ensuring seamless communication between the CEO, leadership team, and all functional areas.

• Act as strategic gatekeeper for the CEO—own
 systems, information flow, and decision-prep to protect focus and altitude.

• Manage resources effectively, balancing strategic oversight & project management.

• Lead by example, rolling up your sleeves when necessary to execute critical business functions, while systematically building and optimizing processes for delegation.

• No-task-too-small hands-on task execution: admin/financial/reporting/legal/compliance/team and stakeholder communication or anything else the business or CEO needs.



BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE & OPERATING SYSTEM

• Continuously improve our interactive & comprehensive Second Brain (company knowledge base) to include our ever-evolving business intelligence (decision-making principles, relevant data, process frameworks, etc).

• Continuously improve our Business Operating System & internal optimal performance guidelines.

• Ensure every role in the company operates with a data-driven approach and is empowered by our Second Brain (company knowledge base) for optimal decision-making and prioritization.



THE OPPORTUNITY

• Master strategic business planning, data-driven decision-making, and business growth/development.

• Work with top experts from related industries who will be consulting with us or providing specialized services.

• Enjoy free access to the best available online courses, personal development programs, and tools to support continuous learning and professional growth.

• Grow with the company: Define your career growth path with the CEO to align with the company’s vision and long-term objectives.

• Performance-based compensation will be introduced within the first 6 months, providing an opportunity to increase your pay in direct proportion to your growing contribution.



This is a full-time, fully remote position with 40 hours a week (Mon-Fri) working US EST business hours.

The compensation is Php 150,000 - Php 220,000 per month, depending on experience and performance.



WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

You are a detail-oriented, process-driven leader who takes FULL ownership of outcomes, helping free the CEO to focus on vision and growth. You are a resourceful, proactive, and intelligent leader who is an execution master where no task is too small, while constantly improving the job itself.



Your most important asset is a no-excuses attitude towards completing projects effectively and efficiently, combined with a passion for personal growth and optimizing business operations. Your ability to research answers, solve problems, and add value proactively will make you an ideal candidate.



You must rate yourself at least 8.5/10 on:

• Resourcefulness

• Attention to Detail & Organization

• Time & Energy Management

• Process Development & Optimization

• Communication

• Tech savvy, power user of AI and ClickUp

• Strategic Planning & Prioritization

• People Leadership



HOW TO APPLY

 1. Do you have at least 7 years of experience in high-level operational management and leadership roles (e.g., COO, Chief of Staff, Director of Operations, or similar)? If yes, list your most relevant role(s) including:

 4. What is your expected compensation, and why?

IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS

Thank you for your diligence and attention to detail, looking forward to connecting soon!

Kirill Yudovski

title: E-Commerce Business Operations & Supply Chain Manager
description:
eCommerce Operations Manager Amazon Shopify Growth Management

Are you a hands-on operations leader with a passion for driving efficiency, optimizing processes, and scaling eCommerce businesses? 

Do you excel at leading teams, improving workflows, and managing key operational functions that ensure smooth business operations?



Do you have 5+ years of experience in:

-People hiring, development & management

-E-Commerce operations & process improvement, including:

 • Customer/tech support

 • Order fulfillment & return processing

 • Inventory management

 • Marketplace health management

 • Listing management



If your answers to the above are YES, then read on.



**Who We Are**

Join our winning team at Juice My Ride, a rapidly growing international eCommerce brand specializing in battery chargers for exotic and sports cars. We help car owners extend battery life and protect their vehicle’s electronics with best-in-class chargers and seamless customer experiences.



We sell through our website, 17 Amazon marketplaces, and 4 eBay marketplaces while fulfilling orders from 5 global warehouses. More info can be found on our website.



Join our winning team at Juice My Ride, a rapidly growing, international, leading brand for battery chargers for all exotic and sports cars. We help exotic car owners with the best value charger to increase their battery life & protect their car’s electronics with complete peace of mind. We provide the easiest decision-making & purchasing process thanks to our ‘FormulaForSuccess’ Customer Journey. 

We sell through our website, 16 marketplaces on Amazon and 4 on eBay.

We are a remote US brand with fulfillment from the US, Canada, UK, Poland & Australia.

More info can be found on our website.



We foster an environment of clarity, alignment, ownership, growth mindset, and autonomy; attracting and retaining top talent by ensuring that our core values of teamwork, business intelligence, mastery, constant improvement, and results-driven execution are embedded in everything we do.



However, our operations department is currently understaffed with a team of 2, with a lack of leadership, organization & prioritization, and many competing priorities.



As our eCommerce Operations Manager, your mission is to lead, systematize, and optimize our entire eCommerce operations department, ensuring alignment, efficiency, and profitability.



**TOP Responsibilities**

PEOPLE MANAGEMENT & DEVELOPMENT

• Onboard, train, and lead a high-performing operations team, ensuring the right people are in the right roles.

• Establish clear KPIs and accountability structures for both team and individual performance.

• Implement structured performance management, including coaching, evaluations, and growth plans for tea
mbers.



CUSTOMER JOURNEY & ESCALATIONS MANAGEMENT

• Design and map out the ideal customer journey across all customer touchpoints.

• Oversee customer support operations (onboard & optimize Gorgias helpdesk, phone/email/chat systems) to ensure a seamless experience.

• Manage customer/vendor/marketplace escalations, handling complex cases that require strategic problem-solving.



MARKETPLACE PERFORMANCE & LISTING MANAGEMENT

• Monitor and maintain Amazon/eBay marketplace health metrics, ensuring we never drop below performance standards.

• Oversee listing management for Shopify, Amazon, and eBay, ensuring accurate product information and optimized conversion rates.



INVENTORY & SUPPLY CHAIN MANAGEMENT

• Develop and oversee inventory management processes, ensuring optimal stock levels, demand forecasting, and supply chain efficiency.

• Work with fulfillment centers, suppliers and vendors across the world to streamline logistics and minimize delays.



PROCESS OPTIMIZATION & AUTOMATION

• Systematically identify, document, and optimize all key eCommerce processes.

• Implement automation tools and process improvements that reduce manual effort and improve efficiency.

• Work closely with the Process Improvement Manager to introduce scalable workflows.



**THE OPPORTUNITY**

• Master strategic business planning, data-driven decision-making, and business growth & development in a fast-scaling eCommerce environment.

• Work with top industry experts, consultants, and specialists providing specialized insights.

• Gain free access to the best available online courses, personal development programs, and tools to support your continuous learning and professional growth.

• Grow with the company: define your career trajectory with the CEO and align it with the company’s long-term vision.

• Performance-based compensation will be introduced within the first 6 months, allowing you to increase your pay in direct proportion to your growing contribution.



This is a full-time, fully remote position with 40 hours a week (Mon-Fri) working hours, working US EST business hours. 

The compensation is Php 100,000 -  Php 150,000 per month, depending on experience.



**WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR**

We are seeking a detail-oriented, process-driven leader who takes FULL ownership of outcomes, helping free the CEO to focus on vision and growth. A resourceful, proactive, and intelligent leader who is an execution master where no task is too small, while constantly improving the job itself.



Your most important asset is a no-excuses attitude towards completing projects effectively and efficiently, combined with a passion for personal growth and optimizing business operations. Your ability to research answers, solve problems, and add value proactively will make you an ideal candidate.



This role is NOT for you if:

• You don’t have at least 5 years of experience in operations management.

• You are not comfortable working during US Eastern Time Zone business hours (9-6).

• You have other jobs, businesses, or side projects you intend to keep.

• You have not held a job for at least 2 consecutive years in the last 5 years (verified by references).

•  You’re not comfortable with time tracking and performance monitoring.



**How to Apply**

Please respond to this ad using the word ninja in the subject line or in the body of the message, and answer the following questions:



1. Do you have 5+ years of experience in operations management, team leadership, and process optimization for eCommerce businesses?

If yes, list your most relevant role(s), including:

• Title, company, and industry

• Responsibilities

• Size of team directly reporting to you

• Years in the role

• Key achievements (KPIs improved, systems implemented, cost savings, efficiency gains, etc.)



2. List three key operational KPIs you have tracked in an eCommerce business. Include the KPI name, how you measured it, and the target benchmarks you maintained.



3. What fulfillment models have you worked with (FBA, FBM, 3PL, in-house)? Describe your role in inventory forecasting and order fulfillment management.



4. Have you implemented or managed a customer support system? If so, specify the helpdesk software used, the types of escalations handled, and how you improved resolution goals and times.



5. How would you rate your English writing and speaking skills on a scale of 1-10?



6. What is your expected compensation, and why?



**IMPORTANT INSTRUCTIONS**

Please ensure that your responses are written in your own words, as using AI to generate or enhance your answers will prevent us from considering your application. We want to accurately assess your communication style and suitability for the role.



Keywords:

OPS manager, Brand manager, Operation manager, Operations manager, Store manager, Director of operations, COO, Private label, E-commerce manager, Ecomm manager, Ecom manager, Head of operations, EOS integrator, Operations director, VP of operations, Senior operations manager, Operations executive, Business operations leader, Private label manager, Amazon private label specialist, Online brand manager, Digital commerce manager, Marketplace manager, Multi-channel e-commerce manager, Supply chain manager, Logistics manager, Fulfillment manager, Inventory manager, Demand planning manager, Customer experience manager, CX manager, Customer success manager, Customer support operations manager, Business integrator, Scaling expert, Process improvement specialist, Business operations specialist, Amazon operations manager, Marketplace operations manager, Amazon store manager, Amazon seller central manager, Retail operations manager, DTC operations manager, Shopify operations manager, Growth operations manager, Business growth strategist, Revenue operations manager, Optimization specialist, E-commerce fulfillment manager, Order fulfillment manager, Logistics & fulfillment manager

title: WordPress Developer
description:
Overview:



We are seeking a skilled WordPress Developer to join our team. While the primary focus of this role is to perform maintenance and improvements on pre-existing WordPress and e-commerce websites, this individual will be responsible for developing new WordPress sites and working on other platforms (Squarespace, Wix, etc.). This role requires a high degree of digital literacy and the ability to work in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.



Key Responsibilities:



• Maintenance and Optimization: Update and maintain existing WordPress websites, ensuring optimal performance, reliability, and security.

• New Development: Develop new WordPress sites and features.

• E-commerce: Maintain, optimize, and perform smaller-scale development tasks on Shopify and WordPress-connected e-commerce sites.

• Technical SEO: Conduct website audits to identify technical issues affecting SEO, optimize website structure and content for search engines, and stay updated with the latest SEO trends and algorithms.

• Troubleshooting and Problem-Solving: Quickly identify and resolve technical issues and performance problems on WordPress sites.

• Collaboration and Communication: Work collaboratively with development teams and stakeholders to deliver solutions that meet business needs.

• Technical Documentation: Create and maintain detailed documentation for systems and processes.



Skills and Qualifications:



• Strong experience in WordPress development, themes, and plugins.

• Proficient in PHP, MySQL, CSS, and JavaScript.

• Experience working with e-commerce platforms like BigCommerce, Shopify, and WordPress-connected e-commerce sites.

• Knowledge and experience with technical SEO, including website audits, on-page optimization, and an understanding of search engine algorithms.

• Ability to troubleshoot complex technical issues.

• Excellent communication skills and a collaborative team approach.

• Familiar with responsive design and development best practices.

• Flexibility to adapt to new technologies and challenges.



Education and Experience:



• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field (preferred but not mandatory).



About Counterintuity

We are a marketing agency based in the United States (Los Angeles, California), dedicated to serving nonprofit charities and related agencies that help support the world and the people in it. Our key services include marketing strategy, social media management, website design, digital advertising, and search engine optimization.



We are looking for an individual who is proficient at web development, is a good communicator, a reliable worker, and an organized person. Our Core Values are: Committed (to our clients, to each other, and to the greater good), Can-do (positivity and action rather than negativity and procrastination), Clever (being smart in how you do things), and Creative (bringing an artful touch to things whenever possible). Please continue with this job description and application if you feel you align with these values.



We are looking for someone who will work the same hours as us, which are four hours daily between 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. (Pacific Time Zone). The perfect candidate is self-disciplined, independent but a team player, a taskmaster, detail oriented, and excellent with time management and communication. Our new tea
mber will need to prioritize tasks, meet deadlines, and perform with accuracy for long periods of time. Our team is highly organized with processes in place. Our company possesses a strong, highly sought-after company culture and core values, so finding the right fit for this position is of incredible importance to us. You are a part of our family! We are currently accepting applications and need to hire urgently.



If you have a Kolbe profile or a DISC, please include it.



Instructions when applying:

1. Please do not
 me. All communication should happen within the OnlineJobs.PH messaging.

2. Your subject line should say: WordPress Developer Role

3. When replying to this job listing, include a link to your resume and work samples
