title: Social Media Meta Advertising Specialist
description:
Job Title: Full-time Social Media, Content & Meta Advertising Specialist



We need an exceptional Social Media, Content and Meta Advertising Specialist with fluent English, strong commercial understanding, and proven hands-on experience producing content and campaigns that generate real enquiries and measurable return on investment.



We are a UK based 
 well-established Company in the luxury end of the home-improvement market, primarily across the South of England with some wider UK coverage. We design and market premium conservatories, orangeries, glass extensions, refurbishment services and related specialist products.

We are looking to appoint a full-time remote contractor, working from your own home in the Philippines, during full UK working hours. This role is not just about posting nice-looking content. We need somebody who understands how to build trust before the sale, how to attract the right audiences, and how to make Meta advertising produce genuine leads rather than vanity metrics.



Do you understand how to produce social media content for
, Instagram and YouTube that fits a premium brand? Can you write or help produce high-quality blogs that meet modern SEO and AI-search requirements? Do you know how to build, test and improve Meta campaigns, remarketing audiences, lookalike audiences, browser pixel tracking, Conversion API connections and lead funnels that improve cost per lead and lead quality over time?

If you are commercially minded, data-aware, organised, and able to show real examples of past campaign performance and content results, we would like to hear from you.



Consultant Scope of Work (Job Description)

The Company; – We are a UK based 
 well-established Company in the luxury goods top-end home improvement market primarily in the South of England but with some UK wide coverage. We are looking to appoint a full-time Social Media, Content and Meta Advertising Specialist consultant, working from your own home in the Philippines. You must have a proven successful track record, previous Business-to-Consumer marketing experience, excellent written English, and the ability to work to a high standard with minimal supervision.

Hours; – 8 Hour days – UK time – 7.30am to 4.30pm (one hour lunch break at 12.30pm).

Working days; – 5-day working week – Monday to Friday. Total of 40 hours each week. Good flexibility with adequate notice to adjust working days to suit business needs, but payment is only for the agreed working time.

IT systems set-up; – Must have good reliable electricity supply and internet connection with a good quality reliable PC or laptop. Familiar with Microsoft 365 Office suite, cloud-based marketing tools, Meta Business Suite / Ads Manager, and AI-assisted content tools such as ChatGPT.



Daily communication; – Constant daily contact via Teams video link,
, WhatsApp and telephone, with Timeproof tracking if required. At the end of each day send a daily
 with a specific summary of works completed, campaign progress, results, and any problems encountered.



Pay and payment process; – Salary to be finalised depending on experience and proven results in the region of $4 to $6 per hour. Paid monthly on the last business day of each month in US Dollars via Wise / EasyPay / PayPal. Invoice required for payment. Any transaction or currency fees remain at consultant’s cost. Consultant provides their own equipment, internet connection, and software subscriptions including paid for version of ChatGPT. Excellent dedicated work that demonstrates exceptional performance may also attract a discretionary performance bonus and, after successfully completing the first 12 months, an additional 13th month bonus may be considered.



Description of scope of works; – To build and manage a stronger trust-based digital marketing system, with particular focus on social media content, blog content and profitable Meta advertising that clearly demonstrates a return on investment.



Main Responsibilities

• Plan, create, schedule and improve organic social media content primarily for
 and Instagram, with selected repurposed content for YouTube.

• Write, draft or assist in producing blogs for Room Outside that are aligned to current SEO good practice, AI-search visibility, customer intent and trust-building principles.

• Maintain brand tone suitable for a premium, aspirational home-improvement business and ensure content feels polished, commercially aware and consistent with 
.

• Create, manage and optimise Meta advertising campaigns with a clear focus on lead quality, cost efficiency and return on investment, not just impressions or clicks.

• Build and improve remarketing campaigns, audience segmentation, lookalike audiences, creative testing, landing page alignment and follow-up journey logic.

• Understand Meta Pixel, browser-based event tracking, Conversion API and related attribution issues sufficiently to help ensure campaign data is as accurate and useful as possible.

• Work with existing website and CRM assets so campaigns, forms and landing pages connect properly and support the customer journey.

• Report weekly on campaign performance, lead quality, creative tests, audience tests, spend levels and recommended next actions.

• Monitor competitor activity, content trends and platform changes where relevant, then suggest practical ideas that could improve results for Room Outside.

• Carry out other reasonable marketing support tasks related to content production, audience development, remarketing, blog optimisation and lead-generation support.



Must-Have Experience

• Strong written English and confidence writing clear, natural marketing copy.

• Hands-on Meta /
 advertising experience with evidence of campaign setup, optimisation and reporting.

• Experience creating social media content for Business-to-Consumer brands.

• Good understanding of how content, adverts and landing pages work together to build trust and generate enquiries.

• Experience with remarketing, audience targeting, lead funnels and campaign testing.

• Comfortable using AI tools productively without producing lazy or generic content.

• Well organised, reliable, responsive and able to work consistently during UK business hours.



Preferred / Desirable Experience

• Experience in premium home improvement, interiors, architecture, lifestyle or property-related marketing.

• Working knowledge of WordPress, basic page editing and on-page SEO principles.

• Experience with YouTube content repurposing, captions, shorts or channel support.

• Experience interpreting CRM lead data and feeding this back into campaign decisions.

• Understanding of customer psychology in higher-ticket purchases where trust and reassurance matter more than impulse clicks.



Home Working Environment

As a homeworker the contractor will be expected to have a dedicated suitably quiet area that is conducive to working without interruptions, with their own desk and suitable storage space, suitable to carry out the work required by the Company including uninterrupted telephone and virtual meetings with a good quality broadband signal and good quality reliable PC or laptop, all to be provided free of charge by the contractor.



What Happens Next

It is vital that we select the correct person for this important role as our exciting business plans require a dedicated above-average worker who can perform to a high standard with honesty, consistency and commercial awareness. When you respond to this advert, make sure you tell us which recent marketing campaign or piece of content you are most proud of and, in a few sentences, why.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

title: GoHighLevel Specialist
description:
STOP! Read this first: We are Lawn & Land Marketing, a fast-growing digital agency in the US (Florida). We help United States based landscaping and lawn care businesses grow to 7 and 8 figures.



We are looking for a Skilled GoHighLevel Specialist to join our team long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. This is a career opportunity where you will be treated like a true tea
mber, not just a freelancer.



We are looking for someone proficient in:



> Sub-Account Management: You have deep hands-on experience building and managing GoHighLevel sub-accounts. You know how to set them up correctly from scratch and keep them running smoothly.



> Workflows & Automations: You can build complex automations, triggers, and sequences without breaking a sweat. You understand how to map out a process and make GHL execute it reliably.



> Funnels & Websites: You know your way around GHL's funnel and website builder. You can QA pages for broken elements, mobile issues, and brand accuracy.



> Troubleshooting: When a workflow misfires or an automation stops triggering, you know exactly where to look and how to fix it fast.



> Integrations: You're comfortable connecting GHL with third-party tools and understand how data should flow between systems.



The "Non-Negotiables":



> Must work US Eastern Standard Time (EST): Roughly 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (New York Time). This is a firm requirement — no exceptions.



> Must have excellent internet: A reliable connection is required for remote work and team collaboration.



> Must be "Proactive": We value people who "Lead With Solutions." If you spot a broken workflow or an issue in a sub-account, you fix it — you don't wait to be told.



> Must have real GHL experience: Please do not apply if you are still learning the platform. We need someone who can own this role from day one.



Why join us?



> Stable, full-time work (40 hrs/week).

> We invest in our team and want you to stay for years.

> Work with a fun, supportive, tech-forward team that respects you.

> Be part of an agency that's on the cutting edge of AI and automation — you'll work alongside some of the most advanced systems in the industry.



!!! HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT): We do NOT review applications sent via OnlineJobs.ph messaging !!!



To apply, you must visit our careers page. There, you will watch a video from the owner (Matt), read the full job details, and complete a specific application process.



>>> CLICK HERE TO APPLY: 
/gohighlevel



We look forward to meeting you!

title: Amazon Wholesale Pricing, Repricer & Supplier Research Analyst
description:
About SPCR Distribution



SPCR Distribution is a fast growing wholesale based eCommerce business in the UK



Founded just 2.5 years ago, we have scaled rapidly using the wholesale model and now sell across Amazon and eBay, with plans to expand into TikTok Shop and Shopify in the near future.

We operate with a small but highly driven team of 5 people: 2 warehouse tea
mbers, 1 VA, 2 directors



As we continue to grow, there is a huge opportunity for the right person to develop new skills, take on more responsibility, and grow with the company.



We provide full training both to align with our internal systems and to help you develop new abilities that will support long term career progression.



We’re looking for someone who wants to be part of something that’s growing fast, not someone who just wants a checklist job.



*Overview of the Role*



We are hiring a skilled, analytical and forward-thinking Amazon Wholesale Pricing, Repricer & Supplier Research Analyst to take full ownership of:



- Analysing price lists

- Making purchasing recommendations and quantities

- Managing the SellerSnap repricer

- Maintaining accurate CoG and pricing data

- Supporting supplier discovery for exclusivity

- Communicating with suppliers to negotiate improved pricing

- Providing SKU-level and overall profitability reporting

- Assisting with bookkeeping and monthly P&L preparation



This is a core operations role that directly impacts the profitability, competitiveness, and future direction of SPCR Distribution.



This is NOT a passive spreadsheet job.



You will need to analyse, use good judgement, present reasoning, and sometimes initiate negotiation with suppliers when pricing needs to be improved.



This is not a beginner's role. This is a role for a highly skilled and experienced individual.



*Key Responsibilities*



1. Price List Analysis & Purchasing Decisions (Primary Duty)

- This is the main function of the job.

- Analyse supplier price lists using SellerAmp, Keepa or Helium10.

- Evaluate products against defined margin and ROI criteria.

- Use your experience + the data to make purchasing recommendations/quantities— not just filter.

- Assess multipacks, bundles, and variation opportunities.

- Determine which products are strong buys and which to avoid.

- Identify opportunities where a product is profitable if we negotiate price.

- When volume opportunity exists but pricing doesn’t meet targets, you will:

identify the target price

prepare justification

and support in going back to the supplier with a volume based negotiation request.



This requires initiative and commercial thinking not just adding numbers to a sheet.



2. SellerSnap Repricer Management

- Manage all repricing strategies and ensure correct operation.

- Maintain and optimize all preset strategies.

- Analyse competition levels, BuyBox share and pricing behaviour.

- Monitor for Amazon 1P activity and aggressive competitor patterns.

- Ensure new SKUs are correctly added with accurate min/max and CoG.

- Provide weekly and monthly performance updates on repricing and pricing outcomes.



3. Master SKU CoG Management & Cross-System Updates

- Maintain a fully accurate, up-to-date CoG record for every SKU.

- Input cost changes, VAT, prep fees and shipping allocations.

- Update and sync CoG and pricing across all relevant systems (SellerSnap, internal sheets and accounting).

- Understand that different software may require different CoG structures and ensure each is handled correctly.

- Ensure consistency across all platforms and that no SKU runs on outdated cost data.



4. Supplier Research for Exclusivity Opportunities

- Supporting our new business direction toward exclusive distribution and brand partnerships.

- Reverse source products on Amazon using softwares like keepa & helium10 to identify brands that:

Have poor listings

Lack optimisation

Have lots of random sellers

Show potential for brand protection and exclusivity deals

- Build lists of brands needing assistance on Amazon.

- Identify which brands would benefit from a dedicated wholesale partner.

- Support our outreach strategy by providing well?researched opportunities.



This is NOT sourcing from price lists

This is finding new brands/suppliers who need what we offer.



5. Competitor, Market & Pricing Monitoring

- Track new competitor entries on our listings.

- Identify tanking behaviour and unstable price positions.

- Flag Amazon 1P involvement immediately.

- Report market shifts that affect pricing strategy.



6. Weekly & Monthly Reporting (Including P&L Support)

Weekly:

- SKU level margin and ROI updates

- Overall profitability movement 

- Be able to explain price movement and profit change on full inventory

- Repricer performance summary

- Slow sellers & no sales ASINs

- Supplier cost change summary

Monthly:

- Full SKU level profitability breakdown

- Overall monthly profit/loss input

- Top/bottom performers

- Price/margin movement analysis

- All data required for the team leader to complete the monthly P&L



7. Bookkeeping & Financial Support

- Assist with preparing data needed for bookkeeping.

- Maintain clean, accurate SKU level profit information. 

- Support accuracy for final monthly P&L creation.



Required Skills & Experience



Technical Skills

- Strong experience with SellerAmp, Keepa or Helium 10

- Advanced Google Sheets skills (XLOOKUP, formulas, data analysis)

- Strong understanding of ROI, margin and Amazon FBA fees

- Confident analysing sales rank, pricing history and seller competition

- Comfortable making purchasing recommendations, not just analysis

- Experience managing repricer software

- Fluent in English (written and spoken)



Desirable Skills (Highly Beneficial)

- Supplier discovery through product research

(reverse sourcing for exclusivity opportunities)

- PPC knowledge

(understanding how ads affect margin, velocity and break-even)

- Listing awareness

(ability to identify poor listings, incorrect variations, incorrect fees)

- Experience with TikTok Shop

- Experience with Shopify

- Confident speaking with suppliers over phone/teams calls

- Experienced with other software for when other tea
mbers are not available such as SoStocked 



Working Hours

- Full-time

- UK based working hours

- Daily communication and reporting, with clear daily, weekly and monthly deadlines to meet



What This Role Is Really About



This role is suited to someone who:

- Loves analysing products & numbers

- Wants responsibility and decision?making power

- Enjoys finding opportunities others miss

- Can think strategically, not just follow instructions

- Wants long?term growth and stability

- Is excited to be part of a rapidly growing UK business

- This is a chance to grow with us as we scale into new platforms, new suppliers, and new business opportunities

title: Media Buyer (Meta + Google) – High-Ticket / Functional Medicine
description:
Company: BoldMD

?



???? About Us



BoldMD is not a traditional agency.



We build and scale high-ticket functional medicine, longevity, and telehealth clinics across the U.S. — from startup to $100k–$300k+/month operations.

?

?

?

title: Google VEO3 Specialist
description:
We’re Hiring: Google Veo 3 Specialist



Our fast-growing e-commerce brand is scaling toward 8-figures and beyond, and we’re ready to level up our creative production with the power of Google Veo 3. We’re looking for a Google Veo 3 Specialist to help us manage, refine, and execute AI-generated video ads that support our marketing goals.



To show you’ve carefully read this post, please start your response with the word peach before introducing yourself. Below, you’ll find the key responsibilities, requirements, and a few quick questions so we can get to know your experience.



Key Responsibilities:

- Prompt Creation & Optimization: Write, test, and refine prompts to generate high-quality video ads using Google Veo 3.

- Workflow Coordination: Manage the full AI production pipeline—concept to final output—ensuring deadlines are met.

- Creative Alignment: Collaborate with our marketing and UGC teams to blend AI-generated content with human-made assets.

- Quality Review: Ensure all outputs are polished, on-brand, and ready for launch.

- Innovation & Mastery: Stay up to date with Google Veo 3 features, updates, and best practices to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Documentation: Maintain a clear system for tracking prompts, revisions, and final deliverables.



Requirements:

- Hands-on experience with Google Veo 3 and AI video generation.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to manage multiple creative projects at once.

- Good communication skills for working with both AI and human creators.

- Comfortable using project management tools like Google Sheets, Notion, or similar.

- Consistent availability for 4-8 hours daily, 6 days per week.

- Bonus: Background in marketing, video production, or AI prompt engineering.



Questions for You:

- Have you worked directly with Google Veo 3 before? If so, tell us about your projects.

- How do you approach prompt testing and refining to get the best results?

- What’s your system for keeping multiple AI video projects organized?

- Are you comfortable balancing both creative expectations and technical workflows?

- Can you commit to 4-8 hours per day, 6 days per week, for this role?



If you’re passionate about AI-powered creativity and love working with cutting-edge tools like Google Veo 3, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Waiterix | Harmonia Enterprises LLC



About Waiterix



Waiterix is an AI-powered hospitality platform designed to help restaurants operate more efficiently, increase revenue, and deliver better customer experiences. Our solution includes:



•An AI receptionist that answers calls and manages reservations

•An AI waiter integrated into a digital menu for seamless ordering and payment

•A business insights dashboard that enables data-driven decision-making



Waiterix addresses critical operational challenges in the restaurant industry, including missed calls, staff shortages, slow service, and limited visibility into performance. This is a mission-critical solution, not a discretionary tool.



 Role Overview



We are expanding across the United States and are seeking a Sales Development Representative (SDR) based in the Philippines to support our growth.



This is a remote, performance-driven role focused on:



•Cold calling restaurant owners and decision-makers in the U.S.

•Delivering product demonstrations

•Closing new business

•Managing client relationships to ensure retention



You will play a key role in introducing Waiterix to prospective clients and maintaining long-term relationships that generate recurring revenue.



Key Responsibilities



•Conduct outbound cold calls to restaurants across the U.S.

•Engage directly with owners and managers

•Present Waiterix in a clear, concise, and value-driven manner

•Identify operational challenges and position appropriate solutions

•Deliver product demonstrations

•Close new client accounts

•Onboard new customers and ensure successful activation

•Maintain ongoing client relationships to support retention and recurring revenue



 Compensation



•Base Pay: $3 USD per hour

•Commission: 5% recurring monthly commission on each closed and retained client ($3,000 per month)

•Earning Potential: Performance-based, with scalable recurring income tied to client retention



Candidate Profile



We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:



•Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral or American-accented tone

•Confidence in cold calling and sales conversations

•Ability to communicate value clearly and persuasively

•Comfort with technology and ability to learn SaaS products quickly

•Self-motivation and the ability to work independently

•Resilience and professionalism in handling objections





Preferred:



•Prior experience in sales, customer service, or call center environments

•Experience with SaaS or technology products





What You’ll Gain



•Experience in a high-growth AI and SaaS company

•Exposure to the U.S. business and hospitality market

•Opportunity to build recurring commission-based income

•Flexible, remote work environment with autonomy

•Direct contribution to scaling an innovative technology product



Why Join Waiterix



Waiterix is at a critical growth stage, building a global end-to-end AI platform for the hospitality industry. This role offers the opportunity to be part of that expansion while developing valuable skills in technology sales and client management.

title: Digital Course Sales Closer

, and messaging platforms

title: Video Editor (Paid Ads / E-commerce / AI)
description:
We’re Samako, a fast-growing e-commerce brand from The Netherlands. With 100,000+ customers and rapid traction on 
, Amazon, and our own webshop, we’re raising the standard in the cleaning space. Our customers love us for clever products and exceptional service — and now we’re looking for a full-time AI Video Editor (40 hours/week) to help us scale faster.



This is not a role for average editors. We’re building a high-performance team, and you’ll be expected to deliver at pace, meet high standards, and consistently raise the bar. If you thrive under pressure, take pride in your work, and want your videos to directly drive performance and growth, keep reading.



What You’ll Do:



• Create high-converting video ads for Meta, TikTok, and other paid channels

• Edit performance-driven creatives (UGC-style, product demos, hooks, variations) at scale

• Work with both real footage and AI-generated content to produce the best possible creatives

• Rapidly iterate on winning concepts based on performance data

• Optimize videos for retention, hook rate, and conversion

• Collaborate with marketing to turn ideas into high-performing creatives

• Maintain a consistent, high-quality brand look across all video output



What You Must Bring:



• Proven experience editing video ads for e-commerce (performance marketing focus is required)

• Strong understanding of what makes ads convert (hooks, pacing, storytelling, retention)

• Advanced editing skills in Premiere Pro / After Effects (or similar)

• Advanced with AI as part of your workflow — not optional

• You can use AI to:

 • Generate or enhance UGC-style content

 • Create variations at scale

 • Speed up production significantly

• Ability to produce a high volume of creatives without sacrificing quality

• Fast, structured, and highly execution-focused

• Clear communicator, able to take and implement feedback quickly

• Ownership mindset: you care about results, not just output



What We Offer:

• A remote-first full-time role with clear ownership and accountability

• Fast feedback loops and high autonomy — you’ll be judged on output and results, not hours spent

• A team that moves quickly and expects excellence

• Competitive pay, matched to your skills and performance



Ready to Join Us?



This role is for top performers only. If you want an easy job, this isn’t it. If you want to be pushed, grow fast, and have your work directly impact revenue, then you’ll fit right in.



Apply via this form:





To confirm you’ve read this post fully, add the word “Vacuum” to the last question of the form.

title: Process Implementation Specialist / Marketing Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented Process Implementation Specialist to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for analyzing, designing, and implementing efficient business processes to enhance operational performance. The ideal candidate will possess strong analytical skills, high attention to detail, experience with process improvement methodologies, and the ability to follow directions from the President and collaborate with various stakeholders to achieve continuous improvement goals.



At ProRise Paint & Gutters, we believe there is a better way to provide residential and commercial painting & gutter services. A more valuable, less invasive way where customers are earned rather than bought, which has helped us to become the most reviewed home improvement’s company in Canada. We're passionate about our company and our values and strive to ensure homeowners are properly informed, provided options and receive nothing short of an excellent product.



Position Overview:

As the Process Implementation Specialist, you will play a pivotal role in enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of business processes within the organization. This role involves working closely with our President to design and execute strategies, analyzing existing processes, identifying areas for improvement, designing optimized workflows, and implementing changes to drive operational excellence. This remote position offers the flexibility to work from anywhere while contributing to the success of our organization.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Design and Implement Strategies and Initiatives:

o Work closely with the President to execute strategies and initiatives.

o Develop and refine strategies to achieve organizational goals.

o Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement process changes.

o Ensure that new processes align with organizational goals and compliance standards.



2. Analyze Current Processes:

o Conduct comprehensive assessments of existing business processes.

o Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and areas for improvement.

o Gather and document detailed business requirements and process flows.



3. Facilitate Continuous Improvement:

o Monitor the performance of implemented processes to ensure they meet desired outcomes.

o Propose and execute continuous improvement initiatives based on performance data.

o Utilize data-driven approaches to measure process performance and impact.



4. Maintain Comprehensive Documentation:

o Create detailed process documentation, including workflows, standard operating procedures (SOPs), and guidelines.

o Generate reports and presentations to communicate findings and recommendations.

o Maintain accurate records of process changes and their outcomes.



5. Develop and Execute Marketing Campaigns:

o Support the planning and execution of marketing campaigns

o Manage and update contacts, lists, and campaigns in HubSpot

o Organize and maintain marketing data and workflows using Airtable

o Oversee
 marketing, lead tracking, and follow-ups

o Coordinate marketing materials, content, and outreach initiatives

o Track campaign performance and maintain organized records



Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Operations Management, or a related field.

• Proven experience in process optimization, process improvement, or a related role.

• Experience with HubSpot and AirTable

• High attention to detail and strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal. Minimum of C2 English Proficiency Level.

• Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and other relevant software.

• Ability to work independently, take initiative and prioritize tasks effectively.

• High level of professionalism and integrity.



How to Apply:



Kindly fill out the application form: 



Keyword: Seaborne



Non-Negotiables:

- Hours of Operations:
Pacific Standard Time, Monday to Friday

- A quiet environment to work in. Working from cafes is not allowed.

- A computer with two monitors or laptop with 2nd screen

- Headset with microphone

- Mouse and keyboard

- High speed internet connection (100Mbps+)

title: Part-Time Web Developer & Digital Specialist
description:
Part-Time Web Developer & Analytics Specialist



Location: Remote (with flexible hours)



Position Type: Part-Time (with potential to grow into full-time)



About Us

We are a growing marketing and design company seeking a Part-Time Web Developer & Digital Specialist to support our expanding client base. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, technically skilled, and excited about both web development and digital marketing performance tracking.



Role Overview

The Web Developer & Digital Specialist will be primarily responsible for maintaining and enhancing internal and client websites, ensuring they are visually polished, technically sound, and optimized for performance. This role includes handling ongoing updates, troubleshooting issues, implementing new functionality, and supporting website migrations, hosting, and domain management. In addition, the position will contribute to improving user experience, applying basic SEO best practices, and supporting digital tracking and analytics needs to ensure websites effectively support marketing and lead generation efforts.



Responsibilities

Web Development & Maintenance

• Perform monthly website edits, updates, and maintenance primarily within WordPress (including Elementor and custom-coded implementations).

• Manage hosting environments, DNS configurations, domain setup, website migrations, and SSL installations.

• Handle website and domain transfers between hosting providers.

• Implement updates using a combination of builder tools and light hard-coded solutions (HTML/CSS/JS) when needed.

• Ensure responsive design, performance optimization, and cross-browser functionality.

• Troubleshoot website issues, including CSS conflicts, plugin conflicts, and hosting-related performance problems.

• Apply basic SEO best practices during site updates (metadata, header structure, page speed, etc.).



Qualifications (Required)

• Experience with WordPress development, including Elementor and basic hard-coded implementations.

• Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript.

• Basic understanding of SEO principles and on-page optimization.

• Experience managing hosting, DNS, domain setup, and website transfers.

• Experience in troubleshooting website performance and functionality issues.

• Ability to manage multiple client websites and ongoing maintenance tasks.

• Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills.



Nice to Have

• Experience with Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics 4.

• Strong digital analytics understanding and data interpretation skills.

• Experience working within Go High Level (websites and funnels).

• Understanding of marketing funnels and performance KPIs.

• Familiarity with paid media platforms (Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn).



What We Offer

• Part-time role with consistent monthly hours to start.

• Opportunity to grow into a full-time role as the company scales.

• Flexible working environment with autonomy and ownership.

• Ability to work across a variety of client industries and projects.

• A chance to be part of a growing team in the marketing and branding industry.

title: Social Media Coordinator
description:
Job Overview

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented Social Media Coordinator to support a fast-growing travel influencer in managing and expanding her online presence. You’ll work behind the scenes to repurpose content, keep posting consistent across multiple platforms, create engaging graphics, and make sure every post is polished and on-brand.



This is a hands-on role where you’ll be directly involved in helping an influencer maintain daily posting, grow her audience, and keep her content visually cohesive and performance-ready. If you love travel content, have an eye for detail, and thrive on keeping things organized, this could be the perfect fit.



What You’ll Do

Content Repurposing & Posting

-Pull high-performing TikToks and turn them into fresh posts for Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and Pinterest.

-Schedule daily posts using our social scheduling tool.

-Create bright, engaging cover images and adjust hashtags for each platform.

-Keep our content tracker up to date so nothing falls through the cracks.



Photo & Graphic Creation

-Brighten, crop, and lightly edit travel photos to match our aesthetic.

-Design simple but beautiful carousel posts for Instagram and Pinterest.

-Create engaging Stories graphics for product recommendations, travel tips, and affiliate promotions.



Brand Consistency & Collaboration

-Follow brand style guidelines to ensure every post feels cohesive.

-Work closely with the team to bring ideas from the content calendar to life.

-Stay flexible and ready to jump on trending opportunities when they fit the brand.



What We’re Looking For

-Experience managing social media content across Instagram, TikTok, and Pinterest.

-Familiarity with scheduling tools like Later, Canva for design, and basic photo editing.

-Strong attention to detail — you notice when fonts, colors, or captions are slightly off.

-A love of travel and an eye for what will make our audience stop scrolling.



How to Apply

Sound like your kind of role? We’d love to hear from you. Please send an
 with:

- Your resume and/or portfolio

- A short intro about yourself (nothing too formal—tell us why this role excites you)

- The subject line: Social Media Coordinator Application – [Your Name]

-Your hourly rate in USD

- If you can commit to 10 hours/week or how many hours you can support 





We’re reviewing applications on a rolling basis and will be in touch with next steps if it’s a good fit.

.

title: Research Specialist – Find Sponsorship Leads (Youth Sports / Schools / Nonprofits)
description:
About the Company



We run a simple SaaS platform called SponsorKeep that helps youth sports leagues and school organizations track sponsors, manage renewals, and grow sponsorship revenue.



Our customers are typically:



Youth sports leagues

Booster clubs

School programs

Nonprofits that rely on local sponsors



We are building a pipeline of organizations that would benefit from this software and need a reliable researcher to help us identify and organize these opportunities.



Role Overview



We are hiring a full-time research specialist to find organizations that are a strong fit for our software and build clean, actionable lead lists.



This is NOT a generic VA role.

We want someone who can think, filter, and identify high-quality targets.



What You’ll Do



Research and identify:

Youth sports leagues (baseball, soccer, football, etc.)

School booster clubs / PTAs

Local nonprofit organizations with sponsorships

Find decision-makers:

League presidents

Athletic directors

Booster club leaders

Collect and organize:

Organization name

Website

Contact name

 (when possible)

Notes on why they’re a good fit

Build clean lists in Google Sheets or Airtable

Follow clear targeting guidelines (we will train you)



What We’re Looking For



Strong English reading/writing

Excellent internet research skills

Attention to detail (VERY important)

Ability to follow instructions but also think independently

Experience with:

Google Sheets

Lead research

Data entry (clean + organized)



Bonus (not required):



Experience with lead generation or prospecting

Experience supporting US-based companies



What Success Looks Like



You consistently find high-quality, relevant organizations

Your lists are clean, accurate, and usable

You can explain why a lead is a good fit



Compensation



$400/month (full-time)

Long-term opportunity if performance is strong

Potential for bonuses based on quality + output



Schedule



Flexible, but must overlap partially with US hours (CST preferred)

Output matters more than hours



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow into:



Lead outreach

Account management

Team lead (managing other researchers)



How to Apply



Please include:



A short intro about yourself

Your experience with research or lead generation

A sample (VERY important):

Find 3 youth sports leagues in the US

Include:

Name

Website

Contact (if available)



Task: Find 5 High-Quality SponsorKeep Leads



Instructions to candidate:



Step 1: Find Organizations



Find 5 organizations in the United States that would likely benefit from SponsorKeep.



Focus on:



Youth sports leagues (Little League, soccer clubs, football leagues)

School booster clubs

Small nonprofits that rely on local sponsors



Step 2: Collect This Info



Put everything into a Google Sheet with these columns:



Organization Name

Website

Location (City, State)

Type (sports league / booster club / nonprofit)

Contact Name (if available)

Contact
 (if available)

How they get sponsors (brief note)

Why they are a good fit (1–2 sentences)



Step 3: Quality > Quantity



We are NOT looking for random lists.



We are looking for:



Real organizations

Evidence they have sponsors

Thoughtful reasoning



Step 4: Submit



Share your Google Sheet link.

title: Social Media and Influencer Coordinator
description:
About the Role



We’re looking for a Social Media & Influencer Coordinator who’s organized, proactive, and ready to dive into a mix of brand outreach, influencer coordination, and content support. You’ll be helping us keep things running smoothly behind the scenes—think outreach
s, influencer and brand research, media kit updates, and posting and scheduling content. If you love staying on top of details and know your way around a solid pitch

We service primarily travel and beauty brands, so interest in these categories is a plus.

Influencer & Brand Research (Up To 15 hrs/week)

-Build weekly lists of 50 new influencers

Brand Pitching

s to brands and influencers

Decks & Media Kits (Up To 1 hr/week)

You’d Be a Great Fit If You…

s and love connecting people

title: Cold Caller (Residential & Commercial Cleaning Services)
description:

Application Requirement:

 • Applicants are required to record a self-introductory and share their experience working in a cleaning company using vocaroo:

title: Tracking & Analytics Specialist (GTM / GA4)
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented Tracking & Analytics Specialist with strong experience in Google Tag Manager (GTM) and Google Analytics 4 (GA4) to support our digital marketing team. This gig focuses on auditing and fixing duplicate tags and events, ensuring clean, accurate data that clearly reflects user behavior and marketing performance.



This project is ideal for someone who enjoys troubleshooting, tracking issues, organizing complex event structures, and building scalable tracking frameworks that support long-term growth. You will play a key role in improving data integrity across our website and marketing platform.



Key Responsibilities

• Audit existing Google Tag Manager containers and GA4 setups across

• Identify and resolve duplicate tags, triggers, and event tracking issues

• Clean up and standardize event naming conventions and parameter structures

• Ensure tracking accurately reflects user behavior and conversion points

• Implement scalable tagging frameworks to prevent future duplication

• Configure new events, conversions, and enhanced measurement tracking as needed

• Validate tracking using debugging tools and QA processes

• Monitor tracking performance and recommend improvements for data accuracy

• Maintain documentation of tracking setup and changes



Key Deliverables

• Completed audit of existing GTM and GA4 tracking structures

• Removal of duplicate or conflicting tags and events

• Optimized event taxonomy and naming conventions

• Scalable tagging framework for future implementations

• Visual documentation outlining the recommended tag and event structure

• Clear process documentation for ongoing maintenance



Requirements

• Strong hands-on experience with Google Tag Manager

• Strong knowledge of Google Analytics 4 event-based tracking

• Experience in auditing and cleaning up complex tracking implementations

• Understanding of triggers, variables, and data layer concepts

• Ability to debug tracking issues using browser tools and extensions

• Experience implementing conversion tracking for marketing campaigns

• Strong documentation and communication skills

• Detail-oriented with a focus on data accuracy



What Success Looks Like

• Clean, duplicate-free tracking environment

• Accurate event tracking across key user journeys

• Consistent naming conventions across platforms

• Scalable tagging framework for future growth

• Clear visual documentation the team can follow

title: FULL-TIME VIRTUAL ASSISTANT FOR U.S. INSURANCE AGENCY?LONG-TERM ROLE WITH GROWTH OPPORTUNITY
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are a growing U.S.-based insurance agency that specializes in Medicare health insurance for clients ages 65 and older. We also offer related insurance products to the same clientele. Our agency currently supports 13 licensed agents and continues to grow each year.

We are looking for a reliable, long-term Virtual Assistant to work directly with the agency owner and help support daily operations and the team. This is not a short-term or project-based role. We are looking for someone who wants stability and the opportunity to grow with the company for years.



ABOUT THE ROLE

Your primary responsibility will be supporting the agency owner, with additional support provided to the team when needed. This role includes administrative work, data management, and phone-based tasks.

You will be responsible for calling U.S. insurance carriers to complete audits or request policy and commission information. You will log into carrier portals to download book of business or commission data and reconcile that information into reports using Google Sheets or Excel.

You will also assist with outbound calling. This includes calling existing customers and insurance leads to schedule appointments using a simple script. These calls are primarily appointment setting, not high-pressure sales.

You will also help organize lead lists, track call outcomes, and keep records updated in our systems.

As the agency grows, additional responsibilities may be added for the right person.



COMPENSATION AND LONG-TERM GROWTH

Starting pay is $3.50 per hour for this full-time position.

Pay will increase after the first 90 days, and again after an additional 90 days, based on performance, reliability, and consistency.

High performers will have opportunities for faster pay increases, expanded responsibilities, and long-term growth within the agency. This role is designed to grow over time for the right person.



REQUIRED SKILLS

You must be comfortable using Google Sheets and/or Microsoft Excel.

You must be organized, detail-oriented, and able to make sense of data.

You must be able to learn quickly and apply what you learn.

You must be comfortable making phone calls and speaking confidently with customers.

You must have clear, professional spoken and written English.



IDEAL CANDIDATE

You are a self-starter who can manage your time effectively.

Once trained, you do not need to be told every step of what to do.

You are confident speaking on the phone and comfortable following call scripts.

You are dependable and take ownership of your work.

You are looking for a long-term, stable role, not short-term or freelance work.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

You must have a reliable high-speed internet connection. We understand typhoons and outages can occasionally happen.

You must have a fast, up-to-date computer.

You must have a quiet workspace suitable for phone calls.

A headset with clear microphone quality is strongly preferred.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS – READ CAREFULLY

To be considered, ALL applicants must include the following:

A short intro video (1–3 minutes) introducing yourself and your background.

An English sample, written or spoken, that demonstrates your English ability.

Applications that do NOT include BOTH an intro video and an English sample will NOT be considered.



HOW TO APPLY

Please include a brief written introduction about yourself.

Describe your previous VA or administrative experience.

Describe any experience you have with phone work or appointment setting.

Explain your experience working with spreadsheets and data.

Confirm that you are seeking a long-term, full-time role.

Attach your intro video and English sample.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 355 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

Agency Growth Partner helps marketing agencies grow. Ethan Welby (founder) has personally helped scale 500+ marketing agencies, coaches inside Iman Gadzhi's Agency Accelerator program and Charlie Morgan's program, and AGP clients have generated a combined $4,100,000+.



We build client acquisition and operational systems so agency owners can book more calls, close more deals, and deliver results without being involved in everything.



YouTube: 

LinkedIn: 

Instagram: 



---



THE ROLE



We are looking for someone to own the day-to-day operations of our agency and push as much of the business as possible toward automation.



We run a fast-moving operation. We are coaching hundreds of agencies, running DFY client delivery, managing outreach systems, and building content at the same time. There are a lot of moving parts and not a lot of time to babysit processes. We need someone who can look at a messy system, understand what is broken, and fix it without being asked twice.



Your main job is to save time through automation. You will look at every manual process in the business and find ways to replace it with something automated or AI-powered.



If you need to be micromanaged, this is not the right fit.



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Daily Operations:

- Keep things running. Coordinate with external partners, manage content distribution, maintain current systems.

- Manage and update Notion SOPs and playbooks.

- Coordinate with the team daily via Slack.

- Spot problems before they get worse.



Automation and AI (Main Focus):

- Build and maintain automations using n8n, Zapier, and AI tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and Manus.

- Fix broken automations on your own without escalating every issue.

- Design and ship at least one new AI-powered workflow per month.

- Continuously look for manual tasks in the business and automate them.



---



WHAT WE NEED



- Proven experience with n8n and/or Zapier. Real multi-step automations, not just basic triggers.

- You can describe a specific automation you built: what tools it connected, what problem it solved, what the result was.

- You use AI tools like Claude or ChatGPT daily, not just occasionally.

- You have worked in an agency or marketing agency before.

- You are proficient in Notion. You can build and maintain SOPs, not just read them.

- Strong written English. Clear, direct, no fluff.

- Highly organized and self-directed. You manage your own workload without reminders.



Nice to Have:

- Close CRM experience.

- Experience designing AI workflows or agents.

- Experience with LinkedIn automation tools.

- Deep n8n expertise.



---



WHY JOIN US



This is not a role where you execute tasks and wait for the next one. You own the operations of a real, growing business.



If you build a workflow that saves 10 hours a week, that is yours. You will see the direct impact of your work. The business gets faster because of you, and you will know it.



Working directly with the founder means no layers of management, no waiting for approvals, no politics. You will have Ethan on Slack. Feedback comes fast. If you have a good idea, it gets heard the same day. You will have full context on what the business is doing and why, not just a task list handed down from someone you never talk to.



We also invest in the people on our team. If there is a tool, course, or resource that helps you do your job better, we cover it.



This role can grow significantly as we scale. If you are the right person, there is a lot more responsibility and opportunity available.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send your application with:



1. A specific example of an automation you built. What tools did it connect, what problem did it solve, what was the result?

2. Your experience working in an agency environment.

3. Your expected monthly rate.

4. Your availability to start.



Applications without a specific automation example will not be reviewed.

title: Social Media Strategist
description:
About the Role

You will work closely with our Social Media Manager and Affiliate Manager, providing weekly reports and creative direction that help us go viral and scale content performance.

Deliver a weekly weekend report, including:

Advise on:

Work independently and take full ownership of your role



What You Are NOT Responsible For

???? Your role is purely focused on sourcing, analysis, and strategy



Our Goals

Requirements

The ideal candidate:

2. Has experience within the hair styling tools niche (required)

Compensation

What We Offer

about the reults.

title: Social media Growth Marketing Manager ( for A.I Virtual influencer)
description:
Job Title:  Social media Performance Growth Manager ($5/hr) – Ariel Kai AI Brand

The Mission:

I am building a premier A.I Virtual Influencer/ A.I model brand, (Ariel Kai A.I) page on instagram and tiktok,  focused on Western Heritage, Fitness, and Lifestyle. We have a technical virtual assistant who is  creating 9 videos across 3 platforms daily.  I am currently seeking a (Social media Growth & Marketing Specialist) to be the architect behind (Ariel Kai AI) rise on Instagram and TikTok to get over 10k followers and monetized.



Note: You are NOT responsible for editing. You are responsible for Growth, Engagement, and Revenue.



Compensation & Trial Period:

Rate: $5.00 USD per hour for 20hrs a week



Trial Phase: 1-month total trial (with a 2-week "Performance Review" to see if you truly understand how to execute effectively whats needed for this role).



Type: Part-time (20 hours/week) to start, with potential for Full-time if thousands of followers or monetization occurs.



Top 3 Required Skills:

Social Media Growth Hacking (Algorithm Mastery): You must understand "Algorithm Triggering," not just posting. You know how to identify "Watch Time" trends and "Retention Hooks" specifically for US-based audiences.



Affiliate Marketing (Sales Conversion): You focus on "Clicks," not just "Likes." You understand the "Buyer’s Journey" and know how to optimize captions and "Link-in-Bio" funnels (Fanvue, Etsy, Stan Store) to drive revenue.



Content Strategy (Creative Briefing): You are the bridge to our Technical Manager. You will research competitors and provide Ritz with a daily "To-Do" list and creative briefs so he only produces videos designed to go viral.



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Direction: Research trending Western/Fitness hooks and tell Ritz exactly which visual "Pattern Interrupts" to use.



Data Tracking: Maintain a Daily Growth Tracker (Google Sheets) documenting views, follower growth, and link clicks.



Community Management: Reply to all comments/DMs in Ariel’s "voice" to maximize engagement velocity.



Ad Management: Oversee a small daily "Testing Budget" ($5–$15) to find our ideal customer segments.



How to Apply:

Share a link to a profile you have personally grown to 10k+ followers.



Tell me your strategy for making an AI Model feel "authentic" to a US audience.



Explain how you would track the ROI of our daily video output.



Include the phrase "Western Gold" in your subject line.

title: Virtual CIO (vCIO) – Strategic IT Consultant
description:
We are seeking a strategic and business-minded Virtual CIO (vCIO) to serve as a high-level advisor for our diverse portfolio of business clients. In this role, you will act as an extension of our clients' executive teams, bridging the gap between their business goals and their technology infrastructure.

 

As a vCIO, you are not just a technical expert; you are a strategic partner. You will be responsible for developing long-term IT roadmaps, managing technology budgets, overseeing risk and compliance, and ensuring that every technical investment our clients make drives measurable business value. The ideal candidate has a deep understanding of Managed Services (MSP), excellent consultative skills, and the ability to translate complex technical concepts into clear business strategies.

 

Key Responsibilities

*Strategic IT Roadmapping & Planning

   - Conduct regular Strategic Business Reviews (SBRs) with clients to align technology with their 1–3 year business goals.

   - Develop and maintain comprehensive IT roadmaps, including hardware lifecycle management, cloud migrations, and 

     security enhancements.

   - Identify emerging technologies that can provide a competitive advantage or operational efficiency for specific client 

     verticals.

*Budgeting & Financial Management

   - Assist clients in developing and managing annual IT budgets.

   - Provide Total Cost of Ownership (TCO) analysis for new technology investments.

   - Help clients prioritize IT spending based on risk, ROI, and business impact.

*Risk, Security & Compliance

   - Oversee client security postures, ensuring alignment with frameworks like NIST, CIS, or industry-specific regulations 

     (HIPAA, PCI, SOC2).

   - Lead Disaster Recovery (DR) and Business Continuity (BC) planning and testing.

   - Act as a high-level advisor during security i
 or complex technical audits.

*Client Relationship & Account Leadership

   - Serve as the primary point of contact for executive-level stakeholders (CEOs, CFOs, Owners).

   - Monitor client satisfaction and service delivery trends, working with the technical team to ensure high standards are met.

   - Lead the technical onboarding of new high-value clients, setting the strategic foundation from day one.

*Vendor & Project Oversight

  - Assist clients in evaluating and managing third-party technology vendors (ISPs, Line-of-Business software, etc.).

  - Provide high-level oversight for major infrastructure projects to ensure they stay aligned with the strategic vision.

 

Qualifications

Required

- Experience: 7–10+ years of experience in IT leadership, senior systems engineering, or IT consulting (MSP experience is highly preferred).

- Strategic Mindset: Proven ability to develop long-term technology strategies that solve real-world business problems.

- Financial Literacy: Comfort managing budgets, performing ROI calculations, and discussing financial impact with executives.

- Communication Excellence: Exceptional ability to present to "C-Suite" executives and translate "geek-speak" into "business-speak."

- Broad Technical Knowledge: Deep understanding of Microsoft 365, Cloud Infrastructure (Azure/AWS), Networking, and Cybersecurity frameworks.

- Consultative Approach: Strong ability to influence stakeholders and lead through consensus and expertise.



Preferred (Nice to Have)

- Experience with ITIL frameworks or MSP-specific vCIO tools.

- Relevant certifications (e.g., CISSP, CISM, PMP, or advanced Microsoft/Cloud certifications).

- Previous experience in a "Fractional CIO" or "Account Lead" role within a technical service organization.

 

What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Clients view you as an indispensable member of their leadership team, not just a "vendor."

- Client IT environments are stable, secure, and proactively managed according to a documented roadmap.

- Technology spend is predictable for the client, with fewer "emergency" expenses.

- High client retention and growth through trusted, strategic recommendations.



Why Join Us?



We believe in creating an environment where our tea
mbers can thrive both professionally and personally. Here’s what we offer:



*Career Growth: Paid certifications, training, and structured onboarding to help you advance your skills.

*Attractive Compensation: Competitive salary, performance-based incentives (monthly profit share and end-of-year bonus), and 13th-month pay.

*Health & Wellness: Monthly healthcare allowance to support your well-being.

*Work-Life Balance: 100% remote work with company-provided equipment.

*Supportive Culture: Be part of a forward-thinking team that values collaboration, innovation, and having fun while doing great work.



What Sets Us Apart?



*Performance-Based Rewards: Monthly profit sharing and bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.

*Continuous Learning: We invest in your growth with paid certifications and training.

*Collaborative Environment: Work with a team that values your input and supports your success.

*Flexibility: Enjoy the freedom of remote work while contributing to impactful projects.



How to Apply

If you’re ready to take your IT career to the next level, we’d love to hear from you! Apply now and join a team that’s passionate about technology, growth, and delivering exceptional service.



*Submit your application and include the numbers (3812) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



*Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



*Currently looking for candidates in NCR or Luzon area of the Philippines



This is an overnight position. The working hours for this role are 8AM-5PM CST Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Founding AI Operations Lead (High-Growth
description:
Starting Salary: $800 USD / Month

Path to $1,800 USD: Performance-based raises tied to KPIs and revenue growth.

Location: Remote (Philippines)



The Mission: We Build AI Employees

At Ai or Bye, we don’t just "use" AI; we build fully autonomous AI employees and agents that replace manual labor in industries like dentistry and beyond. We combine world-class marketing, business development, and cutting-edge tech to revolutionize how businesses operate.



The "Founding Member" Opportunity

I am not looking for an employee. I am looking for a partner in execution.



The "Full Out" Expectation: If you are a "task-taker" who waits for instructions, do not apply. I need a self-sufficient builder who sees a problem and builds a system to solve it before I even ask.



Rapid Income Scaling: If you play "Full Out," innovate, and build systems that drive net revenue, your pay will scale incrementally. We have a clear path to move you from $800 to $1,800 USD/month within your first few months based on the KPIs you hit.



$10,000+ in Personal Development: You will receive the same world-class mentorship and business coaching I use. This isn't just for work; it’s to help you grow as a human, a leader, and a pillar of your family and community.



The Technical "Nerd" Stack

You must be obsessed with the "how" of AI. You will be expected to master and implement:



GoHighLevel (GHL): Building the "brain" of our operations (Workflows, APIs, Snapshots).



Advanced AI Tools: You must be ready to dive into Claude Code, OpenCLAW, and CoWork.



System Integration: Connecting the dots using MCPs (Model Context Protocol) and CLIs.



Autonomous Agents: Helping us build and deploy agents that actually "think" and work for our clients.



Are You The One?

Age/Mindset: You are likely young (18+), tech-obsessed, and have spent your free time "nerding out" on code or automation.



Ethics: You believe in growth, extreme ownership, and playing "Full Out."



Organization: You are "tight." You hate messy systems and love clean, scalable architecture.



Loyalty: You want a home. You want a team where your contribution actually matters.



Bonus: 13th-month pay is included upon completion of your first 12 months.



CRITICAL: How To Apply

Standard resumes will be deleted immediately. To prove you are a Founding Member, you must:



The Tech Proof: Send a 3-minute Loom video. Show me something you built in GoHighLevel or an automation using AI. Explain the logic behind it.



The "Nerd" Logic: Explain how you would use MCPs or a CLI to make an AI agent more efficient. (If you don't know yet, tell me exactly how you plan to learn it in the next 48 hours).



The "Full Out" Statement: Why does a "Founding Member" role mean more to you than a standard 9-to-5 job?

title: E-commerce Advertising Manager
description:
Position Overview

The Ecommerce Advertising Manager will be responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing digital advertising campaigns that drive profitable growth for our supplement brand. This role requires a strong understanding of direct-to-consumer ecommerce, paid social, paid search, creative testing, funnel optimization, and performance analytics. The ideal candidate is highly data-driven, creative-minded, and experienced in scaling online sales in a competitive consumer product environment.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns across platforms such as Meta, Google, YouTube, TikTok, and other relevant channels

Develop and execute customer acquisition strategies to increase revenue, new customer growth, and return on ad spend

Monitor daily campaign performance and make data-driven adjustments to budgets, audiences, bidding, placements, and creatives

Analyze key performance metrics including ROAS, CPA, CAC, AOV, MER, CTR, CVR, and LTV

Collaborate with creative teams to develop high-converting ad creatives, landing pages, and promotional campaigns

Lead ongoing creative testing initiatives including hooks, angles, offers, copy, and formats

Work closely with ecommerce and website teams to improve conversion rates and customer journey performance

Identify new growth opportunities across paid media, retargeting, upsells,
/SMS integrations, and affiliate or influencer advertising

Build reports and dashboards to communicate campaign performance, trends, and recommendations

Manage advertising budgets responsibly and allocate spend based on performance goals

Stay current on platform changes, industry trends, compliance standards, and supplement advertising best practices



Qualifications

3+ years of experience managing ecommerce paid media campaigns, preferably for a DTC brand

Experience in health, wellness, supplements, or consumer packaged goods is strongly preferred

Strong working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, Google Analytics, and ecommerce tracking systems

Experience with Shopify and related ecommerce tools is preferred

Proven track record of scaling profitable ad campaigns and improving acquisition efficiency

Deep understanding of conversion funnels, attribution, audience targeting, and retargeting strategies

Ability to interpret performance data and turn insights into action quickly

Strong communication, organization, and project management skills

Comfortable working in a fast-paced, growth-oriented environment

Knowledge of supplement compliance and advertising restrictions is a plus

Preferred Skills

Experience with creative strategy and direct response marketing

Familiarity with Klaviyo, Triple Whale, Northbeam, Hyros, or similar attribution/reporting tools

Experience managing product launches, seasonal campaigns, and promotional calendars

Strong understanding of landing page testing and conversion rate optimization

Ability to balance brand positioning with aggressive performance goals



Success in This Role Looks Like

Increasing profitable website revenue through paid advertising

Lowering customer acquisition costs while maintaining growth

Identifying winning creatives and scaling them effectively

Improving return on ad spend and overall marketing efficiency

Building a repeatable, measurable system for growth
