title: Creative Quality Manager
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

We are looking for a highly perceptive, creatively sharp Creative Quality Manager to help strengthen the quality, consistency, and scalability of our photo and video delivery pipeline. This person will serve as a high-level internal creative checkpoint — reviewing deliverables, identifying recurring quality issues, spotting patterns across shooters and editors, and helping our team improve creative consistency without adding more burden to already-stretched internal leaders. This is not a basic admin or upload role. We are looking for someone with a strong creative eye first, especially in video, who can also think operationally, document issues clearly, and help improve backend workflows over time.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

- Review video deliverables before final delivery to ensure quality and consistency

- Catch technical and creative misses before they reach the client

- Identify patterns across shooters and editors, including recurring strengths, misses, and coaching opportunities

- Flag issues related to coverage, pacing, framing, shot variety, detail shots, creative direction, music choice, captions, and overall polish

- Organize observations and feedback clearly for internal leadership

- Help create stronger quality control standards and backend review processes

- Support delivery readiness by ensuring projects are complete, clean, and aligned with internal expectations

- Help reduce the amount of proofing, review, and repetitive delivery work sitting on senior internal tea
mbers

- Contribute to SOPs, workflow improvements, and quality documentation as the team grows

- Writing feedback briefs to photographers and videographers regarding review and delivery

- Ensuring brand standards for photos and videos (correct logos, fonts, colors, etc.)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Fewer quality issues slipping through to clients

- Better visibility into shooter/editor performance trends

- Stronger internal feedback loops for creative coaching

- More consistency across delivered video content

- Less manual review burden on the internal team

- Cleaner backend systems and a more scalable delivery process



IDEAL BACKGROUND

- Strong video editing or post-production background

- Excellent creative judgment and attention to detail

- Ability to spot both technical and aesthetic issues quickly

- Experience reviewing work for quality, not just producing it

- Organized, process-aware, and able to document findings clearly

- Real estate media experience

- Comfortable working behind the scenes in a support and oversight capacity

- Strong AI skillsets such as Higgsfield, Nano Banana Pro, Eleven Labs, Claude, and others



NICE TO HAVE

- Experience working in a fast-paced, high-volume creative environment

- Familiarity with distributed editing teams or offshore creative support

- Operational or workflow improvement experience

- Experience helping train, guide, or support photographers/editors



THIS ROLE IS NOT

- A client-facing phone support role

- A purely admin or upload-only VA role

- A replacement for creative leadership

- A basic checklist-only QC seat



This role is for someone who can combine creative discernment, consistency, and backend support to help level up our internal quality control and creative execution.



WHO YOU ARE

You have a strong eye, high standards, and good taste. You notice what others miss. You care about the difference between “technically complete” and “actually good.” You can bring structure to creative work without draining the humanity out of it. You help teams get better, not just busier.

title: Client Care Specialist
description:
TYPICAL HOURS

- Start time between 8:30 and 9:00 AM

- End time 5:00 PM



MISSION

The Client Care Specialist is an operational admin role and is the relationship hub— this role ensures agents feel taken care of, the calendar is protected, and opportunities for growth are identified daily. You manage client communication, control scheduling, support light sales, and strengthen long-term relationships. When active clients are fully supported, you shift into outreach and revenue-building mode.



DAILY SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE

- Agents feel supported and confident

- Calendar is clean, optimized, and protected

- Sales opportunities are identified and surfaced

- Relationships are actively maintained

- No client is left wondering what is going on



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



1. Client Communication and Care

- Monitor and respond to
, text, Slack, and CR
ssages

- Maintain a friendly, fast, concierge-level tone

- Confidently answer questions about pricing, packages, and services

- Recommend upgrades and add-ons when appropriate

- Resolve small issues independently

- Prioritize long-term and OG clients

- Log notes and important details in the CRM

- Agents should feel like they have a personal point of contact, not a ticket system.



2. Scheduling and Calendar Control

- Fully manage the calendar inside Tonomo

- Confirm appointments and resolve scheduling questions

- Optimize routes and timing for efficiency

- Push back on unreasonable requests using solution-first language

- Avoid saying no when possible by presenting options

- Decline same-day requests if they hurt operations

- Escalate truly critical situations to Tyler

- Protect weekday scheduling and limit weekends unless approved

- The calendar exists to support quality, not chaos.



3. Light Sales Support and Opportunity Spotting

- This role supports growth without pressure selling.

- Upsell add-ons when agents ask questions

- Suggest listing campaigns, Zillow Showcase, video, or premium services when relevant

- Identify high-intent or hot agents

- Flag those agents for Manager to personally follow up

- Support value-based conversations, not discounts



4. Client Outreach and Relationship Building

- Once active tasks are complete, shift into outreach mode.

- Reach out to agents who have not ordered recently

- Send friendly check-in texts,
s, or calls

- Reconnect with past clients to stay top of mind

- Perform care calls after projects are delivered

- Ensure clients are happy and heard

- Ask for reviews when expectations are met

- Log outreach and results in the CRM



5. Care Call Guidelines

- Phone calls are preferred when possible

- Text is acceptable and encouraged when appropriate

- If an agent has multiple jobs in a short time, one phone call per week is sufficient

- Follow-up texts can be used to check in and confirm satisfaction

- Dealer’s choice, based on context and relationship

- Goal is connection, not interruption



6. Review Requests

- Review asks typically happen during care calls

- Text follow-ups are also acceptable

- If satisfaction is confirmed, politely ask for a Google review

- Track reviews received

- Thank agents for their time and support

- Reviews are a growth lever. Treat them with intention.



7. Project Awareness and Support

- While evening ops owns most delivery and QC:

- Monitor Tonomo for overnight deliveries

- Handle morning video deliveries if they come in

- Assist with follow-ups tied to completed jobs

- Coordinate with evening ops when questions arise



TOOLS USED DAILY

- Tonomo for scheduling, orders, delivery, and invoicing

- Slack for internal communication

-
 and text for client communication

- GoHighLevel CRM for notes, outreach, and tracking

- Social media is not part of this role

title: Client Success Manager - Real Estate Media
description:
ROLE SUMMARY

We are seeking a personable, high-energy, detail-oriented Client Success Manager to join our team. This dynamic hybrid role will require a blend of client communication & operational oversight to ensure the smooth functioning of their fast-growing real estate media business. The ideal candidate will excel in written & verbal communication, internal project management, and client relations, with a keen eye for detail and a passion for helping a business run smoothly. 



ROLE & RESPONSIBILITIES

- Manage all client communications via
, text, and phone while ensuring responsiveness.

- Make daily customer care calls in order to check in with and ensure clients’ satisfaction.

- Schedule photo/video shoots and manage calendars across multiple markets.

- Assist clients with service questions and light technical support, as necessary. 

- Implement quality control measures to ensure product and service excellence.

- Collaborate across teams to align on client projects and operational goals.

- Provide insights and consultations on service upgrades and packages to enhance client value.

- Maintain the organization’s CRM to ensure the accuracy of client data, while offering suggestions for improvement. 

- Contribute to a positive team culture through engagement, professional development, and retention initiatives.



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS

- You have 1-2 years of experience in an operations and/or administrative role within fast-paced service industries.

- You are proficient in utilizing and maintaining CRM tools & project management software.

- You are professional and showcase etiquette, a positive attitude, and excellent customer service skills.

- You are great with clients and understand the importance of relationship building.

- You are analytical and possess strong creative, problem-solving, critical-thinking, and decision-making skills.

- You can function under pressure in a fast-paced environment.

- You are detail obsessive and understand the importance of attention to detail.

- You take feedback well and constantly look for ways to improve your craft and the craft of the team at large.



BONUS POINTS

- Real estate industry, marketing/sales, and/or client management experience.

- Familiarity with media/real estate media equipment and photo shoots.

title: Real Estate Media Company Research Analyst
description:
Real Estate Media Company Research Analyst



About Us

Chasing Daylight Studio is a fast-growing real estate media company based in Massachusetts. We provide professional photography, video, floor plans, virtual staging, and marketing media for real estate agents.

We are committed to supporting our clients not just at the time of the photoshoot, but throughout the entire lifecycle of the listing.

We are seeking a detail-oriented Research Analyst to help us track listing outcomes and identify opportunities to better serve our clients.



Role Overview

The Real Estate Media Company Research Analyst is responsible for reviewing properties we have photographed and determining:

• When the property was listed

• Whether it has sold

• When it sold

• Whether it has expired, been withdrawn, or remains active

This role ensures we stay informed about our clients’ listings and allows us to:

• Congratulate agents when properties sell

• Offer additional marketing services if listings are not selling

• Strengthen long-term client relationships

• Identify repeat business opportunities

This is an operational research role focused on accuracy, consistency, and independent execution.



Core Responsibilities

• Review a weekly list of property addresses provided by Chasing Daylight Studio

• Research each address using designated real estate websites

• Determine listing date, current status, and sale date (if applicable)

• Accurately record findings in our tracking system

• Flag properties that meet follow-up criteria

• Provide a structured weekly report at an agreed-upon day and time

Accuracy is critical. Incorrect information directly affects client communication and business decisions.



Required Skills

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow research procedures consistently

• Strong command of the English language

• Strong written communication skills

• Comfort navigating real estate listing websites such as 
, 
, and similar platforms

• Ability to organize findings clearly and accurately

• Reliable and deadline-driven

• Able to work independently without supervision

This role requires someone who can manage their time effectively, stay focused, and complete work accurately without being monitored.



Application Requirements

To be considered for this position, applicants must:

• Submit a short video introduction explaining their background and why they are a good fit for this role

• Demonstrate clear and professional spoken English

• Follow all application instructions carefully

• Include the word “consistency” somewhere in your video introduction

Applications submitted without a video introduction or without following instructions will not be considered.



Work Structure

• Part-time position

• Approximately 4 hours per week

• Work must be completed in one dedicated 4-hour block each week

• Flexible schedule, as long as weekly updates are delivered at the agreed-upon day and time

• Independent, low-touch role with clear expectations



Trial Period

This position includes a 3-week paid trial period.

During this period:

• Accuracy, reliability, and consistency will be evaluated

• Reports will be reviewed carefully for completeness and correctness

• Communication and timeliness will be assessed

Continuation beyond the trial period will depend on demonstrated accuracy and dependable performance.

Accuracy in reporting is essential to the success of this role. Consistent errors or incomplete research will result in the position not moving forward.



Compensation & Payment

• Payment will be issued bi-weekly on Fridays via Remitly

• Payments are processed on Fridays



Performance Expectations

• Reports must be accurate and complete

• Updates must be delivered consistently at the scheduled time

• No listings should be skipped

• Information must be clearly documented

Consistency and accuracy are non-negotiable for long-term success in this role.

title: Virtual Assistant – Real Estate Quality Control Specialist
description:
Virtual Assistant – Real Estate Quality Control Specialist



About Us

Chasing Daylight Studio is a fast-growing real estate media company based in Massachusetts. We specialize in professional photography, video, floor plans, virtual staging, and marketing media for real estate agents.



Our brand is built on two equal pillars:

• Exceptional quality

• Outstanding customer service

Quality is not negotiable. Every image, video, and floor plan we deliver represents our reputation.

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to become our dedicated Quality Control Specialist. This is one of the most important roles in our company.

This person will serve as the final internal checkpoint before media is delivered to our clients.



Role Overview

The Quality Control Specialist is responsible for ensuring every photoshoot is complete, accurate, polished, and meets Chasing Daylight Studio’s quality standards before delivery.

This role requires exceptional attention to detail, strong judgment, and the ability to enforce quality standards consistently.

You will work closely with our editing team, AI editing tools, and our delivery platform to ensure every project meets our brand standards.

This is not a task-based role. This is an ownership role. You are responsible for protecting the integrity of our brand.



Core Responsibilities

Quality Control – Photos

• Carefully review all delivered photos for quality, consistency, and accuracy

• Ensure proper exposure, color balance, vertical alignment, composition, and overall professionalism

• Use AI editing tools to declutter, adjust, and improve photos when needed

• Apply virtual staging using AI tools when requested by clients

• Work with clients to adjust virtually staged furniture based on feedback

• Confirm all required photos are present and nothing is missing



Quality Control – Video 

This is one of the most challenging and important parts of the role.

• Carefully review all videos for smoothness, pacing, stabilization, transitions, and adherence to job instructions

• Ensure videos reflect a luxury, professional standard

• Verify editors followed all specific property instructions

• Identify any mistakes, quality issues, or missed details

• Clearly and professionally communicate required revisions to editors

• Return videos that do not meet our standards

You must be confident in enforcing quality standards. If something is not right, it does not get delivered.



Floor Plan Quality Control

• Review floor plans for accuracy and completeness

• Make room name adjustments when requested

• Work directly with clients if clarification is needed

• Ensure final floor plans are accurate before delivery



Delivery Management and Job Tracking

• Ensure no photoshoot job slips through the cracks

• Track projects from upload through final delivery

• Confirm all deliverables are complete before release

• Maintain organized file management systems

• Help maintain internal tracking systems and workflows

Organization and reliability are essential.



AI-First Workflow

This role requires comfort and experience working with AI-based editing tools.

• Use AI tools for decluttering, virtual staging, and minor image corrections

• Be comfortable learning and adapting to new AI platforms

• Apply strong visual judgment when using AI tools to ensure results meet brand standards

• Photoshop experience is helpful but not required

• If using Adobe products, you must provide your own subscription

AI tools assist the workflow, but human judgment drives quality.



Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)

Applicants must have:

• Prior Quality Control experience for a real estate media company

• Direct experience reviewing real estate photography and video

• Experience working with editors and requesting revisions

• Experience using AI editing tools for real estate media

• Strong command of the English language 

• At least one professional reference from a real estate media company verifying QC experience

Applicants without direct real estate media QC experience will not be considered.



Interview & Testing Process

Qualified applicants will be required to:

• Complete a practical QC test assignment

• Review sample photos and videos and clearly identify any quality issues or mistakes

• Critique provided media and explain what is wrong, what should be improved, and why

• Provide examples of prior QC work

• Explain their full QC process from start to finish

We are looking for candidates who can demonstrate strong visual judgment, attention to detail, and the ability to communicate feedback clearly and professionally.



Performance Expectations

• Delivery timelines will be monitored

• Accuracy and completeness will be monitored

• Responsiveness during agreed working hours is required

• Quality standards must be consistently maintained

You will be evaluated based on performance, attention to detail, reliability, and communication.



Trial Period

This position includes a 3-week paid trial period.

During this period:

• Your quality, speed, communication, and judgment will be evaluated

• Feedback will be provided regularly

• Continuation into a long-term role will be based on performance

We are looking for long-term tea
mbers, not short-term contractors.



Work Schedule

• Remote position

• Must be available during Eastern Time business hours

• Initial hours: Approximately 5 hours per week

• Expected growth to 30–40 hours per week as volume increases

Applicants must be willing to grow into a full-time role as the company scales.



Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who:

• Takes pride in high standards

• Notices small mistakes others miss

• Is confident giving revision feedback

• Thrives in structured systems

• Wants to grow with a scaling company



Lastly, to be considered for this role you must provide a video introduction

title: META ADS Editor
description:
We are hiring a high-performance video editor to create short-form ad creatives for an e-commerce brand.



This is NOT basic editing. You must understand how to make videos that convert on Meta 
/Instagram)



You will be responsible for:

- Creating 5 - 15 short-form videos per week (15 - 45 seconds)

- Editing UGC style ads (TikTok-style, fast-paces, high retention)

- Adding hooks, captions, sound effects, and pacing for optimised conversions

- Iterating on winning creatives, not just making 'random' videos

- Following briefs, but also contributing your own creative ideas



You MUST understand:

- Hook within first 1 - 3 seconds

- Retention editing (pattern interrupts, pacing)

- Direct response style ads (problem, solution, proof, CTA)

Tools:

CapCut / Premiere Pro / After Effects (any is fine, but you must be fast)

To be considered, you must:

1. Send 3-5 examples of ads you have made (no generic edits)

2. Include the word "WINNER" at the top of your application

3. Briefly explain why you think those ads would perform well



If you do not follow these steps, your application will be ignored.





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- Experience with e-commerce ads / dropshipping ads

- Fast turnaround (24-48h per batch)

- Strong English understanding

- Ability to receive feedback and improve quickly



Performance bonuses are available if ads perform well, up to 10% of net profits from each advert.

Scope of work — required features



1 Design match. Replicate the look and feel of 
 — black/white/cream color palette, layout structure, typography, and overall branding. No need to copy code; you can rebuild from scratch in the framework of your choice.



2 Rental value estimator tool. Rebuild the rent value/rental estimate tool currently on the site. The tool should allow visitors to enter a property address or details and receive an estimated rental value. Must match or improve upon the current functionality.



3 SEO-optimized individual town pages. Create unique, SEO-friendly landing pages for every municipality in the following seven NJ counties: Monmouth, Ocean, Mercer, Middlesex, Union, Somerset, and Essex. Each page must have unique title tags, meta descriptions, H1s, and locally relevant body content — not duplicated boilerplate. Pages must be indexable and structured with schema markup where applicable. (Approx. 200+ town pages total.)



4 Homes for rent listings via AppFolio integration. Pull active rental listings from our AppFolio account and display them dynamically on the site. Listings should show property details, photos, pricing, and availability. Must use AppFolio's API or embed options. Listings should update automatically as units become available or are leased.



5 Tenant and owner portal login links. Include clearly visible buttons or navigation links that direct tenants and owners to their respective AppFolio login portals. These are external links — no custom login functionality needs to be built.



6 GoDaddy deployment. Once the site is complete and approved, you are responsible for deploying and launching the site on my GoDaddy hosting account. Provide a staging URL for review before go-live. Includes DNS setup, SSL configuration, and final QA.



7. Must be able to work with out SEO vendor to keep all of out SEO work intact.  



8.  Integrate our google reviews



9. Create an online chat bot that can set appointments for our sales team or answer questions from visitors.  





? Fully functional website deployed live on GoDaddy

? AppFolio rental listings integrated and displaying correctly

? 200+ individual town pages across 7 NJ counties, all SEO-optimized with unique content

? Rental value estimator tool, fully functional

? Tenant and owner login navigation links

?Staging URL for review and sign-off before launch

?SSL certificate active and site loading at production domain

?Basic on-page SEO audit confirming all pages are indexable

title: Media Buyer
description:
We're a digital marketing agency and we're looking for a skilled, experienced Media Buyer to join our team. This is a part-time role (20 hours per week) with real potential to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



You'll be working hands-on inside our Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts every day, monitoring performance, making optimisations, and keeping campaigns running at their best. If you love being in the accounts, care about the numbers, and take pride in getting the details right, this role is for you.



What the role involves

- Daily monitoring of Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts to ensure campaigns are healthy and on track

- Reviewing key performance metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CPM, CPC) and identifying areas for improvement

- Making bid adjustments, budget pacing decisions, and audience or targeting refinements

- Conducting A/B testing across creatives, audiences, and campaign structures

- Setting up and launching new campaigns as required

- Ensuring tracking and attribution are set up and working correctly

- Flagging performance issues promptly and communicating clearly with the team

- Providing concise performance updates and proactive recommendations



Skills and Experience

We're looking for someone who can demonstrate:

- At least 5 years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads campaigns end-to-end

- Strong understanding of campaign optimisation strategies and key performance metrics

- Ability to spot issues quickly and take action without needing to be prompted

- High attention to detail, you care about the quality of every campaign you manage

- Strong written communication skills in English

- Availability to work during NZ business hours

- Experience working in or with a digital marketing agency is a strong advantage

- Ability to manage multiple accounts and stay organised across competing priorities



Tools and Platforms

You'll ideally have experience with:

- Google Ads (Search, Display, Performance Max, Shopping)

- Meta Ads Manager 
 & Instagram)

- Google Analytics 4 (GA4)

- Google Tag Manager

- Looker Studio for reporting and dashboards

- Project management tools such as Asana, ClickUp, or Monday.com





This is a part-time role to start (20 hours per week), with genuine potential to move to full time as things grow. If you're someone who enjoys getting into the accounts daily and takes real ownership of campaign performance, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Conversion Designer For WordPress
description:
Falcon Ridge Digital (our agency), serves customers in the real estate sector focused on rentable real estate assets (e.g. apartment buildings, rv parks, marinas, mobile home parks, storage units, etc.). 



One-time website design update for a client website in the real estate sector. While this job is a one-time thing, our hope is that our service will create a pipeline of customers needing website upgrades, turning into ongoing work as our agency continues to grow. This could turn into a more permanent position in our agency as we grow



The website in question only has about 10-15 pages that need a face lift so it's not a huge job but still has great significance to our agency. Experience designing websites in the real estate space is a HUGE plus! Copywriting not required for this project but experience with copywriting can be helpful



The expectations for this project are as follows:

- Design an updated, modern website focused on driving conversions (leads). Pretty designs that don't drive more business will not help our clients justify our fees

- Built on WordPress using Thrive Suite (very similar to Elementor but better in SO many ways). You'll primarily use Thrive Theme Builder and Thrive Architect. If you've never used either of these but have great working knowledge of Elementor, that's just fine. Thrive Architect is really easy to pick up if you know Elementor and other similar builders

- Build wireframes of all key pages / page types with justification ready for how elements aid the conversion journey

- Before final implementation, designs be scrutinized by our Product Manager and client to ensure they meet conversion needs

- Address change requests as needed to ensure the client is satisfied with the final deliverable

- Solid English proficiency is a must as you'll need to clearly communicate with our team on needs, adjustments, and deliverables



Please tell us why you'd be a good fit for this job but also why you'd be a good fit for our agency for the long-term. If you have a portfolio of websites you've designed, please send them with your application. We look forward to chatting with you!

title: Google Ads Performance Analyst (Remote)
description:
We are not just looking for someone to run ads — we are looking for someone who understands why campaigns succeed or fail.

What This Role Is About



As a Google Ads Performance Analyst, your focus is not only execution — but analysis, decision-making, and performance improvement. You will work on live campaigns where your insights directly impact results.



What You Will Do

Optimize performance based on key metrics such as CPA, ROAS, CTR, and conversion rates

Review keyword strategies, audience signals, and bidding approaches

Propose and implement data-driven improvements

Ensure tracking accuracy and performance reporting



What We Expect From You



Hands-on experience with Google Ads (Search, Display, or YouTube)

Strong analytical mindset — you are comfortable working with numbers and data

Ability to explain why something works, not just what works

Experience working with campaign data, reports, and performance metrics

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

A serious and responsible approach to your work



What Makes This Opportunity Different



You will work in an environment that values thinking, not just execution

Your ideas and insights will be taken seriously and applied in real campaigns

This is not a “task-based” role — it is a performance-driven role

Strong performers will have opportunities for long-term collaboration



We are looking for individuals who care about results, logic, and continuous improvement.



If you believe you can bring value through your analysis and thinking:



Send your CV to: 



Or leave your contact information for us to reach out.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Sometimes the difference between average and exceptional is just one decision — we’re looking for people who can make that decision.

title: Media Buyer
description:
We are looking for a data-driven Media Buyer to manage and scale our advertising campaigns across
 (Meta) and YouTube.



Our business operates in the investment education and financial niche.



This starts as a project-based trial. If you can maintain target CPAs while scaling spend, this will transition into a long-term part-time or full-time partnership.





What you will do:



- Full-Campaign Management: Plan, set up, and manage end-to-end campaigns on Meta and YouTube.



- Rapid Testing: Execute creative and audience testing frameworks to find winners quickly.



- Performance Optimization: Aggressively manage bids, budgets, and placements to hit ROI/ROAS targets.



- Data Reporting: Provide clear, weekly reports on performance, identifying why things are working (or why they aren't).



- Creative Feedback: Work with our content team to suggest high-converting ad angles based on your data findings.



Who You Are



- The Architect: You’ve managed significant monthly spend on both Meta and YouTube and know the nuances of each (e.g., YouTube's intent-based targeting vs.
's ABO vs CBO).



- Analytical: You live in the dashboard. You can spot a decaying creative before it kills the ROI.



- Self-Managed: You take ownership of the accounts. You don't wait for us to tell you to pivot if the numbers are dipping.



Requirements



- Proven Track Record: At least 2+ years of experience managing Meta and YouTube ads specifically for lead gen or info-products/SaaS.



- Technical Setup: Mastery of Tracking (Pixels, CAPI, GTM) to ensure data accuracy.



- Compliance Knowledge: You know how to navigate ad policies (especially in the financial/educational sectors) to keep accounts healthy.



How to Apply



Please submit the following:



Portfolio/Case Studies: Screenshots or summaries of accounts you have personally managed (feel free to blur sensitive names, but show the numbers).



Platform Expertise: Which platform is your "strongest" (Meta or YouTube), and why?



Your Process: Briefly describe how you handle a campaign that is underperforming in its first 72 hours.

title: SEO Knowledge Needed
description:
I'm looking for an SEO specialist to work on a new website project alongside a developer.



This is a structured project with a strong focus on execution, speed, and measurable results.



Project Overview

New website build (you’ll collaborate with the developer)

Focus on on-page SEO + semantic topical authority

Goal: Increase domain authority to 35 and build strong organic visibility



What We Already Have

An initial topical map (Excel) ready to share

A list of ~1000 backlink opportunities (mainly directories and similar platforms)

Clear direction on content production (AI-assisted is acceptable)



Your Responsibilities

1. On-Page SEO & Strategy

Review and refine the existing topical map

Improve content hierarchy (pillar pages, supporting articles, long-tail pages)

Ensure strong internal linking and topical authority structure



2. Technical SEO (with Developer)

Guide proper URL structure

Ensure pages are optimized for speed and indexation

Implement basic schema and on-site SEO best practices



3. Content Optimization

Structure AI-assisted content to be high-quality and human-readable

Apply proper formatting, headings, and semantic keyword coverage

Align all content with search intent



4. Link Building

Execute directory submissions and foundational backlinks

Review and improve our existing backlink list

Suggest and implement additional link-building strategies (guest posts, niche edits, etc.)



What I'm Looking For

Understanding of  on-page SEO and content structuring

Understanding of topical authority and semantic SEO

Experience with link building at scale

Ability to work fast and communicate clearly

Results-focused mindset (not just theory)



Important Notes

I am open to AI-assisted content, but quality is critical

I am aware that directory links alone are not enough, so I value your input on better strategies



To apply, please answer the following:



How would you approach SEO for this project from day one?

Do you see any risks or issues with the current plan (especially backlinks or timeline)?

title: SEO Manager Technical & On-Page for a US Company (Remote and Graveyard)
description:
A) SEO Leadership & Site Optimization (90% of role)

Own SEO strategy execution across the site: on-page SEO, technical SEO, and site health.

Troubleshoot ranking issues and implement fixes independently (e.g., keyword cannibalization, indexing issues, Google algorithm updates).

Monitor tools like SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4 for performance, coverage, and errors; implement solutions quickly.

Maintain on-page SEO: update titles/meta, add internal links, refresh stale content, implement FAQ/schema updates.

Optimize site performance: compress/resize images, lazy-load media, minimize render-blocking assets, and improve Core Web Vitals.

Work with AI tools and automation workflows to enhance SEO and content operations.



B) CRM & Workflow Management (Supportive)

Use CRMs (preferably Go High Level, also familiar with Pipedrive, Salesforce, Zoho) to manage campaigns, leads, and workflows.

Build and maintain automations/workflows for marketing operations.

Collaborate with tea
mbers to align CRM data with SEO and site performance initiatives.



C) Elementor & WordPress Site Management (5–10% of role)

Convert legacy WordPress pages (Classic Editor/HTML) into Elementor using brand-consistent templates and global styles.

Implement technical hygiene during migration: 301 redirects, canonical tags, sitemaps, no-index where appropriate, fix orphan pages.

Stage/publish new pages or updates; QA for design, SEO, accessibility, and SOP compliance.

Basic troubleshooting of front-end issues with HTML/CSS and Elementor.



D) Collaboration, Compliance, & Standards

Follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes meticulously; suggest improvements proactively.

Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive content with care, particularly in healthcare/behavioral health contexts.

Communicate clearly with tea
mbers and represent the brand professionally.

Work independently, manage priorities, and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.



Required Skills & Experience

4+ years of hands-on SEO experience, particularly with WordPress sites.

Elementor Pro page-building experience.

Strong on-page and technical SEO fundamentals: site architecture, redirects, canonicals, sitemaps, robots.txt, schema basics.

Experience with SEMrush, Google Search Console, GA4, and page speed/Core Web Vitals optimization.

Knowledge of Yoast or Rank Math, media optimization, and basic accessibility standards.

Basic HTML/CSS skills for troubleshooting WordPress/Elementor issues.

Organized, detail-driven, and able to follow SOPs, checklists, and QA processes.

Clear written communication for documentation and updates.



Nice to Have

Building reusable Elementor templates.

Experience with managed WordPress hosting (WP Engine, 
) and CDNs like Cloudflare.

Familiarity with performance optimization tools (WP Rocket, NitroPack, Screaming Frog, PageSpeed Insights, Looker Studio dashboards).

Experience with healthcare or behavioral health content.



Compensation & Schedule

Rate: $9 USD per hour.



Working hours:

4 hours overlap in CST (core collaboration hours).

4 hours fixed Philippine time (must remain consistent each day).

Paid time off: Includes standard US holidays and paid leaves.

Fully remote; virtual collaboration via RingCentral (camera optional except for standups/meetings).

description:

You'll shadow an experienced tea
mber before starting

mbers earn bonuses, extra hours, vacation pay, and access to promotion opportunities.

title: Amazon SEO Manager
description:
We are a fast-growing greeting card brand. We help people create real connection

through beautifully made, responsibly produced cards crafted with care.



We are hiring an Amazon SEO Expert to build a stronger, more systematic Amazon search

presence, so every listing is easier to find, every keyword opportunity is worked properly,

and every product has a better chance to rank.



This is an ownership role. We run lean, move fast, and collaborate long term. We do not

micromanage. We expect you to own outcomes, not just complete tasks.



Why This Role Exists



Our products are already winning. What is missing is a consistent SEO system that scales.



Right now, keyword research, ranking analysis, listing optimization, and search

performance tracking are not a disciplined weekly process.



That slows listing

improvements, ranking gains, and learnings across the catalog.



We are hiring this role to own Amazon SEO end to end, so listings improve every week

based on real search data, not guesswork.



What You Will Be Responsible For



You will own Amazon SEO performance. You should be comfortable working inside

Amazon Brand Analytics and tools such as Helium 10, Data Dive, or equivalent. The goal

is to identify opportunities, prioritize actions, and improve rankings over time.



You will own:



• Keyword strategy: build and maintain a clear keyword strategy, track keyword

movement by using Amazon SQP data, competitor research, and third party tools

• Listing optimization: improve titles, bullets, descriptions, flat files, backend search

terms, and SEO keyword coverage structure without keyword stuffing

• Ranking improvement: focus on increasing visibility, indexing and organic rank

across priority search terms, use structured testing and learning to improve

listings over time.



What Strong Performance Looks Like



• Listings have a clear keyword map

• Rankings improve for relevant terms over time

• Listing updates happen consistently, not occasionally

• Reporting is clear, concise, and tied to business outcomes



Who This Role Is NOT For



• Someone looking for a side project or unstable availability

• Someone managing too many brands or clients at the same time

• Someone who only knows copywriting but not Amazon search data

• Someone who needs daily direction or constant check-ins



What We Expect From You



• Ownership and accountability for outcomes, not tasks

• Strong judgment on which keywords matter and where they belong

• A test, learn, improve mindset with comfort using data

• Ability to work independently with structure and good prioritization



To Apply Please Send



• Your CV

• One example of an Amazon listing or ASIN you helped improve, with a short

explanation of what changed and why

• One example of how you used Amazon search data (Brand Analytics or SQP) to

make a decision.

• Include the word search in the first line of your application so we know you read

this carefully



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be considered.

title: Video & Image Editor (Part-Time - Ecomm Paid Ads Focus)
description:
Hours: 5h/week (~20h/month)

Location: Remote 

Rate: PHP 250 / hour, paid monthly

Start: Immediate



About Lush Protein

Lush Protein is a clean-formulation sports nutrition brand based in Singapore. We sell protein, collagen, and supplements across Singapore, Malaysia, Hong Kong, and Australia. Our positioning is simple: no fillers, no fluff - just clean products that work.



We're a lean operation and we move fast. We need someone who can take raw footage and photos and turn them into polished assets that perform, primarily for paid Meta ads 
/Instagram).



What You'll Be Doing

 • Editing short-form video clips (15–30 sec) into paid ad creatives for Meta

 • Adding captions, text overlays, motion graphics, and product callouts

 • Basic colour grading and audio sync

 • Resizing and reformatting assets for different placements (Stories, Feed, Reels: 1:1, 9:16, 16:9)

 • Light retouching of product photos when needed

 • Organising and labelling deliverables clearly for easy version tracking



Expected Output

At 5h/week (20h/month), the expected deliverable target is:



Creatives/month

~16 video ad creatives per month (4 per week average)

Time per creative (approx)

~70 min (edit + format variants + 1 revision round)

Turnaround

2–3 business days per brief

Revision rounds

1 round included per asset



What We're Looking For

 • Strong portfolio of short-form video edits — paid social ad examples are a big plus

 • Understands hook-first structure: the first 3 seconds must stop the scroll

 • Comfortable with text overlays, captions, and simple motion graphics

 • Has worked with a product brand before (supplements, food/bev, lifestyle, or beauty all count)

 • Fast turnaround — briefs will be clear, we need clean delivery within agreed timelines

 • Clear communicator in English — briefs are in English, flag questions early

 • Self-directed: you follow a brief and deliver without hand-holding



Tools: Premiere Pro, CapCut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve. Photoshop or Canva. Tell us what you use.



What This Is Not

 • This is not a purely aesthetic/lifestyle role — we care about performance. Edits must be built around clear hooks, readable overlays, and strong CTAs

 • This is not a one-off project — we want someone to grow with us as we scale hours and shoot frequency



To Apply

Please send the following — applications without portfolio examples will not be reviewed:



 • 2–3 examples of paid ad or short-form video edits you've done (links or files)

 • One example of a product brand you've worked with and what you edited for them

 • Tools you use for editing and static asset creation

 • Your hourly rate in PHP

 • One sentence on why the first 3 seconds of a video ad matter

title: Real Estate CRM & Operations Manager
description:
Operations Manager * YOU MUST SPEAK FLUENT ENGLISH *

Virtual AI Real Estate Company

Position Summary



The Operations Manager is the control center of the company.



This role is responsible for making sure the business runs cleanly, consistently, and on time every day. The Operations Manager oversees CRM organization, workflow execution, team accountability, KPI reporting, and internal handoffs so that no lead, contract, or task falls through the cracks.



This is a remote leadership and execution role inside a virtual AI-driven real estate company. The Operations Manager works closely with the Lead Manager, Acquisitions Manager, Dispositions Manager, and TC/Admin to keep the machine running correctly.



The Operations Manager is not the main closer and is not the transaction coordinator. This person owns the process, the structure, and the accountability behind the process.



Key Responsibilities

1. CRM and Pipeline Management

- Maintain a clean and accurate FreedomSoft CRM

- Monitor statuses, groups, tasks, notes, and required fields

- Make sure leads move through the correct workflow stages

- Audit stale leads, stale contracts, and stuck files

- Ensure team members update records correctly and consistently



2. Workflow and Automation Oversight

- Oversee workflow automations tied to statuses and campaigns

- Monitor AI first-response, nurture, reactivation, and follow-up systems

- Ensure missed-call response and speed-to-lead systems are functioning properly

- Identify and resolve workflow gaps, broken automations, and process failures

- Coordinate campaign setup and execution across channels



3. Team Accountability and Daily Execution

- Lead or support daily Zoom huddles and team check-ins

- Keep team members aligned on priorities and next actions

- Ensure real-time availability and responsiveness during shifts

- Monitor task completion and escalate delays quickly

- Support a high-accountability, KPI-driven remote team culture



4. Handoff Management

- Verify signed contracts are complete and accurate before handoff

- Coordinate clean handoffs between:

- Lead Manager and Acquisitions

- Acquisitions and Operations

- Operations and TC/Admin

- Operations and Dispositions

- Prevent breakdowns between departments

- Ensure every file has a next owner and a next action



5. KPI Reporting and Performance Tracking

- Track and report daily, weekly, and monthly KPIs

- Monitor lead flow, response handling, offer activity, contracts, dispo progress, and closings

- Surface bottlenecks, stale files, and missed actions quickly

- Maintain scoreboards for each department

- Provide leadership with accurate visibility into business performance



6. Contract-to-Close Oversight

- Monitor the movement of signed contracts through title, dispo, and closing

- Ensure title is opened on time

- Ensure buyer-side movement is visible on wholesale deals

- Track clear-to-close and funded files

- Support smooth closing execution by maintaining visibility and accountability



7. Compliance and Process Control

- Ensure Do Not Contact and suppression rules are followed

- Monitor outreach stop rules, direct mail stop rules, and stale task cleanup

- Maintain process discipline throughout the CRM

- Help protect the company from internal sloppiness and missed follow-up



The Operations Manager is expected to create:

- a clean CRM

- accurate workflows

- strong internal communication

- fast and clean handoffs

- accurate reporting

- fewer missed leads

- fewer stale deals

- fewer process errors

- better team accountability

_____________________________________________________________

** Please apply as soon as possible!!!

** We are trying to fill these positions ASAP!

title: Content & Podcast VA (April 2025 + Long Term)
description:
This role starts as a one-month paid project. We want to work with you before committing to anything long-term — and we think that's fair for both sides. If the work is strong, communication is clear, and we're aligned on how we operate, we'll move to a permanent ongoing arrangement from month two. We're not looking for someone to try out and move on — we're looking for the right person to grow with us.



We need a reliable, detail-oriented VA to own our content distribution and light podcast editing. You'll work directly with our Growth Operations lead and be responsible for keeping our social channels active and our podcast pipeline running every week. Content direction and topics come from us — your job is to execute them precisely, consistently, and on time.



-What you'll do each week

Monday — batch schedule the full week of social content: write captions from brief, research hashtags, and queue all posts for the following week in one session (podcasts, podcast shorts and content from video editor)

Tuesday — edit video podcast episode 1: trim, cuts, dead air removal, basic audio levelling, export, write show notes, upload and distribute to platforms

Wednesday — edit video podcast episode 2 following the same process, plus create 3 short-form clip from each episode

Thursday — repurpose podcast content into social posts and create podcast thumbnails, pull the weekly performance report, send summary to your manager

Friday — file management, labelling, action any revision requests, prepare brief for following Monday



-Tech stack

You'll be working across these tools daily — experience with all of them is strongly preferred:



Riverside — podcast recording and editing platform. All raw episode files will be provided here.

Buffer — social media scheduling. You'll use this to write, schedule, and queue all social content for the week

Canva — graphic and short-form content creation. Used for audiograms, social graphics, and clip overlays

Slack — primary communication tool. All briefs, feedback, and updates from your manager come through Slack. You're expected to be responsive during AWST hours.





What we're looking for

•Demonstrated experience managing social media accounts — links to accounts you currently or previously managed are required with your application

•Comfortable with light audio and podcast editing — a sample of previous work is required with your application

•Hands-on experience with Buffer, Canva, and Slack — state your experience level with each in your application

•Familiarity with Riverside is a strong advantage — if you haven't used it, tell us what podcast editing tools you have used

•Strong written English — you'll be writing captions and show notes that represent our brand publicly

•Proactive communicator — if something is unclear or delayed, we expect to hear from you before it becomes a problem

•Available to work AWST (Perth, Western Australia) business hours

•Reliable internet connection and your own equipment



-What we offer

Start: One-month paid project — invoiced fortnightly at $132 USD per fortnight

Rate: $5.50 USD/hour

Hours: 12 hours per week

Monthly total: $264 USD

After month one: Permanent ongoing arrangement for the right person





-To apply

Send your application with links to social accounts you currently manage, one audio or podcast editing sample, your available hours in AWST, and confirmation that $5.50 USD/hr works for you. 

-Applications without samples will not be considered.

title: Creative Strategist & Direct Response Video Editor
description:
I run a digital product brand in the wedding planning space. Our customers are engaged couples and we sell a spreadsheet-based planner that helps them organize every aspect of their wedding.



We need someone who can help us figure out what content to make and then actually make it.



This is not a role where you only wait to be told what to do. We want someone who watches content, notices trends, brings references, proposes ideas, and then executes them. The editing part matters, but the thinking part matters just as much.



What you'll actually be doing:



> Researching trends and references on TikTok, Instagram and Meta to find angles and formats worth testing

> Sourcing supporting clips, trending audio and visual hooks independently as part of your research process

> Proposing video ideas with a clear hook and concept before touching the timeline

> Editing short-form video ads (10 to 60 seconds) using raw UGC clips and b-roll, product-specific material is provided by us

> Adding captions, text overlays, music and sound design that fit the platform

> We want to move fast and test a high volume of creatives. Quality and speed are both expected, not one at the expense of the other.



The videos are not complex productions. No fancy motion graphics, no studio shoots. Clean, fast, native-feeling content that stops the scroll in the first two seconds.



What we need from you:



> Good English

> Real experience editing short-form video content, with a portfolio to back it up

> A genuine understanding of what makes an ad perform, not just what looks good

> The ability to work independently, manage your own time and flag problems early rather than go quiet

> Willingness to learn our product properly, it has real depth and the content only works if you understand what you're selling

> Comfort using AI tools as part of your daily workflow



What this is not:



> You will not be managing social media accounts

> You will not be running or optimizing ad campaigns

> You will not be contacting or managing creators



To apply, send us:



1. Your Portfolio

2. A short paragraph about yourself and why this specific role makes sense for you right now

3. A calendly or zoom link where I can schedule a call

title: Social Media Director
description:
Job Description: Social Media Director

Integrative Medicine & Chiropractic Clinics



Position Overview:

We are seeking a dynamic and experienced Social Media Director to take full ownership of the digital assets for integrative medicine and chiropractic clinics (2 brands you will manage):



(1) Chiropractic Clinic:  Andover Injury Center [Andover, MA]

(2) Integrative Medicine Clinic: St Jean Wellness [virtual specialty anxiety clinic]



The ideal candidate will be fluent in English (speaking, reading, and writing) and possess a proven track record in growing social media accounts, increasing engagement, and converting followers into loyal, paying patients. This position is ideal for a highly motivated individual who thrives in a fast-paced, results-driven environment.  The candidate must be proficient using AI for posting, editing, analytics and planning (Social Pilot, GHL, Capcut, etc.).  Each business will maintain 4 social accounts: instagram,
, youtube and tiktok.  



Key Responsibilities:



(1) Content Strategy & Creation:



Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy tailored to
, Instagram, YouTube and Tiktok. Assist doctor with creation of compelling, high-quality content including posts, videos, blogs, and stories that reflect the brand's values and mission. Work with CEO, Dr. David St Jean to provide high quality, professional posting that avoids cookie-cutter stock image posting. Edit videos to create engaging reels, shorts, and long-form video content.



(2) Account Growth & Engagement:



Analyze social media trends and implement strategies to rapidly grow accounts with the following goals:

(1) Andover Injury Center: over 50,000 followers within six months.

(2) St Jean Wellness: over 100,000 followers within six months



Drive increased likes, comments, shares, and overall engagement through creative and impactful content. Foster relationships with followers to convert views into scheduled appointments and paying patients.



(3) Scheduling & Consistency:



Use social media management tools to schedule posts and ensure consistent content delivery across platforms. Manage a content calendar to align with clinic goals, promotions, and campaigns.



(4) Analytics & Reporting:



Track and analyze key performance metrics (follower growth, engagement, click-through rates, and conversions).

Provide detailed monthly reports on social media performance and ROI.



(5) Blog Writing:



Collaborate with Dr. St Jean to create engaging, SEO-optimized blogs to drive traffic and establish the clinics as leaders in integrative medicine and chiropractic care.



(6) Collaboration:



Work closely with marketing and clinical teams to align content with overarching business goals and campaigns. Maintain consistent communication to ensure messaging reflects clinic updates and priorities.



Qualifications:



Fluent in English (speaking, reading, and writing). Proven experience managing and growing social media accounts with a focus on
, Instagram, YouTube & Instagram. Expertise in video editing and content creation tools (Canva). Exceptional writing skills for social posts and blogs. Strong understanding of social media analytics and conversion optimization. Ability to work independently, meet deadlines, and adapt strategies based on performance.



Goals:



Grow all social media accounts as instructed above. Consistently increase engagement rates across platforms. Drive measurable conversions from social media content to paid appointments.



Compensation:

Competitive and commensurate with experience, with potential performance bonuses based on achieving follower growth and conversion goals. As followers, engagement and growth increases, so does your salary. Opportunities for full time options with doctor-level Phillipines salaries will be awarded to the candidate who performs at the highest level and exceeds expectations.



Join our team and play a pivotal role in transforming our social media presence into a powerful tool for patient acquisition and brand growth!



Bonuses:



Bonus payouts will be made based on the following monthly results.  This is how you can easily work 20 hours/wk and earn doctor or executive money in your country.



(1) Andover Injury Center: 

- 10,000 followers [$50/month]

The ideal candidate or team will have:



A proven track record producing successful faceless or narration-based YouTube content

Strong knowledge of YouTube community guidelines, copyright rules, and fair use policies

Advanced editing skills and access to licensed stock footage platforms

Experience using VidIQ or TubeBuddy for optimization

The ability to consistently produce monetization-compliant videos





We want to work with you if:



You have experience creating bingeable, high-retention YouTube content

You understand pacing, transitions, and engagement mechanics that keep viewers watching

You thrive under deadlines and deliver consistently without excessive revisions

You are organized, communicative, and have reliable turnaround times

You can deliver assets via Google Drive, Monday.com, or Trello

You have a sense of humor and can bring personality to the content





Video Requirements:



Workflow: 10-second hook intro ? channel intro ? subscribe/IG call-to-action overlays ? engaging body content ? channel end screen

Content edited in a fun, entertaining style with strong pacing and humor where appropriate

Copyright-free sound effects and background music added tastefully throughout

Source and use only copyright-free or properly licensed footage (stock footage access required)

Edit in a high-retention style with CTR and watch time in mind

1080p HD minimum; use of lower-thirds, text overlays, and transitions where applicable

Professional software only: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro





Why work with us:



Build your portfolio with a consistent stream of professional, varied content

High standards mean real skill development — you'll grow quickly

Fully remote — work from anywhere, as long as you're reachable

No cap on volume — there is plenty of work available

We recognize quality and reward it; internal growth opportunities available

Performance bonuses and incentives for proven results

Respond with 'Pineapple' if you have read all this



Job Details:



7 videos per week

Minimum 20 minutes per video



To apply: Please submit your current portfolio and/or sample videos for review.  Priority will be given to applicants whose work best reflects the requirements above. Also show us a screenshot from one of your last worked on projects in the editing software.

title: Revenue Cycle Director / Manager
description:
Commitment: Part-Time (10 hours/week to start) | Remote



Position Overview



We are seeking a high-level Revenue Cycle Director to oversee an end-to-end financial lifecycle powered by proprietary AI technology. This is a strategic leadership role designed for a professional who moves beyond the manual tasks of a "biller" (claim submission/payment posting) to architect a high-performance financial ecosystem.



As the primary "Human-in-the-Loop" (HITL) authority, you will define the operational logic and safety constraints that govern our AI-driven billing platform. Your objective is to move from transactional data entry into high-level denial prevention, strategic payer contracting, and systemic bottleneck resolution.



Core Responsibilities



AI Governance & HITL Logic: Establish and fine-tune the "confidence thresholds" at which the AI platform is authorized to process claims autonomously versus routing them for manual expert review.



Systemic Denial Mitigation: Utilize AI-generated analytics to identify recurring denial patterns; implement proactive operational changes to reduce Days in AR and improve Clean Claim Rates (CCR).



Payer Strategy: Lead contract negotiations, evaluate fee schedules, and monitor payer performance to ensure maximum reimbursement and compliance.



Feedback Loop Management: Actively monitor AI performance metrics, providing the expertise required to improve the system’s coding accuracy and payer-specific logic.



Required Qualifications



Experience: Minimum of 2 years of progressive experience in end-to-end Medical Revenue Cycle Management (RCM).



Technical Proficiency: Deep mastery of CPT, HCPCS, and ICD-10 coding; extensive experience with clearinghouse portals and EHR/Practice Management software.



Analytical Capability: Proven track record of using data (KPIs, AR Aging, and Denial reports) to drive financial strategy.



AI Literacy: Comfort collaborating with automated systems and an interest in fine-tuning machine-driven workflows.



Preferred Qualifications



Certifications: Current CPC (Certified Professional Coder) or CHBME (Certified Healthcare Billing & Management Executive) designation.



Strategic Impact: Demonstrated success in payer contract renegotiations that resulted in measurable increases in net collection rates.



Automation Experience: Prior experience implementing automated workflows or AI/Machine Learning tools within a healthcare financial context.



Why Apply?



This is a unique opportunity to shape the future of medical billing without being bogged down by manual entry. You will define how AI interacts with medical finance, directly impacting the efficiency and profitability of healthcare providers.

title: Sales Manager - (Leadership Team) Urgent Hiring
description:
Take the next step in your professional journey!



Apply today through our official careers page: 



Department: Sales and Marketing

Reports To: Sales Department

Employment Type: Full-Time

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: U.S. Business Hours (Graveyard Shift – PH Time)

Compensation: Competitive compensation package, commensurate with experience and leadership role alignment



Role Overview

The Sales Manager at Ascension Business Solutions is responsible for driving qualified revenue growth while protecting client quality and long-term retention.



This role goes beyond closing deals — it ensures that every client onboarded is properly qualified, aligned with ABS capabilities, and set up for long-term success.



The Sales Manager owns the entire revenue engine, including:

- Lead qualification and conversion

- Sales process optimization

- Client expectation setting

- Feedback loop into Operations, Training, and Client Success

-This role plays a critical part in ensuring that what is sold is deliverable, scalable, and aligned with ABS standards.



Strategic Responsibility

The Sales Manager is accountable for:



-Revenue growth with quality control

-Reducing client churn caused by misalignment

-Improving conversion through better qualification and positioning

-Aligning Sales with Operations, Training, and Client Success



Key Responsibilities



1. Revenue Ownership & Sales Execution

- Own and drive the full sales cycle: lead generation ? qualification ? demo ? close ? handoff

- Achieve and exceed monthly and quarterly revenue targets

- Ensure every deal closed meets ABS qualification and readiness standards

- Maintain strong pipeline health and forecast accuracy



2. Client Qualification & Expectation Setting (CRITICAL)

- Enforce strict client qualification based on ABS Sales Manifesto

- Identify red flags early (unrealistic expectations, budget misalignment, lack of process)



Set clear expectations on:

- Scope of services

- VA capabilities vs client responsibilities

- Required client-side training and involvement

- Avoid overpromising (especially around software experience or performance guarantees)



3. Sales Process Optimization



Continuously improve:

- Demo structure

- Closing questions

- Follow-up sequences

- Objection handling frameworks



Track and analyze:

- Conversion rates per stage

- Sales cycle duration

- Drop-off points in pipeline

- Implement improvements based on data and team feedback



4. Client Quality & Feedback Loop



Gather insights from:

- Lost deals

- Client objections

- Early-stage client issues



Work closely with:

- Operations (handoff quality)

- Training (VA readiness gaps)

- Client Success (client satisfaction & retention)



Identify patterns that affect:

- Client satisfaction

- Retention

- Service delivery quality



???? This is where your role becomes strategic, not transactional



5. Cross-Department Alignment



Collaborate with:

- Operations ? ensure readiness and smooth onboarding

- Training ? align client expectations with VA capability

- Client Success ? reduce early churn and escalations

- Ensure seamless transition from Sale ? Onboarding ? Delivery



6. Lead Generation & Market Development



Drive outbound and inbound strategies:

- Networking

- Referrals

- Strategic partnerships

- Events and conferences



Work with Marketing to:

- Improve messaging

- Leverage testimonials and case studies

- Strengthen pre-demo and post-demo assets



7. CRM & Reporting Discipline

- Maintain accurate CRM records (pipeline, activities, client notes)

- Track and report:

- Pipeline value and movement

- Conversion metrics

- Revenue forecasts

- Use data to guide decisions and improvements



8. Client Relationship Development

- Build strong relationships with prospects and clients

- Support upsell and expansion opportunities

- Ensure clients feel supported from pre-sale through onboarding



Key Competencies



- Takes full accountability for revenue performance and outcomes

- Understands how sales decisions impact operations, training, and retention

- Can say “no” to bad-fit clients

- Protects the business from misaligned deals

- Strong ability to set expectations and control conversations

- Uses metrics to improve performance, not guesswork

- Works effectively across departments to improve outcomes



What Success Looks Like in This Role



- High conversion rates without compromising client quality

- Reduced early-stage client churn

- Strong alignment between Sales ? Operations ? Client Success

- Clear, consistent, and scalable sales process

- Improved client satisfaction and retention



This is an urgent hiring need.



Ascension Business Solutions is prioritizing this role due to active onboarding demands and leadership support requirements.



Qualified candidates who complete all application and assessment steps promptly may be contacted and processed on an accelerated timeline.



Qualifications:

- 1 to 2+ years of experience in B2B sales, managing the full sales cycle (lead generation, close, and handoff)

- Experience in client-facing roles (calls, demos, presentations, and negotiations)

- Experience with client qualification and needs assessment

- Ability to set clear expectations and avoid overpromising

- Experience handling objections, and closing complex deals

- Familiarity with CRM systems (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) is a plus

- Experience tracking and improving: Conversion rates, and Sales cycle performance

- Strong experience in remote work environments and virtual communication

- Ability to work U.S. business hours (night shift PH time)



Compensation & Benefits:



Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.



- Competitive compensation aligned with the leadership role scope

- Paid training and structured onboarding

- Fully remote work setup, including company-issued laptop and noise-canceling headset

- HMO health coverage (subject to eligibility guidelines)

- Paid Time Off (PTO)

- Performance-based annual salary increases

- Additional bonuses are available after 6 months of tenure



ABS is intentional about building long-term professional partnerships, not short-term or gig-based arrangements.



Why Join Ascension Business Solutions?



- Shape the quality and readiness of ABS’s global VA workforce

- Work directly with Leadership and cross-functional teams

- Operate within clear systems, standards, and escalation frameworks

- Join a values-driven organization guided by Love, Support, and Excellence



Disclaimer: Responsibilities may evolve based on business needs. Employment is at-will.



How to Apply:



Apply today through our official careers page: 



Complete the Application Form and include the following:

- Vocaroo introduction link

- Updated resume

- Device specifications screenshot

- Internet speed test result



??This role is urgent. Early and complete applications will be prioritized. Incomplete applications may not be processed.

title: AI Agent Specialist
description:
About Us



We're a fast-moving, heart-led brand that helps women regulate their nervous systems, heal triggers, and return to their truth.



Our business is transformational and built with soul. We blend structure with spirituality. Systems with sacredness. This is more than a job — it's a mission.



We are a "culture first, achievement second" company. That means who you are matters as much as what you can do. We build with people who are aligned, intentional, and genuinely care about the work they put into the world.



---



Who We're Looking For:



We're looking for a detail-obsessed AI specialist who lives and breathes large language models — someone who gets genuinely excited about squeezing every last drop of performance out of a well-crafted prompt.



You'll be working directly with us to improve, refine, and expand an existing custom GPT, then mirror and adapt that same experience to run on Claude AI. This isn't a "set it and forget it" role — we're co-creating something together, and we want a partner who cares as much about the outcome as we do.



If you're the kind of person who tests obsessively, communicates with care, and takes pride in craft — you'll fit right in here.



---



What You'll Do



- Look at our company as a whole and assist us and integrating AI into our Team and processes to help us free up time creativity and space to support our customer more

- Audit & improve our existing custom GPT — identify gaps, inconsistencies, and opportunities to sharpen its performance

- Translate & rebuild the GPT's behavior, tone, and logic to operate natively and effectively within the Claude AI ecosystem

- Align outputs to our company voice and the specific goals of this role — every response should feel intentional and on-brand

- Rigorously self-test before delivering anything to us — we expect you to surface problems before we do

- Collaborate closely with our team to iterate, refine, and push toward the best possible product for our customers



---



What We're Looking For:



- Cares about user safety & experience

- Deep, hands-on fluency with both OpenAI (GPT) and Anthropic (Claude) platforms — not just familiarity, genuine expertise

- Strong understanding of prompt architecture, system instructions, persona design, and output conditioning

- An eye for quality — you know what "good" looks like and you won't ship something you're not proud of

- Clear communicator who can explain their decisions and invite feedback

- Self-directed and proactive — you bring ideas, not just execution



Bonus Points:



- Experience building AI tools for customer-facing applications

- Familiarity with tools like the OpenAI Playground, Anthropic Console, or similar environments

- Background in coaching, personal development, or adjacent spaces — you understand the depth of the work we do



---



How We Work



We believe the best products are built together. We want someone who's invested in the outcome, asks good questions, and helps us think beyond what we originally imagined.



If that sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you.



HOW TO APPLY:



Please include the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1. A brief intro — who you are and what excites you most in AI right now

2. 2–3 examples of Custom GPTs, Claude assistants, AI agents, or automations you have actually built (links, screenshots, or descriptions)

3. Your answer to: "Walk me through how you would test a custom GPT or AI agent before it goes live to real users."

4. Which tools you use most confidently and which you'd want to learn



Thank you!

, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)

Compensation

$4–$5 per hour

Flexible schedule (preferred some overlap with U.S. time zones)

title: Virtual Assistance VA Cold Caller - Real Estate
description:
REAL ESTATE COLD CALLER — VIRTUAL ASSISTANT

Full-Time | Remote | Philippines-Based | Pacific Standard Time Overlap Required



ABOUT US

We are a real estate wholesaling company based in Washington State, Pacific Northwest. We find off-market properties by connecting directly with homeowners who may be ready to sell. We do not list on the MLS — we find deals before anyone else does.

We are looking for a reliable, confident cold caller to contact homeowners from our targeted lead lists, qualify motivated sellers, and help us build our acquisition pipeline.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Make outbound calls daily using Enzo Dialer (training provided)

Follow our proven script to identify motivated sellers

Target lead types: absentee owners, pre-foreclosures, probate, tired landlords, high-equity owners

Ask qualifying questions: property condition, timeline, motivation, price expectations

Log every call outcome accurately in CRM as you go — not at end of day

Flag hot leads to the acquisitions manager immediately via agreed channel

Attend a brief weekly check-in call (30 minutes, Fridays)

Send a written end-of-day summary every working day

Meet daily and weekly call volume and contact rate targets





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Must Have:



1 to 3 years of verified cold calling experience — real estate, wholesaling, or high-volume outbound sales preferred

Documented track record on OnlineJobs.ph — strong ratings and verifiable reviews from past employers required

Clear, confident spoken English — neutral or light accent

Strong active listening skills

Reliable internet connection and quality headset

Disciplined about following scripts and logging data consistently

Responsive during working hours

Treats this like a full-time job — shows up every day, on time, without being chased



Nice to Have:



Experience with auto-dialers (Enzo, Mojo, or similar)

Familiarity with CRM

Real estate knowledge (not required — we will train you)





SCHEDULE AND COMPENSATION



Hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00am–5:00pm PST with a one-hour unpaid lunch break (taken at 12:00pm or 1:00pm). Minimum 4-hour PST overlap required.

Pay: $3–$5/hour base depending on verified experience

Performance bonus available for leads that convert to closed deals





HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, your application must include all four of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed.



A voice recording (60–90 seconds) — introduce yourself and tell us why you want this role

Your available hours in Pacific Standard Time

Your requested hourly rate

Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link showing verifiable ratings and reviews from past employers — minimum 1 year of cold calling experience required





One note before you apply: This role requires consistent daily execution — script adherence, accurate CRM logging, and proactive communication every single day. If you are looking for flexible or casual work, this is not the right fit. If you are looking for a stable long-term role where reliability is rewarded, we want to hear from you.
