title: AI Video Creative — Supplement Brand (Remote)
description:
Category: Advertising / Marketing / Video Production

Location: Remote / Work from Home



---



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We're not looking for someone who learned AI video tools last month.



We're looking for a creative — someone with a real background in advertising and video production — who has been obsessively following AI video since the tools first came out, experimenting constantly, and producing work that genuinely surprises people.



If you've been quietly building a body of AI-generated video work that looks real, converts, and pushes what these tools can do — we want to talk to you.



---



THE BRAND



Deep Blue Health (
) has been making pharmaceutical-grade marine supplements in New Zealand since 2004. Our ingredients come from New Zealand waters, farms, and wilderness — Green Lipped Mussel, Marine Collagen, Deer Velvet, Colostrum, Sea Cucumber. Made here. Tested here. Shipped direct to customers across NZ and Australia.



That origin story is powerful. We haven't told it properly yet. That's what this role is about.



---



THE WORK



You'll produce video ads for Meta 
/Instagram) — short-form, 15–30 seconds, built to convert.



The creative territory is wide open:



- The NZ sourcing story — showing where these ingredients actually come from. NZ coastline, high country, farms at dawn. The process from source to product. This is rare, real, and almost impossible to shoot affordably. AI makes it possible.

- Human UGC — real-feeling people, real-feeling testimonials. Not polished. Not stock. The kind of video that makes someone stop scrolling because it feels authentic. These need to look like they were filmed on a phone by a real customer, not generated.

- Product in environment — supplements in the context of the life they support. Active, real, New Zealand. Not a white studio background.

- Creative experiments — we want someone who brings ideas we haven't thought of. Different formats, unexpected angles, things that haven't been done in the supplement space yet.



You won't be given a template and told to fill it in. You'll be given a brief with the product, the angle, and the target feeling — and we want you to bring the creative vision.



---



TOOLS



We're looking for someone experienced with:



- Higgsfield AI — character consistency, human motion

- NanoBanana Pro — high-quality video generation

- Kling 3 — realistic scene generation

- Seedance 2 — AI video with strong motion quality



Strong in 2–3 of these is fine. What matters is that you know what each tool is best at and you've been using them long enough to know their limits — and how to push past them.



Video editing, captioning, and Meta ad formatting (1:1, 4:5, 9:16) are expected skills.



---



WHAT WE CARE ABOUT



- Your portfolio. We want to see the best AI video work you've produced. Links only — if we can't watch it, it doesn't count.

- Your instinct for advertising. Do you understand why certain hooks work? Can you write copy that converts? Creative talent without commercial thinking isn't what we need.

- Your ambition with the tools. We want someone who is actively experimenting, not someone who has settled into a workflow.

- Quality over quantity. We'd rather have one video that genuinely looks real than five that look AI-generated.



---



THE ROLE



- Part-time to start: 10–15 hours/week, scope grows with results

- Fully remote, flexible hours

- Direct working relationship with the marketing lead — fast briefs, fast feedback

- If your work converts, we scale fast



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send us:



1. Your 3 best AI-generated video ads — links, not attachments

2. Which tools you used for each and what made them work

3. One idea you'd want to try for a New Zealand marine supplement brand



No portfolio = no response.



State your rate in your application. We pay for talent.

title: VA Admin Support
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.





How to apply: Please click on the link: 
/work-opportunities/administration-agent

title: Video Editor + Motion Graphics | Cinematic YouTube Documentaries | DaVinci Resolve
description:
** Apply using this Typeform Link to Apply: 
 **



Job Title: Video Editor + Motion Graphics | Cinematic YouTube Documentaries | DaVinci Resolve

Compensation: Starting at US$8 per finished minute. Videos average 15-20 minutes. Expected volume: 4-8 videos per month, more as we grow. Rates revised based on consistency, on-time delivery, and quality.



Job Type: Freelance / Per-Project



Who We Are:

Action Media Ventures (AMV) is a Singapore-based company focused on education, media, and AI. We're launching a YouTube documentary channel covering geopolitics, economics, and the hidden forces that shape nations.

Our visual style is cinematic. Think RealLifeLore meets PolyMatter meets Magnates Media, targeting premium level production quality. We use AI-generated footage, archival material, Google Earth sequences, motion graphics, and deliberate color grading to build documentaries that feel like they belong on a streaming platform.

We're new to YouTube. But we're building this with the structure and discipline of a real production company. Our goal is to publish 1-2 high-quality documentary videos per week and reach 200K subscribers within the first year.

This is a faceless documentary channel. There is no talking head. The editing IS the content.** That makes this the most important hire we make.



What We Provide:

For every video, we deliver a complete asset package:

- Voiceover audio (fully recorded, cleaned, and leveled)

- All video clips (AI-generated cinematic footage, organized and clearly named)

- A detailed shot sheet with clip-to-voiceover assembly order, transition notes, and pacing direction

- Music tracks (selected and licensed)

- Text card copy (exact wording, placement, and font direction)

- Color grading direction and reference material

You are not sourcing footage, writing scripts, or choosing music. Your job is to take a carefully planned vision and make it real through editing, pacing, color, and motion graphics.



What You'll Do:

- Timeline assembly. Build the edit from the shot sheet. Match clips to voiceover precisely. Nail the pacing.

- Color grading: Apply and refine grades in DaVinci Resolve. Each video has a deliberate palette that shifts across chapters.

- Motion graphics: Text cards, data visualizations, lower thirds, animated maps, kinetic typography. Some from templates, some built or adapted. This is a core part of the role.

- Google Earth sequences:  Create or integrate Google Earth Studio footage where the shot sheet calls for geographic context.

- Transitions and polish: Ken Burns on stills, cross-dissolves at chapter boundaries, match cuts, and strategic use of silence.

- Export. Final 1080p at 23.976fps, H.264, plus the DaVinci Resolve project file. We'll progress to 4k soon.



Requirements:

- DaVinci Resolve proficiency. Free version is fine. (or willingness to switch)

- Motion graphics capability. Resolve Fusion or After Effects. Show us examples.

- Understanding of YouTube retention and pacing. You've watched channels like RealLifeLore, Magnates Media, or Johnny Harris and can explain what makes their editing work.

- Reliable 3 day turnaround. 

- Strong English communication. You need to understand nuanced direction like "the color grade should feel sterile, not cold."



Nice to Have:

- Google Earth Studio experience

- Sound design instincts

- Experience with non-Latin text (Korean, Chinese, etc.) in motion graphics

- Long-form documentary or essay editing experience (15-20 minute videos)

Starting rate is US$8 per finished minute

Depending on consistency, on-time delivery, and quality, rates will be revised upward. As the channel grows and revenue comes in, so does your compensation. We believe in raising rates before you have to ask.

Growing With AMV:

We're not hiring for a gig. We're hiring the first member of a production team. The right person starts as our editor and grows into a bigger role as we scale.



**Apply using this Typeform Link to apply:
salary: US$8 per finished minute of final video

title: AI Content Systems Specialist — Long-term Partner
description:
About us

We are an in-house brand portfolio operating 7 e-commerce brands with 30+ tea
mbers. Content is the backbone of everything we do — from AI-generated video sales letters (VSLs) to performance marketing assets. We are not an agency. All brands are ours, which means no client negotiations, just execution. We move fast, we think long-term, and we are ready to invest in replacing manual processes with intelligent systems across every brand we run.



The problem we need solved

Our current content production process is manual at every step. We prompt in Claude, generate frames, upload to Google AI Studio to review, pull motion prompts, upload to Google Video3, generate the clip, and check the output. Each step requires a human touch. It works — but it does not scale. We are looking for someone to audit what we have, identify what can be automated, and build a content engine that gets the process more automated — without sacrificing the output quality that makes our content look human.



What we are looking for:

- You have built AI content pipelines before — not just used the tools, but connected them into a working system

- You are hands-on with current AI video tools — Google VideoFX, HeyGen, Google AI Studio, or equivalent

- You understand e-commerce content — VSLs, performance creatives, and what makes content convert

- You stay current — the AI landscape shifts weekly and you are keeping up with it, not catching up

- You think in systems — audit, plan, build, document, and hand off so the team can run it without you



Scope & timeline

We start with one brand. Once the content engine is proven, it gets adapted and rolled out across all 7 brands. This is not a short-term project — we are building something we intend to rely on for years, and we expect it to evolve as AI evolves. If you are the right person, you become our go-to for anything content and AI. No jumping between specialists.

title: Marketing & Automation VA (Google Ads, n8n, Meta Ads)
description:
About the Company

Hometown Exteriors is a local residential roofing and exterior contractor with multiple product offerings.



You’ll be working directly with the owner (me) to implement and maintain our marketing and automation systems for core offers.



This is a long-term role for someone who likes clear systems, marketing, and automation.



Role Overview

I’m looking for a tech-savvy Marketing & Automation VA who can help me implement and maintain a full funnel:



Landing pages - Meta ads - Instant estimator / quote forms - n8n automations - Pipedrive - RingCentral SMS/phone - Slack - Google Sheets reporting.



You do not need to be a senior developer, but you must be comfortable inside tools like n8n, CRMs, and automation platforms, and able to follow and improve step?by?step SOPs.



Key Responsibilities

1. Landing Pages & Forms 

Help build and update landing pages (copy, images, sections).

Add and update lead capture forms (name,
, phone, address, notes, variant A/B).

Make sure forms are correctly connected to webhooks / back?end actions.



2. n8n Automations

Build and maintain workflows such as:

Form submission - n8n webhook - create Contact & Deal in Pipedrive.

New deal - send RingCentral SMS + send Slack notification.

No?response leads - follow?up
/SMS after X hours.

Daily/weekly sync of deal data into Google Sheets.

Handle basic JSON fields, mapping, and logic (IF conditions, filters, error checks).



3. CRM & Communication Tools

Set up and maintain Pipedrive fields, stages, and views for gutter leads (Variant A vs B, source, campaign, etc.).

Connect Pipedrive with Slack so stage changes (Appointment Set, Estimate Sent, Closed Won/Lost) trigger messages.

Assist with RingCentral SMS templates and making sure SMS are triggered from automations or via Pipedrive integrations.

Help organize and keep data clean (no duplicate contacts, correct phone/email, etc.).



4. Meta /
 Ads Support (Execution, not strategy)

Input ad copy, headlines, and hooks I provide into Meta Ads Manager.

Set up the correct campaign structure, ad sets, and ads (I will provide the plan).

Ensure correct URLs, UTMs, and pixel/conversion events are used.

Export performance data (CPL, CTR, etc.) and help update a tracking sheet.



5. Reporting & Documentation

Maintain a simple Google Sheet or dashboard showing: leads, appointments, jobs won, CPL, and CPA by variant and campaign.

Document workflows and update SOPs when we change or improve automations.

Must?Have Skills & Experience

Strong English reading and writing (you’ll work from written SOPs and write basic messages).



Hands-on experience with at least one of these: n8n, Make (Integromat), or Zapier.



Comfortable working with webhooks, mapping form fields, and basic JSON in an automation tool.



Experience working with a CRM (Pipedrive preferred, but HubSpot/GoHighLevel/Zoho etc. is OK if you’re willing to learn Pipedrive).



Very organized and detail-oriented – you double-check that fields, links, and automations are correct before we go live.



Able to learn new tools from documentation and video tutorials.



Nice-to-Have (Bonus) Skills

Experience specifically with Pipedrive.



Experience with n8n (or deep experience with Make/Zapier and ready to move into n8n).



Basic understanding of Meta/Facebook Ads setup.



Basic HTML/CSS understanding.



Experience in home services, real estate, or other local lead?gen businesses.



Tools We Use

Landing Pages: 
v

Automation: n8n (central hub)

CRM: Pipedrive

Phone & SMS: RingCentral

Internal Communication: Slack

: Gmail / Google Workspace

Ads: Meta 
/Instagram)

Reporting: Google Sheets



You don’t need to be an expert in all of these on day one, but you must be confident learning and using them daily.



Work Schedule & Hours

40 hours per week.



Must be available for at least 2–3 hours overlap with US Eastern time on weekdays for quick check-ins.



Long-term role – I want someone who wants to stay, grow with the systems, and take on more responsibility.



Salary & Benefits

Competitive starting salary based on experience (please include your desired monthly salary in USD).



Performance-based increases as we improve the funnel and close more jobs.



Stable, long-term work with clear systems and clear expectations.



How to Apply

Please reply with ALL of the following:



Subject line:

Marketing & Automation VA – [Your Name]



A short introduction:



Who you are



Your experience with automation tools (n8n / Make / Zapier)



Your experience with any CRM (Pipedrive, GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.)



A short description (3–5 sentences) of one automation you have built before.



What tools you used



What the trigger was



What steps happened automatically



Screen recording of similar projects you've completed.



Your internet speed test link (e.g., speedtest.net).



Your expected monthly salary (USD) for full-time (40 hours/week).



Only applicants who follow all the instructions will be considered. I read every application and will invite shortlisted candidates to a paid test task where we build a simple workflow together (Lovable - n8n - Pipedrive).

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a Digital Media Manager to support both social media operations and website oversight. This role will split time between managing day-to-day content execution and coordinating with external website vendors to ensure smooth performance and updates.

This is a hands-on execution and coordination role. You will not be coding or building websites, but you will be responsible for making sure everything runs properly, stays updated, and aligns with business goals.

, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)

3. Content Strategy & AI Optimization (Improves)

• Aligns all content with marketing priorities and business objectives 

 

4. Website Oversight (Accountable)

• Owns relationship with third-party website vendors 

• Ensures all updates, fixes, and improvements are completed accurately and on time 

• Tracks all requests and holds vendors accountable to deadlines 

• Monitors website performance, uptime, user experience, and basic SEO 

• Identifies and recommends improvements to increase performance and conversions 



Scorecard (What Success Looks Like)

• Consistent content execution (X+ posts per week, on schedule) 

• Increase in engagement rate (likes, comments, shares) 

• Growth in followers and reach across platforms 

• Weekly reporting delivered on time with clear insights

title: WordPress Content Editors
description:
We require someone with experience using WordPress, with and without page builders such as Elementor/Bakery/Divi, to upload, format, and style Blog, Project, and Page content for our clients. 



In-house, we develop the strategy for our clients and manage the project. Our team of Content Writers produce it. We verify it against our tools. Then our WordPress Content Editors upload, format, and style it, in line with each client's theme and branding, including completing Yoast/Rank Math suggestions, so that it's ready for our in-house team to verify again with on-page optimisation tools and publish.



Our best WordPress Content Editors:

- Create and design new pages in line with the client's branding, with the copy that's prepared for them.

- Ensure that the copy is uploaded with the same formatting, with the right heading tags, and query anything that seems inaccurate that may have been missed in an earlier step. 

- They collate the images from the client's website, optimise the file name, alt text, file size and dimensions, and add to the Blog, Project, or Page.

- They complete the Yoast/Rank Math requirements.



We pay per page, or per batch of pages. We ask our WordPress Content Editors in Slack for their rate for the project, then select the most reasonable cost. Once we get to know you and your quality, we place more weight on your style, your quality, and which project is best suited for you, not just your rate. Ongoing gigs as and when we require.



To apply, we ask you to write one paragraph. This paragraph should be about 6-8 sentences in British English. We would like you to explain the difference between an okay web page design and on-page optimisation vs a great web page design and on-page optimisation.

title: Email Specialist
description:
Email Specialist



Hey! We’re Dilate, a results-driven digital marketing agency with an impressive, diverse client list and a world-class, global team.



It’s our mission to do great marketing, for great businesses, ethically and in a way that benefits us all. We want our clients to win, their customers to win, and our employees to win.



We’ve got pretty ambitious growth plans and we’re looking for an
 Specialist to join our team.



We are looking for someone with strong hands-on experience in
 marketing, automation, and performance optimisation. You’ll have a deep understanding of customer journeys, segmentation, and deliverability, along with a passion for driving measurable results through
 campaigns. Ideally, you’ll have agency experience managing multiple client accounts across different industries.



This opportunity is remote working from home, full-time Monday to Friday 9–5 pm (AWST) as we are an agency located in Perth, Western Australia.



So, the job…



* Plan, build, and deploy high-performing
 campaigns across platforms such as Klaviyo, Mailchimp, and HubSpot.

* Implement segmentation and personalisation strategies to deliver relevant, engaging communications.

* Monitor and optimise campaign performance (open rates, CTR, conversions, revenue) to drive continuous improvement.

* Build and manage automated
 flows including welcome series, nurture campaigns, abandoned cart sequences, and re-engagement programs.

* Identify opportunities to enhance customer journeys, improving retention and lifetime value.

* Manage the technical health of
 systems, including deliverability (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) and integrations across the MarTech stack.

* Ensure compliance with global privacy standards (GDPR/CCPA) and maintain strong data hygiene practices.

* Collaborate with internal teams to deliver integrated marketing strategies and client success.



Your skills:



* Excellent written and spoken English.

* Minimum 5+ years’ experience in
 marketing, ideally within an agency environment.

* Strong experience with platforms such as Klaviyo, Mailchimp, and HubSpot.

* Deep understanding of
 automation, segmentation, personalisation, and campaign strategy.

* Proven ability to improve
 performance metrics and drive client results.

* Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data and provide actionable insights.

* Experience with A/B testing and optimisation techniques.

* Solid technical understanding of deliverability, integrations, and database management.

* HTML/CSS knowledge for
 builds is advantageous.

* Ability to manage multiple campaigns and client accounts simultaneously.

* Strong communication and collaboration skills with a proactive, solutions-focused mindset.



This is a great opportunity to be a part of a fast-growing agency.

If you feel that this is the job for you, we would love to hear from you!

Please include your resume and cover letter so we know you are serious about this opportunity.



Thanks for your time,

The Dilate Digital Team

title: Customer Support / Administrative Assistant
description:
We’re looking for the helpful, friendly first voice customers hear when they call our company. The right person for this job has excellent skills in spoken and written English. You must be technically-savvy enough to help customers navigate our websites as well as to help customers with account issues and purchases. 



When you’re not assisting a customer, you’ll stay challenged with a variety of administrative and organizational tasks. In this position, you’ll be a key part of keeping our daily operations humming.  



This is a full-time, 5-day, 40-hour a week position with a schedule based on US time. Your work schedule is predictable yet varied enough to keep you interested. On any given day, you might: 



• Help a customer who calls to ask a question about their login account 

• Enter and cancel invoices

• Work to prepare course documents for publication on our learning management system.

• Enter products into the e-commerce section of our site, adjusting prices and product descriptions

• Communicate with customers by phone,
, and our live support chat software in order to solve problems and to assist with customer orders.

• Approval of blog visitor comments for publication on our sites.

• Assist with various projects assigned by management.

• Prepare customer billing reports and track payments



This job might be for you if:

>? You communicate clearly. You write well. You speak eloquently. You can explain just about anything to anyone, and you’re comfortable communicating in writing and on the phone.



>? You pay attention to the details. As far as you’re concerned, anything worth doing is worth doing right, every single time. You stay focused, and nothing falls through the cracks on your watch.



> You enjoy solving problems. You love taking on challenges and finding creative solutions.  You don’t get flustered easily. If you don’t know the answer, you’ll dig until you find it.



>? You think on your feet. You like learning new things, and you can learn quickly



>? You are competent and pride yourself in doing a good job, and when you take on a task, you own it.



Other than having an intermediate Microsoft Word and Excel skill level, there are no specific academic or work experience requirements for this position. To land this job, you will need to be able to articulate why you are the best candidate using specific examples from your school and/or work background. Internships, volunteer work and side projects count. Use your cover letter to cite specific examples of how your organizational skills and attention to detail have helped in the past. 



What We Offer:

• A full-time, long-term position.

• Opportunity to work on meaningful projects that help professionals maintain their engineering licensure and advance their careers.

• Collaborative, supportive team environment.

• Attractive salary and benefits package including paid holidays, paid sick leave, paid vacation, and 13th month bonus





How to Apply

To be considered for this position:

1. Submit your resume plus a cover letter that explains your qualifications for the position 

2. Specify your required salary or compensation expectations.

3. Include “Job Posting Number CS0426” in your response.
salary: negotiable based on experience and skill

title: Web Researcher
description:
What You’ll Be Doing:

The "Scavenger Hunt": You’ll be given a "fake person" (a test profile). Your job is to go to specific websites and search for that person’s info.

Mapping the Path: You will document every step. If you have to solve a CAPTCHA, click a specific checkbox, or switch between searching for a phone number vs. an
, you’ll write it down.

Link Catching: You’ll copy and save the web addresses (URLs) for specific pages, like the exact page where a search starts and the exact page where the "delete" request is finished.

Detail Catching: You’ll note the "annoying" stuff—like if a site makes you wait for an
 or if a button is hidden at the bottom of the page.

This Job is Perfect If:

You’re a "Power User": You’re fast on a computer, good with browser tabs, and know how to find things online.

You’re Super Observant: You notice the small details that others miss (like a tiny "Skip" button or a change in a website's link).

You Like Instructions: you enjoy taking a messy process and turning it into a clear, step-by-step guide for others.

title: Title Research Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a detail-oriented Title Research Specialist to support property title research and records review. This role focuses on reviewing public records, verifying ownership history, and identifying any issues tied to a property.



This is a production-focused role, ideal for someone who has hands-on experience in title searching or working with property records and can handle routine research with accuracy and consistency.



Key Responsibilities



Conduct title searches using public records and online databases

Review chain of title, ownership history, and property transfers

Identify liens, judgments, easements, and other encumbrances

Compile clear and organized reports on title findings

Verify accuracy of legal descriptions and property details

Maintain organized documentation of all research performed

Flag discrepancies or issues for further review



Required Skills & Qualifications:



2–4+ years of experience in title searching, title research, or property records work

Experience working with U.S. property records or title companies

Familiarity with title software or research tools

Background in real estate, legal support, or land/title services

Familiarity with county records, assessor sites, and public record databases

Strong understanding of chain of title and common title issues

High attention to detail and accuracy

Comfortable handling repetitive research tasks with consistency

Strong written communication skills for documenting findings

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

title: Legal Contracts & Billing Coordinator
description:
Title: Legal Contracts & Billing Coordinator

Reports to: Finance Coordinator

Status: Full-time



The Legal Contracts & Billing Coordinator will be responsible for supporting our finance team in a wide range of financial and administrative duties such as contract management, collection of payments, processing payments, updating financial records, and managing invoices. This role plays a crucial part in ensuring the financial health and integrity of the firm. A strong candidate will have a proven track record handling financial transactions involving client information, meeting daily billing goals and deadlines, be proactive in following up to complete tasks, and have excellent customer service tone and etiquette.



Description:

- Draft, review, and organize contracts, ensuring they are accurate, complete, and compliant with company standards.

- Act as a point of contact for clients regarding current and outstanding payments; this includes collecting initial payments, upcoming and overdue payments in a timely fashion.

- Conduct courteous and professional phone calls and send
s to address payment inquiries and negotiate payment arrangements.

- Create and issue invoices in the financial system, accurately reflecting retained services.

- Verify invoice details, such as pricing, terms, and payment deadlines, to eliminate discrepancies with attorneys and operational staff.

- Monitor contract status and follow up with relevant parties to ensure prompt signatures and adherence to agreed terms.

- Track and manage payment schedules to minimize overdue accounts.

- Organize, secure, enter, and maintain records of contracts, invoices, and related financial documents for auditing and reference purposes.



Requirements: 

- College graduate with a degree in finance, business or a related field is a plus.

- Prior experience in contract management, accounts receivable, or customer service is preferred.

- Proven track record of trust involving financial transactions and handling sensitive client information.

- Preferably has worked in a legal setting.

- Proficiency in both Spanish and English.

- Proven experience in a finance-related role or administrative position is a plus.

- Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, SAP, or similar).

- Strong customer service skills

- Strong organizational and time management skills.

- Attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and record-keeping.

- Excellent communication skills and the ability to work effectively within a team.

- Basic understanding of financial principles and practices.



Non-negotiable:

- Experience in collections

- Experience in drafting contracts

- Microsoft Word and Adobe Acrobat experience



Application Details:

1. Please use this link to apply: 

2. You must put “Starfish Finance Auxiliary” in the headline of your application.

3. On the summary, explain your interest for the role, and explain why you are the best candidate for the role.

4. Please note that a failure to follow these instructions will result in not being considered for this position.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
We’re a fast-growing performance advertising startup based in Canada. We’re hiring an Appointment Setter on a long-term monthly retainer (after probation, and based on performance). You’ll support our clients by calling leads and turning them into booked appointments.



We want Setters who think like consultants, not script-readers. You’ll be working warm leads in the health and beauty service space, like Medspas, Laser Clinics, and Estheticians.



**What You’ll Do:**



- Call and qualify warm leads within 5 minutes of them coming in through our CRM

- Keep the CRM clean and organized (scheduling, notes, and pipeline management)

- Follow up with potential patients by SMS and
 to increase booking rates

- Handle objections professionally and help leads understand treatments (Botox, PRP, Laser Hair Removal, etc.)

- Work with our team to improve scripts and share feedback on lead quality

- Join daily and weekly check-in meetings



**What We’re Looking For:**



- **Flawless English communication** (spoken and written). You should sound confident, clear, and friendly on the phone, with little to no accent

- **Sales or appointment setting experience**

- **Hands-on experience** working with Medspas or selling high-ticket beauty services

- **Tech-savvy:** Comfortable in CRMs (GoHighLevel/GHL is a plus)

- **Availability:** You must work during Eastern Standard Time (EST) business hours

- **Focus:** This needs to be your main focus. No sub-contracts or agencies. You’ll work closely with our team

- **Reliability:** Quick replies in Slack and
, plus a quiet workspace and stable internet



**This is perfect for someone who:**



- Thrives in a fast-paced, high-pressure startup

- Isn’t afraid of the phone and can take rejection without getting rattled

- Wants a long-term role with room to grow and a wide range of clients



**To Apply, Please Send:**



- A short video introducing yourself and your relevant experience

- Your answer to this scenario: How would you handle a lead who says, “That’s too expensive” for a laser treatment?

- Your availability (EST)

- Salary and commission expectations (CAD)

- Your resume or CV



If you’re selected for an interview, we may ask you to complete a mock-call assessment.

title: Interior Designer for Airbnb
description:
We’re looking for a creative, reliable Interior Designer to help design and furnish apartments and homes for short-term rentals (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, etc.).



This is a freelance, project-based role — ideal for someone who enjoys creating modern, stylish, and functional spaces that photograph beautifully and attract guests.



What You’ll Do:

- Design and furnish apartment units and houses for short-term rentals

- Create mood boards, layouts, and renders to visualize how furniture and décor will look together

- Source all furniture and décor pieces and organize links and prices in an Excel or Google Sheet for easy ordering

- Offer different design concepts or layout options when requested

- Work closely with our team to stay within the given budget for each property



Project Details

- Smaller properties (e.g., studios or 1BR apartments) are quicker and lower cost to design

- Larger properties (e.g., 3–5BR homes) will have higher project fees, as they require more design work and sourcing

- We will provide a rough furnishing budget and project scope upfront for each property



Ongoing Partnership

We’re looking for someone to work with long-term.

If we’re a good fit, we’d like to refer you to our students (who are setting up their own short-term rentals) for their interior design projects as well — giving you consistent future opportunities.



Requirements

- Strong eye for modern, trending interior design styles

- Experience designing Airbnb or hospitality-style spaces

- Ability to source furniture, décor, and artwork within budget

- Can create renders or visual mockups to showcase how the space will look

- Excellent communication and organization



About the Role

- Freelance / Gig-Based: Projects assigned as needed

- Flexible Hours: Work on your own schedule and deliver by agreed deadlines

- Compensation: Paid per project based on size and scope



To Apply

Please include:

- A short introduction about yourself and your design background

- A portfolio or sample work (Airbnb or residential projects preferred)

- Your typical design rates or pricing range (if available)

title: Senior MERN Stack Developer / Technical Lead (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a highly experienced Senior MERN Stack Developer to join and strengthen our remote team. This is not just a development role we are specifically looking for someone who can also take on a leadership and management responsibility within the team.



The ideal candidate has strong hands-on experience with the MERN Stack, is confident working across backend, frontend, and mobile development, and is capable of reviewing, managing, and maintaining high coding standards across both existing and newly developed code.



About the Role

You will play a key role in our development team by actively contributing to the codebase while also overseeing technical quality. You will be expected to help guide the team, review implementations, and ensure that all code  both existing and new  is clean, scalable, maintainable, and aligned with best practices.

Tech Environment



Backend: Node.js

Frontend: React.js

Mobile App: React Native

Stack: MERN



Key Responsibilities

Develop, maintain, and improve our existing web and mobile applications

Build and optimize backend services using Node.js

Develop and improve frontend features using React.js

Support and enhance our mobile app built with React Native

Take ownership of code quality across the entire project

Review, evaluate, and control both existing code and newly written code

Establish and enforce development standards, best practices, and coding guidelines

Provide technical direction and support to other developers

Take on a management / lead role within the development team

Help plan development workflows and ensure technical consistency across projects

Identify areas for improvement in architecture, structure, and performance





Requirements

Extensive experience with the MERN Stack

Strong backend development experience with Node.js

Strong frontend development experience with React.js

Solid experience with React Native

Several years of professional experience in software development

Previous experience in a senior, lead, or technical management role

Proven ability to review code, manage code quality, and guide other developers

Strong understanding of software architecture, scalability, and maintainability

Experience working with existing codebases and improving legacy code

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Strong communication and leadership skills

Excellent command of English



Nice to Have

Experience leading remote development teams

Experience with CI/CD, cloud infrastructure, and deployment workflows

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Experience setting up technical processes and team development standards



What We Offer

Fully remote position

Opportunity to take on a key technical and leadership role

Work with an existing team on active, real-world products

Long-term collaboration

Flexible work environment

Direct impact on product quality, team performance, and technical direction

If you are a highly experienced MERN Stack Developer who is ready to combine hands-on development with technical leadership and code oversight, we would love to hear from you.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

title: Accountant
description:
BEAR PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

Accounting Controller — Virtual Assistant (Philippines)

Remote | Part-Time to Full-Time | $8–$12 USD/hour DOE





Position Overview

Company

Bear Property Management — Spearfish, South Dakota, USA

Position

Accounting Controller VA

Pay Rate

$8–$12 USD/hour depending on experience

Hours

20–40 hours/week, potential for full-time

Schedule

Overlap with US Mountain Time (MDT, UTC-6) required — minimum 4 hours/day





About Bear Property Management

Bear Property Management is a fast-growing property management company based in the Black Hills of South Dakota. We manage over 300 rental doors across long-term rentals, vacation rentals, and a boutique hotel. We run a construction department, maintenance department, and cleaning department. Our software stack includes QuickBooks Online (QBO), Buildium, Hostaway, and Google Workspace.

We are a high-trust, high-accountability team. We move fast, we expect accuracy, and we reward people who take ownership of their work. This role is critical to our financial operations and will have direct impact on how we make business decisions.



What You Will Do

This is not a simple data entry role. We need someone who understands accounting logic, can work independently inside multiple software platforms, and will take ownership of the accuracy of our books. You will be the primary person responsible for keeping our financial records clean, organized, and current across our property management and real estate portfolios.



Daily & Weekly Responsibilities

Enter and reconcile transactions in QuickBooks Online (QBO) across multiple entities — Bear Property Management LLC, Bear Investment Holdings LLC, OCC LLC, and Rise Properties LLC

Enter and reconcile owner statements, maintenance bills, and tenant charges in Buildium

Code transactions to the correct GL accounts and class/department in QBO

Process and track owner draws, mortgage payments, and vendor invoices

Reconcile bank accounts monthly — flag discrepancies immediately

Generate and review owner statements in Buildium prior to payout cycles

Track accounts receivable aging — identify overdue balances and alert management

Support monthly close process — ensure all transactions are entered and categorized correctly

Assist with data entry in Hostaway for vacation rental financial tracking

Maintain organized digital records in Google Drive

Communicate clearly via WhatsApp and
 — respond to questions within business hours



Software You Must Know

QuickBooks Online (QBO) — non-negotiable, must have strong working experience

Buildium — property management accounting software (training provided if needed but prior experience strongly preferred)

Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail

Hostaway — vacation rental software (training provided)

WhatsApp — primary team communication tool



What We Are Looking For

Non-Negotiable Requirements

Minimum 2 years of QBO experience — must be able to demonstrate this

Strong English communication skills — written and spoken, you will interact with the owner directly

Reliable high-speed internet and a dedicated, distraction-free workspace

Available to overlap with US Mountain Time (MDT) for at least 4 hours per day

Extreme attention to detail — one wrong number affects owner payouts and business decisions

Ability to work independently without micromanagement — we expect you to own your work



Strongly Preferred

Experience with Buildium or similar property management software (AppFolio, Propertyware, Rent Manager)

Background in real estate accounting, property management, or hospitality accounting

Familiarity with US-based LLC accounting structures and intercompany transactions

Experience reconciling multiple bank accounts simultaneously

Prior work with US-based clients — understanding of US accounting standards



The Person We Are Looking For

You are organized by nature. You do not get overwhelmed by large transaction volumes. You flag problems proactively instead of waiting to be asked. You communicate clearly when something does not make sense rather than guessing. You are consistent — you show up, you do the work at the same quality every day, and you take pride in accuracy.

If you are the kind of person who gets satisfaction from clean books, reconciled accounts, and zero unexplained variances — this role is built for you.



What We Offer

$8–$12 USD/hour depending on demonstrated experience and skill

Consistent hours — this is not a one-off project, this is an ongoing role

Direct access to ownership — you will work closely with the company owner

Opportunity to grow into a full-time controller role as the company expands

Clear expectations and straightforward feedback — we do not play games

Stable, growing company — we have been operating for years and are expanding aggressively







HOW TO APPLY — READ CAREFULLY

We receive a high volume of applications. To be considered, your application MUST include all of the following. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Required in Your Application

A short video introduction (2–3 minutes maximum) — introduce yourself, describe your QBO experience specifically, and tell us one accounting problem you identified and fixed for a previous client. Upload to Google Drive or Loom and include the link.

Your resume with specific software experience listed — do not just say 'QuickBooks', tell us how many years, what types of transactions, and how many entities you managed simultaneously

Answer this question in writing (minimum 150 words): 'Describe a time you found an error in a client's books that the client did not know about. What was the error, how did you find it, and what did you do to fix it?'

Your current availability — what hours (in Mountain Standard Time) are you available to work, and how many hours per week are you seeking?

Your expected hourly rate within the $8–$12 USD range and why



Optional But Will Move You to the Top of the List

A sample or screenshot (anonymized) of a QBO P&L by class report you have prepared — this shows us you understand class tracking

Any certifications — QuickBooks ProAdvisor, Xero, or similar

A reference from a current or previous US-based client we can contact

title: Admin Support VA
description:
Keeping the business running smoothly behind the scenes.



This role focuses on the day-to-day admin that keeps our web design studio ticking — from managing communications, to keeping our records organised and our inbox under control. You’ll be supporting a founder-led UK web design studio, so familiarity with working with UK-based clients is a bonus.



What you’ll handle:



Inbox & communications

Monitoring and triaging the main inbox

Drafting or sending routine replies

Flagging anything time-sensitive or client-facing

Following up on outstanding queries or requests



Finance admin

Tracking down expense receipts

Chasing outstanding invoices via 17hats



General organisation

Helping keep client records accurate and up to date

Research tasks as needed



Requirements:

Fluent English — written and spoken

Available during UK core hours Mon–Fri 10am–2pm GMT (6pm–9pm Philippine time)

Comfortable using Google Workspace

Basic familiarity with QuickBooks or similar accounting tools

Experience with 17hats or a similar CRM/project management tool would be a bonus

Discreet, reliable and detail-oriented — you’ll be handling real business data

Able to work independently without hand-holding

Familiarity with how small creative or digital businesses operate is a bonus



This role would start on a gig/ad hoc basis with the potential to grow into a part-time role as trust builds.

title: Credit Dispute Specialist
description:
Now Hiring: Credit Dispute Specialist

Are you detail-oriented, confident on the phone, and passionate about helping clients improve their credit? We’re seeking a Credit Dispute Specialist to join our team and manage the full lifecycle of client disputes—from reviewing credit reports to submitting dispute letters and tracking outcomes.



This role goes beyond typical credit repair: you’ll be filing disputes with the Big 3 credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) and with regulatory and oversight bodies such as CFPB, BBB, ATG, and FTC. You’ll be the key point of contact for clients throughout the dispute process, ensuring accurate, timely resolutions while maintaining exceptional client communication.



If you thrive in a structured, process-driven environment and want to make a real impact on people’s financial lives, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities:

- Credit Dispute & Account Management

- Review client credit reports to identify inaccurate, outdated, or unverifiable items

- Prepare, submit, and track dispute letters with the Big 3 credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)

- File disputes and complaints with CFPB, BBB, ATG, and FTC

- Monitor dispute timelines and follow up to ensure timely resolution

- Analyze bureau, creditor, and regulatory responses for accuracy and compliance

- Keep clients updated on progress and next steps

- Maintain detailed records of dispute activity and outcomes



Administrative & CRM

- Maintain accurate client data in CRM systems (Go High Level & CRC preferred)

- Assist with general administrative tasks related to credit repair



What We’re Looking For

- 1–2 years of hands-on experience in credit repair or credit disputes

- Proven experience in appointment setting or client outreach (credit repair experience preferred)

- Strong knowledge of credit reporting, dispute processes, and relevant laws (FCRA, FDCPA)

- Experience filing disputes with credit bureaus and regulatory agencies (CFPB, BBB, ATG, FTC) a plus

- Professional phone and written communication skills

- Ability to manage multiple client accounts independently

- Detail-oriented, dependable, and self-motivated

- CRM experience (Go High Level preferred)



How to Apply: To be considered, please submit:

- Your CV/Resume link

- A 1-minute video introduction

- Your family birth order (Eldest, Middle, Youngest)



 Subject Format: Credit Dispute Specialist – [Your Name]_[Birth Order]

?? Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Virtual Assistant - Real Estate Operations & AI Automation

How to Apply

title: HR Recruiter (Remote – U.S. Business Hours)
description:
About Us:

US Direct Hire partners with growing U.S.-based home care agencies to provide reliable remote workforce solutions that support operational efficiency and service continuity. We are seeking a proactive and results-driven HR Recruiter to join our remote team and support caregiver recruitment initiatives for our partner agencies.



Role Overview:

As an HR Recruiter, you will support end-to-end caregiver recruitment processes, including candidate sourcing, screening, interview coordination, and onboarding support. This role focuses on maintaining structured recruitment workflows, ensuring strong candidate experience, and meeting hiring targets across multiple partner agencies. The position requires working U.S. business hours to ensure real-time collaboration and recruitment continuity.



Key Responsibilities:

Source, screen, and assess caregiver candidates using approved recruitment platforms and sourcing channels

Manage job postings and maintain organized candidate pipelines within recruitment systems

Conduct initial candidate outreach, screening calls, and interview coordination

Ensure timely follow-ups with candidates through phone, messaging, and

Support recruitment workflow tracking and hiring progress reporting

Coordinate scheduling of interviews with client agency leadership teams

Assist with onboarding documentation and new hire process coordination

Track recruitment metrics and prepare regular hiring performance reports

Maintain candidate records and ensure compliance with recruitment processes

Support continuous improvement of recruitment efficiency and candidate experience

Perform other recruitment-related administrative tasks as assigned



Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field preferred

Proven experience in recruitment, talent acquisition, or HR coordination roles

Experience supporting healthcare, home care, or high-volume hiring environments is preferred

Familiarity with applicant tracking systems and recruitment technology tools

Strong organizational, communication, and candidate engagement skills

Ability to work independently while following structured workflows

Proficiency in Microsoft Office, CRM systems, and virtual collaboration tools

Ability to work consistently during U.S. business hours

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace

Commitment to working within a performance-driven remote team environment

Agrees to undergo HIPAA and Cybersecurity training



What We Offer:

Competitive salary based on experience

Opportunity for performance-based incentives and bonuses

Remote work aligned with U.S. business operations

A structured and supportive team environment focused on growth and delivery excellence



HOW TO APPLY?

title: Daytime Scheduler (Remote - U.S. Business Hours)
description:
About Us:

We are partnering with a growing U.S.-based home care agency dedicated to delivering compassionate, reliable care to clients in their homes. We’re seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Caregiver Scheduler & Office Assistant to join the team remotely from the Philippines as an Independent Contractor.



Role Overview:

As a Caregiver Scheduler & Office Assistant, you will coordinate caregiver schedules to meet client needs, manage shift changes, and provide essential administrative support. This role requires working U.S. business hours to maintain seamless communication and scheduling accuracy.



Key Responsibilities:

Schedule and coordinate caregivers according to client requirements and availability

Manage last-minute shift changes, cancellations, and urgent requests

Maintain accurate scheduling records and confirm caregiver attendance

Communicate professionally with caregivers and clients regarding schedules and changes

Handle administrative tasks such as phone and
 management, and document preparation

Assist in ensuring smooth daily operations within a small but growing remote team





Requirements:

>Previous experience in home care or healthcare caregiver scheduling (mandatory)

>Familiarity with scheduling software and communication tools used in home care settings

>WellSky/Personal Care would be a plus

>Familiarity with phone applications such as but not limited to Vonage, RingCentral etc.

>Strong organizational and multitasking skills

>Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal

>Ability to work U.S. business hours consistently

>Reliable high-speed internet connection and a quiet, dedicated workspace

>Commitment to being a key part of a small, growing office

>Agrees to undergo HIPAA and Cyber security training





What We Offer:

Competitive salary based on experience

Opportunity for bonuses based on performance

Remote work with flexible but consistent U.S. hours

A supportive team environment focused on growth and quality care





HOW TO APPLY?

Please
 the following information to 
 with the subject line "Daytime Scheduler":

Resume/CV

3-minute (or less) video introducing yourself and why you would be a good fit for the role.

Cover letter, which includes "Daytime Scheduler" in the first paragraph and addresses specific requirements mentioned in the ad.

Personality profile – As a tool to help get to know you better, please go to this specific site, and answer the questions. Once completed, take a screenshot of the results (pie chart), and
 it back. There is an optional report to download once you complete the quiz, but do not do that. There is a charge for that. The pie chart results will be sufficient. 



For inquiries, please
 
 only apply for this role if you have the following home office requirements:

Perfectly working noise cancellation Headset with Microphone and webcam

Must have a reliable computer and stable internet connection of at least 100 Mbps

Quiet room with no distractions or background noises

Must have backup plan if the power goes out or if your internet connection becomes unstable during your shift



Must submit complete requirements to be considered. 



Qualified applicants will be notified via
 of their interview schedule.  



For any inquiries,

title: Video Editor (DTC eCommerce)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing health and wellness brand obsessed with customer psychology and creative excellence. We don't just "make content," we build high-performance assets that drive millions in revenue. We are looking for a Video Editor who is genuinely passionate about performance, speed, and continuous improvement.



This is not a role for someone who just wants to follow a storyboard and clock out. We need a creative who looks at a hook and immediately thinks of three ways to make it more engaging, faster, and higher-converting.



Our philosophy: we prioritize 10 ads at 80% quality over 2 ads at 100%. Speed and volume win in performance marketing. If you're someone who obsesses over pixel-perfect polish at the expense of output, this isn't the right fit.



The Role

You will own the creation of high-volume, high-performance video ads, targeting 10–20 videos per week depending on length. This includes short-form for Meta/TikTok, long-form VSLs, AI avatars, B-roll edits, and voiceover-driven content.



You'll work from creative briefs and scripts provided by our creative strategists and copywriters, turning direction into polished, high-converting assets at speed. You take deep pride in ownership, turn raw footage and AI outputs into systematic creative machines, and ensure our creative output is a competitive advantage.



If you are a builder who thrives on iterating based on data rather than just "vibes," we want to talk to you.



What You Will Do

* Full-Spectrum Production: Create high-converting short-form ads (15–60s), UGC-style content, and long-form VSLs for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube.

* AI Mastery: Take full ownership of our AI tech stack, including Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, and ElevenLabs for video, and Nano-Banana for statics, to produce high-quality AI video, avatar, and voiceover outputs at scale.

* Source Fresh Creatives: Proactively find and source fresh B-roll and visual assets from across the internet. You never run dry, and you never recycle.



What We're Looking For

Experience & Skills

* 2+ years of video editing experience, with specific experience editing for DTC brands or performance marketing.

* Technical mastery: Fluency in Premiere, Final Cut, or CapCut, plus advanced proficiency in AI video tools (Veo 3, HeyGen, Runway, ElevenLabs, Nano-Banana).

* Strategic thinking: Strong instincts for hooks, pacing, and storytelling in a Direct Response (DR) context.

* Resourcefulness: Proven ability to source fresh creatives, B-roll, and visual assets independently. You always have new material to work with.



Work Style

* Speed over perfection. You can move fast and deliver high volume without sacrificing the quality that matters.

* Implement feedback quickly, often same-day turnaround.

* Improvement-driven: You can demonstrate how you've personally improved a creative's performance through iteration or better editing workflows.

* Excellent English, clear written and verbal communication for seamless collaboration.

* Self-learner. You figure things out on your own. Whether it's a new tool, a new technique, or a new platform, you don't wait to be taught.

* Organized file structures and version control for rapid iteration.



Commitment

Full-time and exclusive. This role requires your full professional focus. We invest heavily in our people, training, tools, growth, and we're looking for someone who's equally invested in building something long-term with us.



Click here to apply :

title: Creator Sourcing & Coordination
description:
PLEASE APPLY THROUGH THIS LINK: 



Location: Fully Remote

Commitment: Full-time

Time zone: UK/EU preferred

Reports to:** Head of Creator Team



About Adcrate:



Adcrate is a fast-growing, AI-driven performance creative agency helping eCommerce and digital product brands scale through high-performing content and paid media systems.

We build premium creative that converts, powered by strategic thinking, data, and fast iteration. Our team blends strategists, editors, and performance leads - lean, smart, and obsessed with quality.

We’re remote, collaborative, ambitious, and building the future of creative-first growth.



Role Overview:



We’re looking for an experienced and highly organised Creator Sourcing & Coordination to join the Creator Team at Adcrate.

This role is focused on **creator sourcing and coordination at scale** - managing creator requests, ensuring strong communication, and keeping everything moving across multiple brands. You’ll work closely with Leona (Head of Creator Team), acting as a reliable, experienced operator who can take ownership of day-to-day coordination and reduce the need for constant oversight.



Key Responsibilities:



Creator Coordination:

- Manage creator requests across multiple briefs

- Handle outreach and follow-ups with creators

- Keep timelines on track and ensure consistent progress



Creator Sourcing:

- Source creators aligned to briefs and brand needs

- Support more complex or high-priority requests

- Sense-check creator selections before they are shared



Ownership & Communication:

- Take ownership of tasks end-to-end without needing to be chased

- Communicate clearly with creators and internal teams

- Raise any delays or issues early



Team Support:

- Work closely with the Creator Team on day-to-day execution

- Support junior tea
mbers in improving their:

    - Proactivity

    - Communication

    - Ownership



Tools You’ll Use:

- Slack

- Notion

- Air (or similar creator sourcing platforms)

- Google Workspace



What Success Looks Like:

- Creator requests are consistently delivered on time with no gaps or delays

- Minimal need for follow-ups or chasing

- Clear, accurate communication with creators across all briefs

- Strong creator matches aligned to briefs and brand needs

- Proactive handling of requests (nothing stalls or gets dropped)

- Consistent, reliable delivery across multiple briefs without oversight

- Head of Creator Team is no longer pulled into day-to-day coordination or fixing issues



Who You Are:

- 2-3 years experience in creator sourcing, influencer marketing, or UGC coordination

- Experience working across multiple brands or campaigns at once

- Highly organised and able to manage multiple moving parts without dropping things

- Proactive and reliable - you don’t need to be chased

- Clear and confident communicator, especially when working with creators

- Strong prioritisation skills - you know what needs attention first

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced, remote environment

- Agency experience is a plus



Culture & Perks:

- Fully remote team with a high-performance culture

- Annual team retreat

- Fast-growing company = fast growth in your role

- A supportive, smart, and ambitious team

- A place where your ideas actually get built - quickly

title: Customer Service Representative UK - Full Time Job Position
description:
Customer Service Representative



Full-time, remote work. Immediate start. 1-2 people needed for growing team.



***We repost our ad regularly for improved visibility when we have an open position. If you have responded to the work ad once, you do not need to remessage to the latest ad.***



We are an established hardware company looking for Customer Service Representatives to support the growth of our international business. Primary responsibilities include attending to customer queries over
 and WhatsApp instant messages and identifying which products customers should purchase. A successful candidate will be passionate about delivering an enjoyable customer experience, have excellent English written communication skills, very high attention to detail, and the ability to work in an organised manner.



You will not have to voice speak with any customer. All communication will be text-based.



We are looking for people who want to work with us long-term. Consequently, we seek to be a company with a work environment, culture people will also enjoy working with long-term.



Job Responsibilities

- Must be able to work UK work hours Monday to Friday - 8 am until 5 pm and weekend shifts when assigned.

- Other work shift times may be included: Weekend shifts & late UK shifts.

- Daily monitoring of incoming
 & instant messenger customer queries.

- Categorising & labeling customer queries for providing timely & accurate responses.

- Attending customer queries by helping them identify which specific products they should purchase.

- Dialoging with customers and requesting additional information from customers when necessary to help with the product identification process.

- Providing customers with an overall excellent customer experience in regards to timeliness of responses, quality of communication, and the accuracy of purchase advice given.

- Flagging and escalating difficult queries for experienced tea
mbers to follow up.

- Please respond to this job application with 'REF:
in your title so we know that you've read it thoroughly (make sure the reference is in the title itself, not just in the message content).



Experience & Skills

- Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Minimum 3-4 years of experience in a customer service role with a track record of providing customers with excellent service.

- Very high attention to detail and interest in learning technical products as well as able to spot even small differences between similar hardware products.

- Highly customer service oriented, positive and pleasant personal disposition.

- Highly organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects and tasks.

- Self-starter who is able to identify, scope, and manage projects from end to end.

- Team player willing and interested in helping other tea
mbers.



Benefits

- Full-time work

- Fully remote work

- Paid annual time off (4 weeks / 20 days)

- 13-month pay bonus when customer service targets are met

- Monthly bonus available: Tea
mbers who have graduated to working independently automatically qualify for a monthly bonus (usually takes about 3-6 months to reach this level)

- Experienced senior tea
mbers able to work independently can be offered flexible working hours or part-time work opportunities.

- Growing CSR team offers career progression and salary increase opportunities through senior tea
mber and training roles.



Hiring process

- 2-3 product identification assignments and a video interview

title: Outbound SDR / Appointment Setter
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a high-energy, results-driven Outbound Appointment Setter / SDR to help us connect with qualified leads, book appointments, and drive business growth through proactive outreach.



This role is ideal for someone who:



Enjoys being on the phone

Can build trust quickly

Thrives in a performance-based environment



We’re not just looking for someone who can dial — we want someone with a hunter mentality who enjoys the challenge of outbound sales and knows how to turn conversations into opportunities.



What You’ll Do



Make high-volume outbound calls (warm & cold leads)

Book qualified appointments for two growing companies

Get the founder/company booked on podcasts weekly through proactive outreach

Follow proven scripts, frameworks, and onboarding training

Handle objections confidently and guide conversations toward booking

Update lead statuses and manage pipelines in CRM

Participate in role-plays, coaching, and ongoing sales training

Learn and adapt quickly to our offer, audience, and messaging

(Optional growth) Assist with inbox management and outreach tasks



What We’re Looking For



Must-Have Qualities



Proven outbound calling or appointment setting experience

Strong English communication skills

Confident, persuasive, and emotionally intelligent

Ability to build rapport quickly and reduce resistance

Comfortable with performance-based compensation

Coachable and open to feedback and training

Self-motivated and consistent with daily targets



Preferred Background



Experience making 150–200 calls/day

Background in cold calling, SDR, telesales, or appointment setting

Familiar with CRM tools and pipeline management

Experience in B2B, service-based businesses, coaching, or healthcare (a plus)

Experience with podcast outreach, partnerships, or media booking (a plus)

Willingness to learn social media outreach and inbox engagement



What Success Looks Like

Success in this role is measured by results, not just activity. You will be expected to:



Maintain strong daily call volume

Consistently book qualified appointments across both companies

Secure consistent weekly podcast bookings

Improve show-up rates

Contribute to closed deals through quality conversations and follow-ups



We’re looking for someone who can quickly ramp up and help increase qualified conversations and brand visibility week over week.



How to Apply

Send your resume to: 

Subject line: I am an Outbound Caller – [Your Name]



Include a 2–3 minute Loom video covering:

Your outbound calling experience

Your best KPI results

Any podcast outreach / booking experience

Experience working with U.S. clients

Attach proof of performance (screenshots of calls, bookings, KPIs).
